authors_text: Ali Shafti,Victoria Derks,Hannah Kay,A. Aldo Faisal
title: The Response Shift Paradigm to Quantify Human Trust in AI Recommendations
title_zh: 响应转变范式以量化人类对人工智能建议的信任
abstract: Explainability, interpretability and how much they affect human trust in AI systems are ultimately problems of human cognition as much as machine learning, yet the effectiveness of AI recommendations and the trust afforded by end-users are typically not evaluated quantitatively. We developed and validated a general purpose Human-AI interaction paradigm which quantifies the impact of AI recommendations on human decisions. In our paradigm we confronted human users with quantitative prediction tasks: asking them for a first response, before confronting them with an AI's recommendations (and explanation), and then asking the human user to provide an updated final response. The difference between final and first responses constitutes the shift or sway in the human decision which we use as metric of the AI's recommendation impact on the human, representing the trust they place on the AI. We evaluated this paradigm on hundreds of users through Amazon Mechanical Turk using a multi-branched experiment confronting users with good/poor AI systems that had good, poor or no explainability. Our proof-of-principle paradigm allows one to quantitatively compare the rapidly growing set of XAI/IAI approaches in terms of their effect on the end-user and opens up the possibility of (machine) learning trust.
summary: Explainability, interpretability and how much they affect human trust in AI systems are ultimately problems of human cognition as much as machine learning, yet the effectiveness of AI recommendations and the trust afforded by end-users are typically not evaluated quantitatively. We developed and validated a general purpose Human-AI interaction paradigm which quantifies the impact of AI recommendations on human decisions. In our paradigm we confronted human users with quantitative prediction tasks: asking them for a first response, before confronting them with an AI's recommendations (and explanation), and then asking the human user to provide an updated final response. The difference between final and first responses constitutes the shift or sway in the human decision which we use as metric of the AI's recommendation impact on the human, representing the trust they place on the AI. We evaluated this paradigm on hundreds of users through Amazon Mechanical Turk using a multi-branched experiment confronting users with good/poor AI systems that had good, poor or no explainability. Our proof-of-principle paradigm allows one to quantitatively compare the rapidly growing set of XAI/IAI approaches in terms of their effect on the end-user and opens up the possibility of (machine) learning trust.
abstract_zh: 可解释性、可解释性以及它们对人类对人工智能系统信任的影响程度与机器学习一样，归根结底都是人类认知问题，但人工智能建议的有效性和最终用户提供的信任通常不会被定量评估。我们开发并验证了一种通用的人机交互范式，该范式量化了人工智能建议对人类决策的影响。在我们的范例中，我们向人类用户提出定量预测任务：在向他们提出人工智能的建议（和解释）之前，要求他们做出第一个响应，然后要求人类用户提供更新的最终响应。最终和第一次响应之间的差异构成了人类决策的转变或摇摆，我们将其用作人工智能推荐对人类影响的指标，代表了他们对人工智能的信任。我们通过 Amazon Mechanical Turk 对数百名用户评估了这一范式，使用多分支实验，让用户面对具有良好、较差或无解释性的好/差 AI 系统。我们的原理验证范式允许人们定量比较快速增长的 XAI/IAI 方法对最终用户的影响，并开启（机器）学习信任的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种量化人类对AI推荐信任度的响应偏移范式，通过对比用户在接触AI建议前后的决策变化来衡量AI影响力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对AI推荐效果及用户信任度的量化评估方法，尤其在可解释AI（XAI）领域需要客观指标比较不同技术对用户的影响。
AI.method: 设计双阶段实验：首先要求用户完成预测任务并提交初始答案，随后提供AI推荐（含解释）并要求更新答案，通过前后答案差异量化AI信任度影响。
AI.result: 在Amazon Mechanical Turk上对数百用户验证该范式，证实其可有效区分不同质量AI系统（含不同可解释性）对用户决策的影响程度。
AI.conclusion: 该范式为XAI/IAI方法提供了量化评估框架，使机器学习信任成为可能，并推动了人机交互中信任机制的研究方向。

authors_text: Leslie N. Smith
title: Cyclical Focal Loss
title_zh: 周期性焦点丧失
abstract: The cross-entropy softmax loss is the primary loss function used to train deep neural networks. On the other hand, the focal loss function has been demonstrated to provide improved performance when there is an imbalance in the number of training samples in each class, such as in long-tailed datasets. In this paper, we introduce a novel cyclical focal loss and demonstrate that it is a more universal loss function than cross-entropy softmax loss or focal loss. We describe the intuition behind the cyclical focal loss and our experiments provide evidence that cyclical focal loss provides superior performance for balanced, imbalanced, or long-tailed datasets. We provide numerous experimental results for CIFAR-10/CIFAR-100, ImageNet, balanced and imbalanced 4,000 training sample versions of CIFAR-10/CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-LT and Places-LT from the Open Long-Tailed Recognition (OLTR) challenge. Implementing the cyclical focal loss function requires only a few lines of code and does not increase training time. In the spirit of reproducibility, our code is available at \url{https://github.com/lnsmith54/CFL}.
summary: The cross-entropy softmax loss is the primary loss function used to train deep neural networks. On the other hand, the focal loss function has been demonstrated to provide improved performance when there is an imbalance in the number of training samples in each class, such as in long-tailed datasets. In this paper, we introduce a novel cyclical focal loss and demonstrate that it is a more universal loss function than cross-entropy softmax loss or focal loss. We describe the intuition behind the cyclical focal loss and our experiments provide evidence that cyclical focal loss provides superior performance for balanced, imbalanced, or long-tailed datasets. We provide numerous experimental results for CIFAR-10/CIFAR-100, ImageNet, balanced and imbalanced 4,000 training sample versions of CIFAR-10/CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-LT and Places-LT from the Open Long-Tailed Recognition (OLTR) challenge. Implementing the cyclical focal loss function requires only a few lines of code and does not increase training time. In the spirit of reproducibility, our code is available at \url{https://github.com/lnsmith54/CFL}.
abstract_zh: 交叉熵 softmax 损失是用于训练深度神经网络的主要损失函数。另一方面，当每个类别中的训练样本数量不平衡时（例如在长尾数据集中），焦点损失函数已被证明可以提供改进的性能。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的循环焦点损失，并证明它是比交叉熵 softmax 损失或焦点损失更通用的损失函数。我们描述了周期性焦点损失背后的直觉，并且我们的实验提供了证据，证明周期性焦点损失为平衡、不平衡或长尾数据集提供了卓越的性能。我们提供了来自开放长尾识别 (OLTR) 挑战的 CIFAR-10/CIFAR-100、ImageNet、CIFAR-10/CIFAR-100 的平衡和不平衡 4,000 个训练样本版本以及 ImageNet-LT 和 Places-LT 的大量实验结果。实现循环焦点损失函数只需要几行代码，并且不会增加训练时间。本着可重复性的精神，我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/lnsmith54/CFL} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的循环焦点损失函数，用于训练深度神经网络，并在多种数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 交叉熵softmax损失在处理类别不平衡数据时表现不佳，而焦点损失虽有所改进，但仍有局限性。本文旨在提出一种更通用的损失函数以解决这一问题。
AI.method: 本文引入了循环焦点损失函数，该方法在焦点损失的基础上进行了改进，并通过多种实验验证其效果。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，循环焦点损失在平衡、不平衡或长尾数据集上均表现优异，并且实现简单，不影响训练时间。
AI.conclusion: 循环焦点损失是一种更通用的损失函数，适用于各种数据集，且实现简单，具有较高的实用性。

authors_text: Sarala Padi,Seyed Omid Sadjadi,Dinesh Manocha,Ram D. Sriram
title: Multimodal Emotion Recognition using Transfer Learning from Speaker Recognition and BERT-based models
title_zh: 使用说话人识别和基于 BERT 模型的迁移学习进行多模态情感识别
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.02510
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.02510
abstract: Automatic emotion recognition plays a key role in computer-human interaction as it has the potential to enrich the next-generation artificial intelligence with emotional intelligence. It finds applications in customer and/or representative behavior analysis in call centers, gaming, personal assistants, and social robots, to mention a few. Therefore, there has been an increasing demand to develop robust automatic methods to analyze and recognize the various emotions. In this paper, we propose a neural network-based emotion recognition framework that uses a late fusion of transfer-learned and fine-tuned models from speech and text modalities. More specifically, we i) adapt a residual network (ResNet) based model trained on a large-scale speaker recognition task using transfer learning along with a spectrogram augmentation approach to recognize emotions from speech, and ii) use a fine-tuned bidirectional encoder representations from transformers (BERT) based model to represent and recognize emotions from the text. The proposed system then combines the ResNet and BERT-based model scores using a late fusion strategy to further improve the emotion recognition performance. The proposed multimodal solution addresses the data scarcity limitation in emotion recognition using transfer learning, data augmentation, and fine-tuning, thereby improving the generalization performance of the emotion recognition models. We evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed multimodal approach on the interactive emotional dyadic motion capture (IEMOCAP) dataset. Experimental results indicate that both audio and text-based models improve the emotion recognition performance and that the proposed multimodal solution achieves state-of-the-art results on the IEMOCAP benchmark.
summary: Automatic emotion recognition plays a key role in computer-human interaction as it has the potential to enrich the next-generation artificial intelligence with emotional intelligence. It finds applications in customer and/or representative behavior analysis in call centers, gaming, personal assistants, and social robots, to mention a few. Therefore, there has been an increasing demand to develop robust automatic methods to analyze and recognize the various emotions. In this paper, we propose a neural network-based emotion recognition framework that uses a late fusion of transfer-learned and fine-tuned models from speech and text modalities. More specifically, we i) adapt a residual network (ResNet) based model trained on a large-scale speaker recognition task using transfer learning along with a spectrogram augmentation approach to recognize emotions from speech, and ii) use a fine-tuned bidirectional encoder representations from transformers (BERT) based model to represent and recognize emotions from the text. The proposed system then combines the ResNet and BERT-based model scores using a late fusion strategy to further improve the emotion recognition performance. The proposed multimodal solution addresses the data scarcity limitation in emotion recognition using transfer learning, data augmentation, and fine-tuning, thereby improving the generalization performance of the emotion recognition models. We evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed multimodal approach on the interactive emotional dyadic motion capture (IEMOCAP) dataset. Experimental results indicate that both audio and text-based models improve the emotion recognition performance and that the proposed multimodal solution achieves state-of-the-art results on the IEMOCAP benchmark.
abstract_zh: 自动情绪识别在人机交互中发挥着关键作用，因为它有潜力通过情绪智能丰富下一代人工智能。它可应用于呼叫中心、游戏、个人助理和社交机器人等客户和/或代表性行为分析。因此，越来越需要开发强大的自动方法来分析和识别各种情绪。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于神经网络的情感识别框架，该框架使用来自语音和文本模态的迁移学习和微调模型的后期融合。更具体地说，我们 i) 采用基于残差网络 (ResNet) 的模型，使用迁移学习和频谱图增强方法在大规模说话人识别任务上进行训练，以识别语音中的情绪，ii) 使用基于 Transformer (BERT) 模型的微调双向编码器表示来表示和识别文本中的情绪。然后，所提出的系统使用后期融合策略将 ResNet 和基于 BERT 的模型分数结合起来，以进一步提高情感识别性能。所提出的多模态解决方案利用迁移学习、数据增强和微调解决了情感识别中的数据稀缺限制，从而提高了情感识别模型的泛化性能。我们评估了我们提出的多模态方法在交互式情感二元运动捕捉（IEMOCAP）数据集上的有效性。实验结果表明，基于音频和文本的模型都提高了情感识别性能，并且所提出的多模态解决方案在 IEMOCAP 基准上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于迁移学习和多模态融合的情感识别框架，结合语音和文本模态模型提升情绪识别性能。
AI.motivation: 情感识别在人机交互中具有重要意义，但面临数据稀缺和模型泛化能力不足的挑战，需通过迁移学习和多模态融合提升效果。
AI.method: 采用迁移学习微调语音领域的ResNet模型（结合频谱增强）和文本领域的BERT模型，通过晚期融合策略整合两种模态的特征进行情感分类。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP数据集上验证，语音和文本模型均优于单模态方法，多模态融合方案达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 多模态迁移学习有效缓解数据稀缺问题，通过语音-文本特征互补显著提升情感识别的鲁棒性和准确性。

search_text: Multimodal Emotion Recognition using Transfer Learning from Speaker Recognition and BERT-based models 使用说话人识别和基于 BERT 模型的迁移学习进行多模态情感识别 Automatic emotion recognition plays a key role in computer-human interaction as it has the potential to enrich the next-generation artificial intelligence with emotional intelligence. It finds applications in customer and/or representative behavior analysis in call centers, gaming, personal assistants, and social robots, to mention a few. Therefore, there has been an increasing demand to develop robust automatic methods to analyze and recognize the various emotions. In this paper, we propose a neural network-based emotion recognition framework that uses a late fusion of transfer-learned and fine-tuned models from speech and text modalities. More specifically, we i) adapt a residual network (ResNet) based model trained on a large-scale speaker recognition task using transfer learning along with a spectrogram augmentation approach to recognize emotions from speech, and ii) use a fine-tuned bidirectional encoder representations from transformers (BERT) based model to represent and recognize emotions from the text. The proposed system then combines the ResNet and BERT-based model scores using a late fusion strategy to further improve the emotion recognition performance. The proposed multimodal solution addresses the data scarcity limitation in emotion recognition using transfer learning, data augmentation, and fine-tuning, thereby improving the generalization performance of the emotion recognition models. We evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed multimodal approach on the interactive emotional dyadic motion capture (IEMOCAP) dataset. Experimental results indicate that both audio and text-based models improve the emotion recognition performance and that the proposed multimodal solution achieves state-of-the-art results on the IEMOCAP benchmark. 自动情绪识别在人机交互中发挥着关键作用，因为它有潜力通过情绪智能丰富下一代人工智能。它可应用于呼叫中心、游戏、个人助理和社交机器人等客户和/或代表性行为分析。因此，越来越需要开发强大的自动方法来分析和识别各种情绪。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于神经网络的情感识别框架，该框架使用来自语音和文本模态的迁移学习和微调模型的后期融合。更具体地说，我们 i) 采用基于残差网络 (ResNet) 的模型，使用迁移学习和频谱图增强方法在大规模说话人识别任务上进行训练，以识别语音中的情绪，ii) 使用基于 Transformer (BERT) 模型的微调双向编码器表示来表示和识别文本中的情绪。然后，所提出的系统使用后期融合策略将 ResNet 和基于 BERT 的模型分数结合起来，以进一步提高情感识别性能。所提出的多模态解决方案利用迁移学习、数据增强和微调解决了情感识别中的数据稀缺限制，从而提高了情感识别模型的泛化性能。我们评估了我们提出的多模态方法在交互式情感二元运动捕捉（IEMOCAP）数据集上的有效性。实验结果表明，基于音频和文本的模型都提高了情感识别性能，并且所提出的多模态解决方案在 IEMOCAP 基准上取得了最先进的结果。 本文提出一种基于迁移学习和多模态融合的情感识别框架，结合语音和文本模态模型提升情绪识别性能。 Sarala Padi,Seyed Omid Sadjadi,Dinesh Manocha,Ram D. authors_text: Yoones Rezaei,Stephen Lee,Daniel Mosse
title: Energy-Efficient Parking Analytics System using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习的节能停车分析系统
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 8th ACM International Conference on Systems for Energy-Efficient Buildings, Cities, and Transportation November 2021 Pages 81-90
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 8th ACM International Conference on Systems for Energy-Efficient Buildings, Cities, and Transportation November 2021 Pages 81-90
abstract: Advances in deep vision techniques and ubiquity of smart cameras will drive the next generation of video analytics. However, video analytics applications consume vast amounts of energy as both deep learning techniques and cameras are power-hungry. In this paper, we focus on a parking video analytics platform and propose RL-CamSleep, a deep reinforcement learning-based technique, to actuate the cameras to reduce the energy footprint while retaining the system's utility. Our key insight is that many video-analytics applications do not always need to be operational, and we can design policies to activate video analytics only when necessary. Moreover, our work is complementary to existing work that focuses on improving hardware and software efficiency. We evaluate our approach on a city-scale parking dataset having 76 streets spread across the city. Our analysis demonstrates how streets have various parking patterns, highlighting the importance of an adaptive policy. Our approach can learn such an adaptive policy that can reduce the average energy consumption by 76.38% and achieve an average accuracy of more than 98% in performing video analytics.
summary: Advances in deep vision techniques and ubiquity of smart cameras will drive the next generation of video analytics. However, video analytics applications consume vast amounts of energy as both deep learning techniques and cameras are power-hungry. In this paper, we focus on a parking video analytics platform and propose RL-CamSleep, a deep reinforcement learning-based technique, to actuate the cameras to reduce the energy footprint while retaining the system's utility. Our key insight is that many video-analytics applications do not always need to be operational, and we can design policies to activate video analytics only when necessary. Moreover, our work is complementary to existing work that focuses on improving hardware and software efficiency. We evaluate our approach on a city-scale parking dataset having 76 streets spread across the city. Our analysis demonstrates how streets have various parking patterns, highlighting the importance of an adaptive policy. Our approach can learn such an adaptive policy that can reduce the average energy consumption by 76.38% and achieve an average accuracy of more than 98% in performing video analytics.
abstract_zh: 深度视觉技术的进步和智能相机的普及将推动下一代视频分析。然而，由于深度学习技术和摄像头都耗电，视频分析应用程序会消耗大量能源。在本文中，我们重点关注停车视频分析平台，并提出了 RL-CamSleep（一种基于深度强化学习的技术）来驱动摄像头以减少能源足迹，同时保留系统的实用性。我们的主要见解是，许多视频分析应用程序并不总是需要运行，我们可以设计策略以仅在必要时激活视频分析。此外，我们的工作是对现有工作的补充，重点是提高硬件和软件效率。我们在城市规模停车数据集上评估我们的方法，该数据集遍布整个城市 76 条街道。我们的分析展示了街道如何具有不同的停车模式，凸显了适应性政策的重要性。我们的方法可以学习这样的自适应策略，可以将平均能耗降低 76.38%，并在执行视频分析时实现平均准确率超过 98%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的节能停车分析系统RL-CamSleep，通过动态控制摄像头工作状态降低能耗。
AI.motivation: 视频分析应用因深度学习和摄像头高能耗导致整体系统能源消耗过大，需在保持系统效用的前提下设计节能方案。
AI.method: 采用深度强化学习框架，根据实时停车需求动态决策摄像头启停策略，结合城市级停车数据训练自适应政策。
AI.result: 在76条街道的测试中实现平均能耗降低76.38%，同时保持视频分析准确率超过98%。
AI.conclusion: RL-CamSleep验证了动态策略在异构停车场景中的有效性，为视频分析节能提供了软硬件协同的新思路。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Dai,Kaoru Ota,Mianxiong Dong
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning Based Multi-Access Edge Computing Schedule for Internet of Vehicle
title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的车联网多接入边缘计算方案
abstract: As intelligent transportation systems been implemented broadly and unmanned arial vehicles (UAVs) can assist terrestrial base stations acting as multi-access edge computing (MEC) to provide a better wireless network communication for Internet of Vehicles (IoVs), we propose a UAVs-assisted approach to help provide a better wireless network service retaining the maximum Quality of Experience(QoE) of the IoVs on the lane. In the paper, we present a Multi-Agent Graph Convolutional Deep Reinforcement Learning (M-AGCDRL) algorithm which combines local observations of each agent with a low-resolution global map as input to learn a policy for each agent. The agents can share their information with others in graph attention networks, resulting in an effective joint policy. Simulation results show that the M-AGCDRL method enables a better QoE of IoTs and achieves good performance.
summary: As intelligent transportation systems been implemented broadly and unmanned arial vehicles (UAVs) can assist terrestrial base stations acting as multi-access edge computing (MEC) to provide a better wireless network communication for Internet of Vehicles (IoVs), we propose a UAVs-assisted approach to help provide a better wireless network service retaining the maximum Quality of Experience(QoE) of the IoVs on the lane. In the paper, we present a Multi-Agent Graph Convolutional Deep Reinforcement Learning (M-AGCDRL) algorithm which combines local observations of each agent with a low-resolution global map as input to learn a policy for each agent. The agents can share their information with others in graph attention networks, resulting in an effective joint policy. Simulation results show that the M-AGCDRL method enables a better QoE of IoTs and achieves good performance.
abstract_zh: 随着智能交通系统的广泛实施，无人机（UAV）可以协助地面基站作为多址边缘计算（MEC），为车联网（IoV）提供更好的无线网络通信，我们提出了一种无人机辅助的方法，以帮助提供更好的无线网络服务，同时保持车道上车联网的最大体验质量（QoE）。在本文中，我们提出了一种多智能体图卷积深度强化学习（M-AGCDRL）算法，该算法将每个智能体的局部观察与低分辨率全局图结合起来作为输入，以学习每个智能体的策略。智能体可以与图注意力网络中的其他人共享信息，从而形成有效的联合策略。仿真结果表明，M-AGCDRL方法能够实现更好的物联网QoE，取得良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无人机辅助的多接入边缘计算调度方法，利用多智能体图卷积深度强化学习算法提升车联网服务质量。
AI.motivation: 随着智能交通系统发展，地面基站难以满足车联网高动态性需求，需通过无人机辅助边缘计算提升无线网络服务质量（QoE）。
AI.method: 设计M-AGCDRL算法，结合局部观测与低分辨率全局地图，通过图注意力网络实现智能体间信息共享与联合策略学习。
AI.result: 仿真表明该方法有效提升物联网设备QoE，在动态车联网环境中取得良好性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过无人机协同边缘计算与深度强化学习，为车联网提供了高效服务质量保障方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无人机辅助的多接入边缘计算调度方法，利用多智能体图卷积深度强化学习算法提升车联网服务质量。
ai_content.motivation: 随着智能交通系统发展，地面基站难以满足车联网高动态性需求，需通过无人机辅助边缘计算提升无线网络服务质量（QoE）。
ai_content.method: 设计M-AGCDRL算法，结合局部观测与低分辨率全局地图，通过图注意力网络实现智能体间信息共享与联合策略学习。

search_text: Deep Reinforcement Learning Based Multi-Access Edge Computing Schedule for Internet of Vehicle 基于深度强化学习的车联网多接入边缘计算方案 As intelligent transportation systems been implemented broadly and unmanned arial vehicles (UAVs) can assist terrestrial base stations acting as multi-access edge computing (MEC) to provide a better wireless network communication for Internet of Vehicles (IoVs), we propose a UAVs-assisted approach to help provide a better wireless network service retaining the maximum Quality of Experience(QoE) of the IoVs on the lane. In the paper, we present a Multi-Agent Graph Convolutional Deep Reinforcement Learning (M-AGCDRL) algorithm which combines local observations of each agent with a low-resolution global map as input to learn a policy for each agent. The agents can share their information with others in graph attention networks, resulting in an effective joint policy. Simulation results show that the M-AGCDRL method enables a better QoE of IoTs and achieves good performance. 随着智能交通系统的广泛实施，无人机（UAV）可以协助地面基站作为多址边缘计算（MEC），为车联网（IoV）提供更好的无线网络通信，我们提出了一种无人机辅助的方法，以帮助提供更好的无线网络服务，同时保持车道上车联网的最大体验质量（QoE）。在本文中，我们提出了一种多智能体图卷积深度强化学习（M-AGCDRL）算法，该算法将每个智能体的局部观察与低分辨率全局图结合起来作为输入，以学习每个智能体的策略。智能体可以与图注意力网络中的其他人共享信息，从而形成有效的联合策略。仿真结果表明，M-AGCDRL方法能够实现更好的物联网QoE，取得良好的性能。 本文提出一种基于无人机辅助的多接入边缘计算调度方法，利用多智能体图卷积深度强化学习算法提升车联网服务质量。 Xiaoyu Dai,Kaoru Ota,Mianxiong Dong cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Clément Sébastien Lalanne,Clément Gastaud,Nicolas Grislain,Aurélien Garivier,Rémi Gribonval
title: Private Quantiles Estimation in the Presence of Atoms
title_zh: 原子存在下的私人分位数估计
abstract: We consider the differentially private estimation of multiple quantiles (MQ) of a distribution from a dataset, a key building block in modern data analysis. We apply the recent non-smoothed Inverse Sensitivity (IS) mechanism to this specific problem. We establish that the resulting method is closely related to the recently published ad hoc algorithm JointExp. In particular, they share the same computational complexity and a similar efficiency. We prove the statistical consistency of these two algorithms for continuous distributions. Furthermore, we demonstrate both theoretically and empirically that this method suffers from an important lack of performance in the case of peaked distributions, which can degrade up to a potentially catastrophic impact in the presence of atoms. Its smoothed version (i.e. by applying a max kernel to its output density) would solve this problem, but remains an open challenge to implement. As a proxy, we propose a simple and numerically efficient method called Heuristically Smoothed JointExp (HSJointExp), which is endowed with performance guarantees for a broad class of distributions and achieves results that are orders of magnitude better on problematic datasets.
summary: We consider the differentially private estimation of multiple quantiles (MQ) of a distribution from a dataset, a key building block in modern data analysis. We apply the recent non-smoothed Inverse Sensitivity (IS) mechanism to this specific problem. We establish that the resulting method is closely related to the recently published ad hoc algorithm JointExp. In particular, they share the same computational complexity and a similar efficiency. We prove the statistical consistency of these two algorithms for continuous distributions. Furthermore, we demonstrate both theoretically and empirically that this method suffers from an important lack of performance in the case of peaked distributions, which can degrade up to a potentially catastrophic impact in the presence of atoms. Its smoothed version (i.e. by applying a max kernel to its output density) would solve this problem, but remains an open challenge to implement. As a proxy, we propose a simple and numerically efficient method called Heuristically Smoothed JointExp (HSJointExp), which is endowed with performance guarantees for a broad class of distributions and achieves results that are orders of magnitude better on problematic datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑对数据集中的分布的多个分位数 (MQ) 进行差分隐私估计，这是现代数据分析中的关键构建块。我们将最近的非平滑逆敏感度（IS）机制应用于这个特定问题。我们确定所得到的方法与最近发布的临时算法 JointExp 密切相关。特别是，它们具有相同的计算复杂度和相似的效率。我们证明了这两种算法对于连续分布的统计一致性。此外，我们从理论上和经验上证明，该方法在峰值分布的情况下严重缺乏性能，在原子存在的情况下可能会退化甚至造成潜在的灾难性影响。其平滑版本（即通过将最大内核应用于其输出密度）可以解决这个问题，但实施起来仍然是一个开放的挑战。作为代理，我们提出了一种简单且数值高效的方法，称为启发式平滑联合指数（HSJointExp），该方法为广泛的分布类别提供了性能保证，并在有问题的数据集上取得了好几个数量级的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在存在原子（atoms）的情况下，如何通过差分隐私方法估计分布的多个分位数，并提出改进算法以解决尖峰分布下的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 分位数估计是数据分析的关键任务，但现有方法在处理具有原子或尖峰分布的数据时存在隐私泄露风险和性能缺陷，需设计更鲁棒的差分隐私算法。
AI.method: 采用非平滑逆敏感度（IS）机制，并与JointExp算法对比；提出启发式平滑联合指数（HSJointExp）方法，通过数值优化解决尖峰分布下的性能问题。
AI.result: 理论证明算法在连续分布下统计一致，但尖峰分布下性能显著下降；HSJointExp在问题数据集上效果提升多个数量级，且具有广泛分布类的性能保证。
AI.conclusion: 传统方法在尖峰分布场景下存在致命缺陷，而HSJointExp作为有效替代方案，兼顾效率与隐私保护，为实际应用提供可行路径。

authors_text: Nikos Arechiga,Francine Chen,Rumen Iliev,Emily Sumner,Scott Carter,Alex Filipowicz,Nayeli Bravo,Monica Van,Kate Glazko,Kalani Murakami,Laurent Denoue,Candice Hogan,Katharine Sieck,Charlene Wu,Kent Lyons
title: Understanding and Shifting Preferences for Battery Electric Vehicles
title_zh: 了解和改变对纯电动汽车的偏好
abstract: Identifying personalized interventions for an individual is an important task. Recent work has shown that interventions that do not consider the demographic background of individual consumers can, in fact, produce the reverse effect, strengthening opposition to electric vehicles. In this work, we focus on methods for personalizing interventions based on an individual's demographics to shift the preferences of consumers to be more positive towards Battery Electric Vehicles (BEVs). One of the constraints in building models to suggest interventions for shifting preferences is that each intervention can influence the effectiveness of later interventions. This, in turn, requires many subjects to evaluate effectiveness of each possible intervention. To address this, we propose to identify personalized factors influencing BEV adoption, such as barriers and motivators. We present a method for predicting these factors and show that the performance is better than always predicting the most frequent factors. We then present a Reinforcement Learning (RL) model that learns the most effective interventions, and compare the number of subjects required for each approach.
summary: Identifying personalized interventions for an individual is an important task. Recent work has shown that interventions that do not consider the demographic background of individual consumers can, in fact, produce the reverse effect, strengthening opposition to electric vehicles. In this work, we focus on methods for personalizing interventions based on an individual's demographics to shift the preferences of consumers to be more positive towards Battery Electric Vehicles (BEVs). One of the constraints in building models to suggest interventions for shifting preferences is that each intervention can influence the effectiveness of later interventions. This, in turn, requires many subjects to evaluate effectiveness of each possible intervention. To address this, we propose to identify personalized factors influencing BEV adoption, such as barriers and motivators. We present a method for predicting these factors and show that the performance is better than always predicting the most frequent factors. We then present a Reinforcement Learning (RL) model that learns the most effective interventions, and compare the number of subjects required for each approach.
abstract_zh: 为个人确定个性化干预措施是一项重要任务。最近的研究表明，不考虑个人消费者人口背景的干预措施实际上会产生相反的效果，从而加强对电动汽车的反对。在这项工作中，我们重点研究基于个人人口统计数据的个性化干预方法，以改变消费者的偏好，使他们对电池电动汽车 (BEV) 更加积极。建立模型来建议针对偏好变化的干预措施的限制之一是每次干预措施都会影响后续干预措施的有效性。反过来，这需要许多受试者评估每种可能干预措施的有效性。为了解决这个问题，我们建议确定影响纯电动汽车采用的个性化因素，例如障碍和激励因素。我们提出了一种预测这些因素的方法，并表明其性能优于总是预测最常见的因素。然后，我们提出了一个强化学习（RL）模型，该模型可以学习最有效的干预措施，并比较每种方法所需的受试者数量。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过个性化干预方法，基于个人人口统计学特征，提升消费者对电池电动汽车（BEV）的偏好。
AI.motivation: 传统干预措施未考虑消费者人口统计学背景，可能导致反效果。需开发个性化方法以有效促进BEV接受度。
AI.method: 提出预测影响BEV采纳的个性化因素（如障碍和动机）的方法，并构建强化学习（RL）模型优化干预策略，对比不同方法的样本需求。
AI.result: 预测方法优于基线模型，RL模型在减少所需样本数量上表现更优，验证了个性化干预的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于人口统计学特征的个性化干预结合强化学习，能更高效地提升消费者对BEV的偏好。

We then present a Reinforcement Learning (RL) model that learns the most effective interventions, and compare the number of subjects required for each approach. 为个人确定个性化干预措施是一项重要任务。最近的研究表明，不考虑个人消费者人口背景的干预措施实际上会产生相反的效果，从而加强对电动汽车的反对。在这项工作中，我们重点研究基于个人人口统计数据的个性化干预方法，以改变消费者的偏好，使他们对电池电动汽车 (BEV) 更加积极。建立模型来建议针对偏好变化的干预措施的限制之一是每次干预措施都会影响后续干预措施的有效性。反过来，这需要许多受试者评估每种可能干预措施的有效性。为了解决这个问题，我们建议确定影响纯电动汽车采用的个性化因素，例如障碍和激励因素。我们提出了一种预测这些因素的方法，并表明其性能优于总是预测最常见的因素。然后，我们提出了一个强化学习（RL）模型，该模型可以学习最有效的干预措施，并比较每种方法所需的受试者数量。 本文旨在通过个性化干预方法，基于个人人口统计学特征，提升消费者对电池电动汽车（BEV）的偏好。 Nikos Arechiga,Francine Chen,Rumen Iliev,Emily Sumner,Scott Carter,Alex Filipowicz,Nayeli Bravo,Monica Van,Kate Glazko,Kalani Murakami,Laurent Denoue,Candice Hogan,Katharine Sieck,Charlene Wu,Kent Lyons cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Amine Barrak,Bram Adams,Amal Zouaq
title: Toward a traceable, explainable, and fairJD/Resume recommendation system
title_zh: 迈向可追踪、可解释、公平的JD/简历推荐系统
abstract: In the last few decades, companies are interested to adopt an online automated recruitment process in an international recruitment environment. The problem is that the recruitment of employees through the manual procedure is a time and money consuming process. As a result, processing a significant number of applications through conventional methods can lead to the recruitment of clumsy individuals. Different JD/Resume matching model architectures have been proposed and reveal a high accuracy level in selecting relevant candidatesfor the required job positions. However, the development of an automatic recruitment system is still one of the main challenges. The reason is that the development of a fully automated recruitment system is a difficult task and poses different challenges. For example, providing a detailed matching explanation for the targeted stakeholders is needed to ensure a transparent recommendation. There are several knowledge bases that represent skills and competencies (e.g, ESCO, O*NET) that are used to identify the candidate and the required job skills for a matching purpose. Besides, modernpre-trained language models are fine-tuned for this context such as identifying lines where a specific feature was introduced. Typically, pre-trained language models use transfer-based machine learning models to be fine-tuned for a specific field. In this proposal, our aim is to explore how modern language models (based on transformers) can be combined with knowledge bases and ontologies to enhance the JD/Resume matching process. Our system aims at using knowledge bases and features to support the explainability of the JD/Resume matching. Finally, given that multiple software components, datasets, ontology, andmachine learning models will be explored, we aim at proposing a fair, ex-plainable, and traceable architecture for a Resume/JD matching purpose.
summary: In the last few decades, companies are interested to adopt an online automated recruitment process in an international recruitment environment. The problem is that the recruitment of employees through the manual procedure is a time and money consuming process. As a result, processing a significant number of applications through conventional methods can lead to the recruitment of clumsy individuals. Different JD/Resume matching model architectures have been proposed and reveal a high accuracy level in selecting relevant candidatesfor the required job positions. However, the development of an automatic recruitment system is still one of the main challenges. The reason is that the development of a fully automated recruitment system is a difficult task and poses different challenges. For example, providing a detailed matching explanation for the targeted stakeholders is needed to ensure a transparent recommendation. There are several knowledge bases that represent skills and competencies (e.g, ESCO, O*NET) that are used to identify the candidate and the required job skills for a matching purpose. Besides, modernpre-trained language models are fine-tuned for this context such as identifying lines where a specific feature was introduced. Typically, pre-trained language models use transfer-based machine learning models to be fine-tuned for a specific field. In this proposal, our aim is to explore how modern language models (based on transformers) can be combined with knowledge bases and ontologies to enhance the JD/Resume matching process. Our system aims at using knowledge bases and features to support the explainability of the JD/Resume matching. Finally, given that multiple software components, datasets, ontology, andmachine learning models will be explored, we aim at proposing a fair, ex-plainable, and traceable architecture for a Resume/JD matching purpose.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年里，公司有兴趣在国际招聘环境中采用在线自动化招聘流程。问题在于，通过手动程序招聘员工是一个耗时且耗时的过程。因此，通过传统方法处理大量申请可能会导致招募笨拙的个人。人们已经提出了不同的 JD/简历匹配模型架构，并揭示了在为所需职位选择相关候选人时的高精度水平。然而，自动招聘系统的开发仍然是主要挑战之一。原因是开发完全自动化的招聘系统是一项艰巨的任务，并带来不同的挑战。例如，需要为目标利益相关者提供详细的匹配解释，以确保推荐透明。有几个代表技能和能力的知识库（例如，ESCO、O*NET），用于识别候选人和匹配目的所需的工作技能。此外，现代预训练语言模型针对这种情况进行了微调，例如识别引入特定功能的行。通常，预训练的语言模型使用基于迁移的机器学习模型来针对特定领域进行微调。在本提案中，我们的目标是探索如何将现代语言模型（基于 Transformer）与知识库和本体相结合，以增强 JD/简历匹配过程。我们的系统旨在使用知识库和特征来支持 JD/简历匹配的可解释性。最后，考虑到将探索多个软件组件、数据集、本体和机器学习模型，我们的目标是为简历/JD匹配目的提出一个公平、可解释和可追踪的架构。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探索结合现代语言模型与知识库的JD/简历匹配系统，以提升推荐过程的可追溯性、可解释性和公平性。
AI.motivation: 传统招聘流程耗时耗力且易出错，现有自动化系统缺乏透明度和解释性，需通过整合知识库与语言模型解决匹配过程的可解释性与公平性问题。
AI.method: 基于Transformer的语言模型与ESCO、O*NET等知识库结合，利用预训练模型微调技术识别关键特征，并通过本体论增强匹配解释性。
AI.result: 提出一种融合知识库、本体和机器学习模型的框架，实现简历与职位描述的可追溯、可解释且公平的匹配架构。
AI.conclusion: 整合知识库与现代语言模型可有效提升招聘推荐系统的透明度和公平性，为自动化招聘提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Neng Shi,Jiayi Xu,Skylar W. Wurster,Hanqi Guo,Jonathan Woodring,Luke P. Van Roekel,Han-Wei Shen
title: GNN-Surrogate: A Hierarchical and Adaptive Graph Neural Network for Parameter Space Exploration of Unstructured-Mesh Ocean Simulations
title_zh: GNN-Surrogate：用于非结构化网格海洋模拟参数空间探索的分层自适应图神经网络
comment: Accepted by TVCG Special Issue on the 2022 IEEE Pacific Visualization Symposium (PacificVis)
comments: Accepted by TVCG Special Issue on the 2022 IEEE Pacific Visualization Symposium (PacificVis)
abstract: We propose GNN-Surrogate, a graph neural network-based surrogate model to explore the parameter space of ocean climate simulations. Parameter space exploration is important for domain scientists to understand the influence of input parameters (e.g., wind stress) on the simulation output (e.g., temperature). The exploration requires scientists to exhaust the complicated parameter space by running a batch of computationally expensive simulations. Our approach improves the efficiency of parameter space exploration with a surrogate model that predicts the simulation outputs accurately and efficiently. Specifically, GNN-Surrogate predicts the output field with given simulation parameters so scientists can explore the simulation parameter space with visualizations from user-specified visual mappings. Moreover, our graph-based techniques are designed for unstructured meshes, making the exploration of simulation outputs on irregular grids efficient. For efficient training, we generate hierarchical graphs and use adaptive resolutions. We give quantitative and qualitative evaluations on the MPAS-Ocean simulation to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of GNN-Surrogate. Source code is publicly available at https://github.com/trainsn/GNN-Surrogate.
summary: We propose GNN-Surrogate, a graph neural network-based surrogate model to explore the parameter space of ocean climate simulations. Parameter space exploration is important for domain scientists to understand the influence of input parameters (e.g., wind stress) on the simulation output (e.g., temperature). The exploration requires scientists to exhaust the complicated parameter space by running a batch of computationally expensive simulations. Our approach improves the efficiency of parameter space exploration with a surrogate model that predicts the simulation outputs accurately and efficiently. Specifically, GNN-Surrogate predicts the output field with given simulation parameters so scientists can explore the simulation parameter space with visualizations from user-specified visual mappings. Moreover, our graph-based techniques are designed for unstructured meshes, making the exploration of simulation outputs on irregular grids efficient. For efficient training, we generate hierarchical graphs and use adaptive resolutions. We give quantitative and qualitative evaluations on the MPAS-Ocean simulation to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of GNN-Surrogate. Source code is publicly available at https://github.com/trainsn/GNN-Surrogate.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 GNN-Surrogate，一种基于图神经网络的代理模型，用于探索海洋气候模拟的参数空间。参数空间探索对于领域科学家了解输入参数（例如风应力）对模拟输出（例如温度）的影响非常重要。这项探索需要科学家通过运行一批计算成本高昂的模拟来耗尽复杂的参数空间。我们的方法通过准确有效地预测模拟输出的代理模型提高了参数空间探索的效率。具体来说，GNN-Surrogate 使用给定的模拟参数预测输出场，以便科学家可以通过用户指定的视觉映射的可视化来探索模拟参数空间。此外，我们基于图形的技术是为非结构化网格设计的，使得对不规则网格上的模拟输出的探索变得高效。为了高效训练，我们生成层次图并使用自适应分辨率。我们对 MPAS-Ocean 模拟进行定量和定性评估，以证明 GNN-Surrogate 的有效性和效率。源代码可在 https://github.com/trainsn/GNN-Surrogate 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图神经网络的代理模型GNN-Surrogate，用于高效探索非结构化网格海洋模拟的参数空间。
AI.motivation: 传统海洋气候模拟参数空间探索依赖大量计算成本高昂的仿真，难以高效分析输入参数对输出结果的影响。
AI.method: 设计适用于非结构化网格的图神经网络，结合分层图结构与自适应分辨率技术，实现对模拟输出的高效预测与可视化探索。
AI.result: 在MPAS-Ocean仿真中验证了GNN-Surrogate在定量与定性评估中的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: GNN-Surrogate为复杂海洋模拟的参数空间探索提供了高效且准确的解决方案，有助于加速气候科学研究。

For efficient training, we generate hierarchical graphs and use adaptive resolutions. We give quantitative and qualitative evaluations on the MPAS-Ocean simulation to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of GNN-Surrogate. Source code is publicly available at https://github.com/trainsn/GNN-Surrogate. 我们提出了 GNN-Surrogate，一种基于图神经网络的代理模型，用于探索海洋气候模拟的参数空间。参数空间探索对于领域科学家了解输入参数（例如风应力）对模拟输出（例如温度）的影响非常重要。这项探索需要科学家通过运行一批计算成本高昂的模拟来耗尽复杂的参数空间。我们的方法通过准确有效地预测模拟输出的代理模型提高了参数空间探索的效率。具体来说，GNN-Surrogate 使用给定的模拟参数预测输出场，以便科学家可以通过用户指定的视觉映射的可视化来探索模拟参数空间。此外，我们基于图形的技术是为非结构化网格设计的，使得对不规则网格上的模拟输出的探索变得高效。为了高效训练，我们生成层次图并使用自适应分辨率。我们对 MPAS-Ocean 模拟进行定量和定性评估，以证明 GNN-Surrogate 的有效性和效率。源代码可在 https://github.com/trainsn/GNN-Surrogate 上公开获取。 本文提出基于图神经网络的代理模型GNN-Surrogate，用于高效探索非结构化网格海洋模拟的参数空间。 Neng Shi,Jiayi Xu,Skylar W. Wurster,Hanqi Guo,Jonathan Woodring,Luke P. Van Roekel,Han-Wei Shen physics.ao-ph,cs.AI,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Guo-Hua Wang,Jianxin Wu
title: R2-D2: Repetitive Reprediction Deep Decipher for Semi-Supervised Deep Learning
title_zh: R2-D2：半监督深度学习的重复预测深度解密
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1908.04345
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1908.04345
abstract: Most recent semi-supervised deep learning (deep SSL) methods used a similar paradigm: use network predictions to update pseudo-labels and use pseudo-labels to update network parameters iteratively. However, they lack theoretical support and cannot explain why predictions are good candidates for pseudo-labels in the deep learning paradigm. In this paper, we propose a principled end-to-end framework named deep decipher (D2) for SSL. Within the D2 framework, we prove that pseudo-labels are related to network predictions by an exponential link function, which gives a theoretical support for using predictions as pseudo-labels. Furthermore, we demonstrate that updating pseudo-labels by network predictions will make them uncertain. To mitigate this problem, we propose a training strategy called repetitive reprediction (R2). Finally, the proposed R2-D2 method is tested on the large-scale ImageNet dataset and outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 5 percentage points.
summary: Most recent semi-supervised deep learning (deep SSL) methods used a similar paradigm: use network predictions to update pseudo-labels and use pseudo-labels to update network parameters iteratively. However, they lack theoretical support and cannot explain why predictions are good candidates for pseudo-labels in the deep learning paradigm. In this paper, we propose a principled end-to-end framework named deep decipher (D2) for SSL. Within the D2 framework, we prove that pseudo-labels are related to network predictions by an exponential link function, which gives a theoretical support for using predictions as pseudo-labels. Furthermore, we demonstrate that updating pseudo-labels by network predictions will make them uncertain. To mitigate this problem, we propose a training strategy called repetitive reprediction (R2). Finally, the proposed R2-D2 method is tested on the large-scale ImageNet dataset and outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 5 percentage points.
abstract_zh: 最近的半监督深度学习（深度 SSL）方法使用了类似的范例：使用网络预测来更新伪标签并使用伪标签迭代地更新网络参数。然而，他们缺乏理论支持，无法解释为什么预测是深度学习范式中伪标签的良好候选者。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 SSL 深度解密 (D2) 的原则性端到端框架。在D2框架内，我们通过指数链接函数证明伪标签与网络预测相关，这为使用预测作为伪标签提供了理论支持。此外，我们证明通过网络预测更新伪标签将使它们变得不确定。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种称为重复预测（R2）的训练策略。最后，所提出的 R2-D2 方法在大规模 ImageNet 数据集上进行了测试，其性能优于最先进的方法 5 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为R2-D2的半监督深度学习框架，通过理论分析和重复预测策略解决伪标签更新的不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习方法缺乏理论依据解释为何网络预测可作为伪标签，且伪标签更新过程会导致预测不确定性增加。
AI.method: 构建D2框架证明伪标签与预测存在指数链接关系，并设计重复预测（R2）策略通过多次迭代预测降低不确定性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，R2-D2方法较现有最优方法提升5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: R2-D2通过理论支撑和重复预测策略有效提升了半监督学习性能，为伪标签生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sartaj Ahmed Salman,Zhichao Lian,Marva Saleem,Yuduo Zhang
title: Functional Connectivity Based Classification of ADHD Using Different Atlases
title_zh: 使用不同图谱对 ADHD 进行基于功能连接的分类
abstract: These days, computational diagnosis strategies of neuropsychiatric disorders are gaining attention day by day. It's critical to determine the brain's functional connectivity based on Functional-Magnetic-Resonance-Imaging(fMRI) to diagnose the disorder. It's known as a chronic disease, and millions of children amass the symptoms of this disease, so there is much vacuum for the researcher to formulate a model to improve the accuracy to diagnose ADHD accurately. In this paper, we consider the functional connectivity of a brain extracted using various time templates/Atlases. Local-Binary Encoding-Method (LBEM) algorithm is utilized for feature extraction, while Hierarchical- Extreme-Learning-Machine (HELM) is used to classify the extracted features. To validate our approach, fMRI data of 143 normal and 100 ADHD affected children is used for experimental purpose. Our experimental results are based on comparing various Atlases given as CC400, CC200, and AAL. Our model achieves high performance with CC400 as compared to other Atlases
summary: These days, computational diagnosis strategies of neuropsychiatric disorders are gaining attention day by day. It's critical to determine the brain's functional connectivity based on Functional-Magnetic-Resonance-Imaging(fMRI) to diagnose the disorder. It's known as a chronic disease, and millions of children amass the symptoms of this disease, so there is much vacuum for the researcher to formulate a model to improve the accuracy to diagnose ADHD accurately. In this paper, we consider the functional connectivity of a brain extracted using various time templates/Atlases. Local-Binary Encoding-Method (LBEM) algorithm is utilized for feature extraction, while Hierarchical- Extreme-Learning-Machine (HELM) is used to classify the extracted features. To validate our approach, fMRI data of 143 normal and 100 ADHD affected children is used for experimental purpose. Our experimental results are based on comparing various Atlases given as CC400, CC200, and AAL. Our model achieves high performance with CC400 as compared to other Atlases
abstract_zh: 如今，神经精神疾病的计算诊断策略日益受到关注。基于功能磁共振成像 (fMRI) 确定大脑的功能连接对于诊断该疾病至关重要。它被称为一种慢性疾病，数以百万计的儿童积累了这种疾病的症状，因此研究人员在制定模型以提高准确诊断 ADHD 的准确性方面存在很大的真空。在本文中，我们考虑使用各种时间模板/图集提取的大脑的功能连接。局部二进制编码方法（LBEM）算法用于特征提取，而分层极限学习机（HELM）用于对提取的特征进行分类。为了验证我们的方法，使用 143 名正常儿童和 100 名 ADHD 受影响儿童的功能磁共振成像数据进行实验。我们的实验结果基于对 CC400、CC200 和 AAL 等各种图集的比较。与其他 Atlas 相比，我们的模型通过 CC400 实现了高性能

AI.tldr: 本文基于功能连接性使用不同图谱对ADHD进行分类。
AI.motivation: 由于ADHD是一种慢性疾病且现有诊断方法存在不足，亟需开发高精度的计算模型以提高诊断准确性。
AI.method: 采用局部二值编码方法（LBEM）提取功能连接性特征，结合分层极限学习机（HELM）进行分类，并对比CC400、CC200和AAL三种图谱的性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于CC400图谱的模型在ADHD分类任务中表现最优。
AI.conclusion: CC400图谱联合LBEM与HELM方法能有效提升ADHD的分类准确率。

authors_text: Alex Bäuerle,Ángel Alexander Cabrera,Fred Hohman,Megan Maher,David Koski,Xavier Suau,Titus Barik,Dominik Moritz
title: Symphony: Composing Interactive Interfaces for Machine Learning
title_zh: Symphony：为机器学习构建交互式界面
comment: Proceedings of the 2022 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
comments: Proceedings of the 2022 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
abstract: Interfaces for machine learning (ML), information and visualizations about models or data, can help practitioners build robust and responsible ML systems. Despite their benefits, recent studies of ML teams and our interviews with practitioners (n=9) showed that ML interfaces have limited adoption in practice. While existing ML interfaces are effective for specific tasks, they are not designed to be reused, explored, and shared by multiple stakeholders in cross-functional teams. To enable analysis and communication between different ML practitioners, we designed and implemented Symphony, a framework for composing interactive ML interfaces with task-specific, data-driven components that can be used across platforms such as computational notebooks and web dashboards. We developed Symphony through participatory design sessions with 10 teams (n=31), and discuss our findings from deploying Symphony to 3 production ML projects at Apple. Symphony helped ML practitioners discover previously unknown issues like data duplicates and blind spots in models while enabling them to share insights with other stakeholders.
summary: Interfaces for machine learning (ML), information and visualizations about models or data, can help practitioners build robust and responsible ML systems. Despite their benefits, recent studies of ML teams and our interviews with practitioners (n=9) showed that ML interfaces have limited adoption in practice. While existing ML interfaces are effective for specific tasks, they are not designed to be reused, explored, and shared by multiple stakeholders in cross-functional teams. To enable analysis and communication between different ML practitioners, we designed and implemented Symphony, a framework for composing interactive ML interfaces with task-specific, data-driven components that can be used across platforms such as computational notebooks and web dashboards. We developed Symphony through participatory design sessions with 10 teams (n=31), and discuss our findings from deploying Symphony to 3 production ML projects at Apple. Symphony helped ML practitioners discover previously unknown issues like data duplicates and blind spots in models while enabling them to share insights with other stakeholders.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 界面、有关模型或数据的信息和可视化可以帮助从业者构建强大且负责任的 ML 系统。尽管有很多好处，但最近对 ML 团队的研究以及我们对从业者 (n=9) 的采访表明，ML 接口在实践中的采用有限。虽然现有的 ML 界面对于特定任务有效，但它们的设计目的不是供跨职能团队中的多个利益相关者重用、探索和共享。为了实现不同 ML 从业者之间的分析和通信，我们设计并实现了 Symphony，这是一个框架，用于将交互式 ML 界面与特定于任务的数据驱动组件组合在一起，这些组件可以跨计算笔记本和 Web 仪表板等平台使用。我们通过与 10 个团队 (n=31) 的参与式设计会议开发了 Symphony，并讨论了我们将 Symphony 部署到 Apple 的 3 个生产 ML 项目中的发现。 Symphony 帮助 ML 从业者发现以前未知的问题，例如数据重复和模型中的盲点，同时使他们能够与其他利益相关者分享见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Symphony框架，用于构建可跨平台复用的交互式机器学习界面，以促进跨职能团队协作。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习界面缺乏跨团队复用性，导致信息孤岛和协作效率低下，难以发现数据或模型中的潜在问题。
AI.method: 通过参与式设计与31名从业者合作开发框架，并在苹果公司的3个生产项目中部署验证。
AI.result: 成功识别出数据重复和模型盲区等问题，提升团队间洞察共享效率。
AI.conclusion: Symphony通过模块化设计有效支持了机器学习系统的协作分析与改进。

motivation: 现有机器学习界面缺乏跨团队复用性，导致信息孤岛和协作效率低下，难以发现数据或模型中的潜在问题。
method: 通过参与式设计与31名从业者合作开发框架，并在苹果公司的3个生产项目中部署验证。
result: 成功识别出数据重复和模型盲区等问题，提升团队间洞察共享效率。
conclusion: Symphony通过模块化设计有效支持了机器学习系统的协作分析与改进。
search_text: Symphony: Composing Interactive Interfaces for Machine Learning Symphony：为机器学习构建交互式界面 Interfaces for machine learning (ML), information and visualizations about models or data, can help practitioners build robust and responsible ML systems. Despite their benefits, recent studies of ML teams and our interviews with practitioners (n=9) showed that ML interfaces have limited adoption in practice. While existing ML interfaces are effective for specific tasks, they are not designed to be reused, explored, and shared by multiple stakeholders in cross-functional teams. To enable analysis and communication between different ML practitioners, we designed and implemented Symphony, a framework for composing interactive ML interfaces with task-specific, data-driven components that can be used across platforms such as computational notebooks and web dashboards. We developed Symphony through participatory design sessions with 10 teams (n=31), and discuss our findings from deploying Symphony to 3 production ML projects at Apple. Symphony helped ML practitioners discover previously unknown issues like data duplicates and blind spots in models while enabling them to share insights with other stakeholders. 机器学习 (ML) 界面、有关模型或数据的信息和可视化可以帮助从业者构建强大且负责任的 ML 系统。尽管有很多好处，但最近对 ML 团队的研究以及我们对从业者 (n=9) 的采访表明，ML 接口在实践中的采用有限。虽然现有的 ML 界面对于特定任务有效，但它们的设计目的不是供跨职能团队中的多个利益相关者重用、探索和共享。为了实现不同 ML 从业者之间的分析和通信，我们设计并实现了 Symphony，这是一个框架，用于将交互式 ML 界面与特定于任务的数据驱动组件组合在一起，这些组件可以跨计算笔记本和 Web 仪表板等平台使用。我们通过与 10 个团队 (n=31) 的参与式设计会议开发了 Symphony，并讨论了我们将 Symphony 部署到 Apple 的 3 个生产 ML 项目中的发现。 Symphony 帮助 ML 从业者发现以前未知的问题，例如数据重复和模型中的盲点，同时使他们能够与其他利益相关者分享见解。 本文提出Symphony框架，用于构建可跨平台复用的交互式机器学习界面，以促进跨职能团队协作。 Alex Bäuerle,Ángel Alexander Cabrera,Fred Hohman,Megan Maher,David Koski,Xavier Suau,Titus Barik,Dominik Moritz cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jesse Mu,Victor Zhong,Roberta Raileanu,Minqi Jiang,Noah Goodman,Tim Rocktäschel,Edward Grefenstette
title: Improving Intrinsic Exploration with Language Abstractions
title_zh: 用语言抽象改进内在探索
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) agents are particularly hard to train when rewards are sparse. One common solution is to use intrinsic rewards to encourage agents to explore their environment. However, recent intrinsic exploration methods often use state-based novelty measures which reward low-level exploration and may not scale to domains requiring more abstract skills. Instead, we explore natural language as a general medium for highlighting relevant abstractions in an environment. Unlike previous work, we evaluate whether language can improve over existing exploration methods by directly extending (and comparing to) competitive intrinsic exploration baselines: AMIGo (Campero et al., 2021) and NovelD (Zhang et al., 2021). These language-based variants outperform their non-linguistic forms by 47-85% across 13 challenging tasks from the MiniGrid and MiniHack environment suites.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) agents are particularly hard to train when rewards are sparse. One common solution is to use intrinsic rewards to encourage agents to explore their environment. However, recent intrinsic exploration methods often use state-based novelty measures which reward low-level exploration and may not scale to domains requiring more abstract skills. Instead, we explore natural language as a general medium for highlighting relevant abstractions in an environment. Unlike previous work, we evaluate whether language can improve over existing exploration methods by directly extending (and comparing to) competitive intrinsic exploration baselines: AMIGo (Campero et al., 2021) and NovelD (Zhang et al., 2021). These language-based variants outperform their non-linguistic forms by 47-85% across 13 challenging tasks from the MiniGrid and MiniHack environment suites.
abstract_zh: 当奖励稀疏时，强化学习（RL）代理尤其难以训练。一种常见的解决方案是使用内在奖励来鼓励代理探索他们的环境。然而，最近的内在探索方法通常使用基于状态的新颖性措施，这些措施奖励低水平的探索，并且可能无法扩展到需要更抽象技能的领域。相反，我们探索自然语言作为突出环境中相关抽象的通用媒介。与之前的工作不同，我们评估语言是否可以通过直接扩展（并比较）竞争性内在探索基线来改进现有的探索方法：AMIGo（Campero 等人，2021）和 NovelD（Zhang 等人，2021）。在 MiniGrid 和 MiniHack 环境套件的 13 项挑战性任务中，这些基于语言的变体比非语言形式的性能高出 47-85%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用自然语言抽象改进强化学习中的内在探索，以解决稀疏奖励环境下探索效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有内在探索方法依赖状态新颖性度量，难以适应需要抽象技能的复杂任务，而自然语言能更高效地表达环境中的关键抽象概念。
AI.method: 通过将自然语言作为抽象媒介，扩展并改进AMIGo和NovelD两种主流内在探索方法，直接对比其非语言版本的性能差异。
AI.result: 在MiniGrid和MiniHack的13个挑战性任务中，语言增强版本的探索效率比非语言版本提升47-85%。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言抽象能显著提升内在探索效果，为复杂环境下的强化学习提供了新的研究方向。

authors_text: Timofey Grigoryev,Andrey Voynov,Artem Babenko
title: When, Why, and Which Pretrained GANs Are Useful?
title_zh: 何时、为何以及哪些预训练 GAN 有用？
abstract: The literature has proposed several methods to finetune pretrained GANs on new datasets, which typically results in higher performance compared to training from scratch, especially in the limited-data regime. However, despite the apparent empirical benefits of GAN pretraining, its inner mechanisms were not analyzed in-depth, and understanding of its role is not entirely clear. Moreover, the essential practical details, e.g., selecting a proper pretrained GAN checkpoint, currently do not have rigorous grounding and are typically determined by trial and error. This work aims to dissect the process of GAN finetuning. First, we show that initializing the GAN training process by a pretrained checkpoint primarily affects the model's coverage rather than the fidelity of individual samples. Second, we explicitly describe how pretrained generators and discriminators contribute to the finetuning process and explain the previous evidence on the importance of pretraining both of them. Finally, as an immediate practical benefit of our analysis, we describe a simple recipe to choose an appropriate GAN checkpoint that is the most suitable for finetuning to a particular target task. Importantly, for most of the target tasks, Imagenet-pretrained GAN, despite having poor visual quality, appears to be an excellent starting point for finetuning, resembling the typical pretraining scenario of discriminative computer vision models.
summary: The literature has proposed several methods to finetune pretrained GANs on new datasets, which typically results in higher performance compared to training from scratch, especially in the limited-data regime. However, despite the apparent empirical benefits of GAN pretraining, its inner mechanisms were not analyzed in-depth, and understanding of its role is not entirely clear. Moreover, the essential practical details, e.g., selecting a proper pretrained GAN checkpoint, currently do not have rigorous grounding and are typically determined by trial and error. This work aims to dissect the process of GAN finetuning. First, we show that initializing the GAN training process by a pretrained checkpoint primarily affects the model's coverage rather than the fidelity of individual samples. Second, we explicitly describe how pretrained generators and discriminators contribute to the finetuning process and explain the previous evidence on the importance of pretraining both of them. Finally, as an immediate practical benefit of our analysis, we describe a simple recipe to choose an appropriate GAN checkpoint that is the most suitable for finetuning to a particular target task. Importantly, for most of the target tasks, Imagenet-pretrained GAN, despite having poor visual quality, appears to be an excellent starting point for finetuning, resembling the typical pretraining scenario of discriminative computer vision models.
abstract_zh: 文献提出了几种在新数据集上微调预训练 GAN 的方法，与从头开始训练相比，这通常会带来更高的性能，尤其是在有限数据情况下。然而，尽管 GAN 预训练具有明显的实证效益，但其内在机制并未得到深入分析，对其作用的理解也不完全清楚。此外，基本的实际细节，例如选择合适的预训练 GAN 检查点，目前还没有严格的依据，通常是通过反复试验来确定的。这项工作旨在剖析 GAN 微调的过程。首先，我们表明通过预训练检查点初始化 GAN 训练过程主要影响模型的覆盖范围，而不是单个样本的保真度。其次，我们明确描述了预训练的生成器和判别器如何对微调过程做出贡献，并解释了先前关于预训练它们的重要性的证据。最后，作为我们分析的直接实际好处，我们描述了一个简单的方法来选择最适合微调特定目标任务的适当 GAN 检查点。重要的是，对于大多数目标任务，Imagenet 预训练的 GAN 尽管视觉质量较差，但似乎是微调的绝佳起点，类似于判别性计算机视觉模型的典型预训练场景。

AI.tldr: 分析预训练GAN微调的机制及选择方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法微调预训练GAN效果好但机制不明确，选择检查点依赖试错，需深入分析以提供理论指导
AI.method: 通过实验分析预训练对覆盖范围的影响，区分生成器和判别器的贡献，并提出基于任务的选择策略
AI.result: 预训练提升覆盖而非保真，两者预训练均重要，ImageNet模型适合微调
AI.conclusion: 理解预训练机制可有效选择模型，ImageNet预训练模型虽质量差但适合微调

authors_text: Varun A. Kelkar,Mark A. Anastasio
title: Prior image-based medical image reconstruction using a style-based generative adversarial network
title_zh: 使用基于风格的生成对抗网络进行基于图像的医学图像重建
abstract: Computed medical imaging systems require a computational reconstruction procedure for image formation. In order to recover a useful estimate of the object to-be-imaged when the recorded measurements are incomplete, prior knowledge about the nature of object must be utilized. In order to improve the conditioning of an ill-posed imaging inverse problem, deep learning approaches are being actively investigated for better representing object priors and constraints. This work proposes to use a style-based generative adversarial network (StyleGAN) to constrain an image reconstruction problem in the case where additional information in the form of a prior image of the sought-after object is available. An optimization problem is formulated in the intermediate latent-space of a StyleGAN, that is disentangled with respect to meaningful image attributes or "styles", such as the contrast used in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). Discrepancy between the sought-after and prior images is measured in the disentangled latent-space, and is used to regularize the inverse problem in the form of constraints on specific styles of the disentangled latent-space. A stylized numerical study inspired by MR imaging is designed, where the sought-after and the prior image are structurally similar, but belong to different contrast mechanisms. The presented numerical studies demonstrate the superiority of the proposed approach as compared to classical approaches in the form of traditional metrics.
summary: Computed medical imaging systems require a computational reconstruction procedure for image formation. In order to recover a useful estimate of the object to-be-imaged when the recorded measurements are incomplete, prior knowledge about the nature of object must be utilized. In order to improve the conditioning of an ill-posed imaging inverse problem, deep learning approaches are being actively investigated for better representing object priors and constraints. This work proposes to use a style-based generative adversarial network (StyleGAN) to constrain an image reconstruction problem in the case where additional information in the form of a prior image of the sought-after object is available. An optimization problem is formulated in the intermediate latent-space of a StyleGAN, that is disentangled with respect to meaningful image attributes or "styles", such as the contrast used in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). Discrepancy between the sought-after and prior images is measured in the disentangled latent-space, and is used to regularize the inverse problem in the form of constraints on specific styles of the disentangled latent-space. A stylized numerical study inspired by MR imaging is designed, where the sought-after and the prior image are structurally similar, but belong to different contrast mechanisms. The presented numerical studies demonstrate the superiority of the proposed approach as compared to classical approaches in the form of traditional metrics.
abstract_zh: 计算医学成像系统需要计算重建过程来形成图像。当记录的测量不完整时，为了恢复对要成像的物体的有用估计，必须利用关于物体性质的先验知识。为了改善不适定成像逆问题的调节，人们正在积极研究深度学习方法，以更好地表示对象先验和约束。这项工作提出，在可以获得所需对象的先前图像形式的附加信息的情况下，使用基于样式的生成对抗网络（StyleGAN）来约束图像重建问题。优化问题在 StyleGAN 的中间潜在空间中表述，该空间与有意义的图像属性或“风格”相关，例如磁共振成像 (MRI) 中使用的对比度。所寻求的图像和先前图像之间的差异是在解纠缠的潜在空间中测量的，并用于以对解纠缠的潜在空间的特定样式的约束的形式正则化逆问题。受 MR 成像启发，设计了一种程式化的数值研究，其中受欢迎的图像和先前的图像在结构上相似，但属于不同的对比机制。所提出的数值研究证明了所提出的方法与传统指标形式的经典方法相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用基于风格的生成对抗网络（StyleGAN）结合先验图像，改进医学图像重建中的逆问题求解。
AI.motivation: 传统医学成像系统在数据不完整时难以重建高质量图像，需利用物体先验知识。深度学习可更有效表征物体先验，但需结合先验图像约束逆问题。
AI.method: 在StyleGAN的解耦潜在空间中构建优化问题，通过测量目标图像与先验图像在解耦风格属性（如MRI对比度）上的差异，作为正则化约束进行图像重建。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在MRI对比度不同的结构相似图像重建任务中，优于传统经典方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于StyleGAN的风格解耦约束方法能有效提升医学图像重建质量，尤其适用于存在先验图像但对比机制不同的场景。

search_text: Prior image-based medical image reconstruction using a style-based generative adversarial network 使用基于风格的生成对抗网络进行基于图像的医学图像重建 Computed medical imaging systems require a computational reconstruction procedure for image formation. In order to recover a useful estimate of the object to-be-imaged when the recorded measurements are incomplete, prior knowledge about the nature of object must be utilized. In order to improve the conditioning of an ill-posed imaging inverse problem, deep learning approaches are being actively investigated for better representing object priors and constraints. This work proposes to use a style-based generative adversarial network (StyleGAN) to constrain an image reconstruction problem in the case where additional information in the form of a prior image of the sought-after object is available. An optimization problem is formulated in the intermediate latent-space of a StyleGAN, that is disentangled with respect to meaningful image attributes or "styles", such as the contrast used in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). Discrepancy between the sought-after and prior images is measured in the disentangled latent-space, and is used to regularize the inverse problem in the form of constraints on specific styles of the disentangled latent-space. A stylized numerical study inspired by MR imaging is designed, where the sought-after and the prior image are structurally similar, but belong to different contrast mechanisms. The presented numerical studies demonstrate the superiority of the proposed approach as compared to classical approaches in the form of traditional metrics. 计算医学成像系统需要计算重建过程来形成图像。当记录的测量不完整时，为了恢复对要成像的物体的有用估计，必须利用关于物体性质的先验知识。为了改善不适定成像逆问题的调节，人们正在积极研究深度学习方法，以更好地表示对象先验和约束。这项工作提出，在可以获得所需对象的先前图像形式的附加信息的情况下，使用基于样式的生成对抗网络（StyleGAN）来约束图像重建问题。优化问题在 StyleGAN 的中间潜在空间中表述，该空间与有意义的图像属性或“风格”相关，例如磁共振成像 (MRI) 中使用的对比度。所寻求的图像和先前图像之间的差异是在解纠缠的潜在空间中测量的，并用于以对解纠缠的潜在空间的特定样式的约束的形式正则化逆问题。受 MR 成像启发，设计了一种程式化的数值研究，其中受欢迎的图像和先前的图像在结构上相似，但属于不同的对比机制。所提出的数值研究证明了所提出的方法与传统指标形式的经典方法相比的优越性。 本文提出利用基于风格的生成对抗网络（StyleGAN）结合先验图像，改进医学图像重建中的逆问题求解。 Varun A. authors_text: Bowen Weng,Minghao Zhu,Keith Redmill
title: A Formal Safety Characterization of Advanced Driver Assist Systems in the Car-Following Regime with Scenario-Sampling
title_zh: 通过场景采样对跟驰模式中的高级驾驶员辅助系统进行正式安全表征
abstract: The capability to follow a lead-vehicle and avoid rear-end collisions is one of the most important functionalities for human drivers and various Advanced Driver Assist Systems (ADAS). Existing safety performance justification of the car-following systems either relies on simple concrete scenarios with biased surrogate metrics or requires a significantly long driving distance for risk observation and inference. In this paper, we propose a guaranteed unbiased and sampling efficient scenario-based safety evaluation framework inspired by the previous work on $εδ$-almost safe set quantification. The proposal characterizes the complete safety performance of the test subject in the car-following regime. The performance of the proposed method is also demonstrated in challenging cases including some widely adopted car-following decision-making modules and the commercially available Openpilot driving stack by CommaAI.
summary: The capability to follow a lead-vehicle and avoid rear-end collisions is one of the most important functionalities for human drivers and various Advanced Driver Assist Systems (ADAS). Existing safety performance justification of the car-following systems either relies on simple concrete scenarios with biased surrogate metrics or requires a significantly long driving distance for risk observation and inference. In this paper, we propose a guaranteed unbiased and sampling efficient scenario-based safety evaluation framework inspired by the previous work on $εδ$-almost safe set quantification. The proposal characterizes the complete safety performance of the test subject in the car-following regime. The performance of the proposed method is also demonstrated in challenging cases including some widely adopted car-following decision-making modules and the commercially available Openpilot driving stack by CommaAI.
abstract_zh: 跟踪领先车辆并避免追尾碰撞的能力是人类驾驶员和各种高级驾驶员辅助系统 (ADAS) 的最重要功能之一。跟驰系统现有的安全性能论证要么依赖于带有偏差替代指标的简单具体场景，要么需要相当长的行驶距离来进行风险观察和推理。在本文中，受先前关于$εδ$-几乎安全集量化工作的启发，我们提出了一种保证无偏且采样高效的基于场景的安全评估框架。该提案描述了测试对象在跟车状态下的完整安全性能。该方法的性能也在具有挑战性的案例中得到了证明，包括一些广泛采用的跟车决策模块和 CommaAI 的商用 Openpilot 驾驶堆栈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于场景抽样的无偏且高效的安全评估框架，用于量化先进驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）在跟车场景下的安全性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跟车系统安全评估方法依赖简单场景或需要长距离驾驶观测，存在偏差大、效率低的问题，亟需更可靠的安全性能表征方法。
AI.method: 受εδ-几乎安全集量化方法启发，提出基于场景抽样的安全评估框架，通过高效采样与无偏分析全面刻画测试对象在跟车场景下的安全性能。
AI.result: 该方法在复杂案例（如主流跟车决策模块及CommaAI的Openpilot系统）中验证了有效性，证明其能准确评估ADAS在实际驾驶中的安全表现。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架为ADAS在跟车场景下的安全性能评估提供了理论保证与实用工具，有助于推动自动驾驶系统的安全验证标准化。

authors_text: Chinmay Shah,Aaron Fleming,Varun Nalam,He,Huang
title: Design of EMG-driven Musculoskeletal Model for Volitional Control of a Robotic Ankle Prosthesis
title_zh: 用于机器人踝关节假肢意志控制的肌电图驱动肌肉骨骼模型的设计
abstract: Existing robotic lower-limb prostheses use autonomous control to address cyclic, locomotive tasks, but they are inadequate to operate the prosthesis for daily activities that are non-cyclic and unpredictable. To address this challenge, this study aims to design a novel electromyography (EMG)-driven musculoskeletal model for volitional control of a robotic ankle-foot prosthesis. This controller places the user in continuous control of the device, allowing them to freely manipulate the prosthesis behavior at will. The Hill-type muscle model was used to model a dorsiflexor and a plantarflexor, which functioned around a virtual ankle joint. The model parameters were determined by fitting the model prediction to the experimental data collected from an able-bodied subject. EMG signals recorded from ankle agonist and antagonist muscle pair were used to activate the virtual muscle models. This model was validated via offline simulations and real-time prosthesis control. Additionally, the feasibility of the proposed prosthesis control on assisting the user's functional tasks was demonstrated. The present control may further improve the function of robotic prosthesis for supporting versatile activities in individuals with lower-limb amputations.
summary: Existing robotic lower-limb prostheses use autonomous control to address cyclic, locomotive tasks, but they are inadequate to operate the prosthesis for daily activities that are non-cyclic and unpredictable. To address this challenge, this study aims to design a novel electromyography (EMG)-driven musculoskeletal model for volitional control of a robotic ankle-foot prosthesis. This controller places the user in continuous control of the device, allowing them to freely manipulate the prosthesis behavior at will. The Hill-type muscle model was used to model a dorsiflexor and a plantarflexor, which functioned around a virtual ankle joint. The model parameters were determined by fitting the model prediction to the experimental data collected from an able-bodied subject. EMG signals recorded from ankle agonist and antagonist muscle pair were used to activate the virtual muscle models. This model was validated via offline simulations and real-time prosthesis control. Additionally, the feasibility of the proposed prosthesis control on assisting the user's functional tasks was demonstrated. The present control may further improve the function of robotic prosthesis for supporting versatile activities in individuals with lower-limb amputations.
abstract_zh: 现有的机器人下肢假肢使用自主控制来解决循环、运动任务，但它们不足以操作假肢来执行非循环和不可预测的日常活动。为了应对这一挑战，本研究旨在设计一种新型肌电图（EMG）驱动的肌肉骨骼模型，用于机器人踝足假肢的意志控制。该控制器使用户能够持续控制设备，使他们能够随意操纵假肢的行为。 Hill 型肌肉模型用于模拟背屈肌和跖屈肌，它们在虚拟踝关节周围发挥作用。通过将模型预测与从健全受试者收集的实验数据进行拟合来确定模型参数。从踝关节主动肌和拮抗肌对记录的肌电图信号用于激活虚拟肌肉模型。该模型通过离线模拟和实时假肢控制进行了验证。此外，还证明了所提出的假肢控制在协助用户执行功能任务方面的可行性。本控制可以进一步改善机器人假肢的功能，以支持下肢截肢者的多功能活动。

AI.tldr: 设计基于肌电信号（EMG）的肌骨模型，以实现对仿生踝足假肢的随意控制。
AI.motivation: 现有假肢的自主控制无法满足非周期性和不可预测的日常活动需求，需提升用户对假肢的主动控制能力。
AI.method: 采用Hill型肌肉模型模拟背屈肌和跖屈肌，通过拟合健康受试者的实验数据确定模型参数，并利用踝关节拮抗肌的EMG信号驱动虚拟肌肉模型，结合离线仿真与实时控制验证。
AI.result: 模型通过仿真和实时控制验证可行，证明其可辅助用户完成多样化功能任务。
AI.conclusion: 该控制方法可提升下肢截肢者假肢的多功能性，支持复杂活动需求。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该控制方法可提升下肢截肢者假肢的多功能性，支持复杂活动需求。

tldr: 设计基于肌电信号（EMG）的肌骨模型，以实现对仿生踝足假肢的随意控制。
motivation: 现有假肢的自主控制无法满足非周期性和不可预测的日常活动需求，需提升用户对假肢的主动控制能力。
method: 采用Hill型肌肉模型模拟背屈肌和跖屈肌，通过拟合健康受试者的实验数据确定模型参数，并利用踝关节拮抗肌的EMG信号驱动虚拟肌肉模型，结合离线仿真与实时控制验证。
result: 模型通过仿真和实时控制验证可行，证明其可辅助用户完成多样化功能任务。
conclusion: 该控制方法可提升下肢截肢者假肢的多功能性，支持复杂活动需求。
search_text: Design of EMG-driven Musculoskeletal Model for Volitional Control of a Robotic Ankle Prosthesis 用于机器人踝关节假肢意志控制的肌电图驱动肌肉骨骼模型的设计 Existing robotic lower-limb prostheses use autonomous control to address cyclic, locomotive tasks, but they are inadequate to operate the prosthesis for daily activities that are non-cyclic and unpredictable. To address this challenge, this study aims to design a novel electromyography (EMG)-driven musculoskeletal model for volitional control of a robotic ankle-foot prosthesis. This controller places the user in continuous control of the device, allowing them to freely manipulate the prosthesis behavior at will. The Hill-type muscle model was used to model a dorsiflexor and a plantarflexor, which functioned around a virtual ankle joint. The model parameters were determined by fitting the model prediction to the experimental data collected from an able-bodied subject. EMG signals recorded from ankle agonist and antagonist muscle pair were used to activate the virtual muscle models. This model was validated via offline simulations and real-time prosthesis control. Additionally, the feasibility of the proposed prosthesis control on assisting the user's functional tasks was demonstrated. The present control may further improve the function of robotic prosthesis for supporting versatile activities in individuals with lower-limb amputations. 现有的机器人下肢假肢使用自主控制来解决循环、运动任务，但它们不足以操作假肢来执行非循环和不可预测的日常活动。为了应对这一挑战，本研究旨在设计一种新型肌电图（EMG）驱动的肌肉骨骼模型，用于机器人踝足假肢的意志控制。该控制器使用户能够持续控制设备，使他们能够随意操纵假肢的行为。 Hill 型肌肉模型用于模拟背屈肌和跖屈肌，它们在虚拟踝关节周围发挥作用。通过将模型预测与从健全受试者收集的实验数据进行拟合来确定模型参数。从踝关节主动肌和拮抗肌对记录的肌电图信号用于激活虚拟肌肉模型。该模型通过离线模拟和实时假肢控制进行了验证。此外，还证明了所提出的假肢控制在协助用户执行功能任务方面的可行性。本控制可以进一步改善机器人假肢的功能，以支持下肢截肢者的多功能活动。 设计基于肌电信号（EMG）的肌骨模型，以实现对仿生踝足假肢的随意控制。 Chinmay Shah,Aaron Fleming,Varun Nalam,He,Huang cs.RO

authors_text: Suzanne Petryk,Lisa Dunlap,Keyan Nasseri,Joseph Gonzalez,Trevor Darrell,Anna Rohrbach
title: On Guiding Visual Attention with Language Specification
title_zh: 论用语言规范引导视觉注意
abstract: While real world challenges typically define visual categories with language words or phrases, most visual classification methods define categories with numerical indices. However, the language specification of the classes provides an especially useful prior for biased and noisy datasets, where it can help disambiguate what features are task-relevant. Recently, large-scale multimodal models have been shown to recognize a wide variety of high-level concepts from a language specification even without additional image training data, but they are often unable to distinguish classes for more fine-grained tasks. CNNs, in contrast, can extract subtle image features that are required for fine-grained discrimination, but will overfit to any bias or noise in datasets. Our insight is to use high-level language specification as advice for constraining the classification evidence to task-relevant features, instead of distractors. To do this, we ground task-relevant words or phrases with attention maps from a pretrained large-scale model. We then use this grounding to supervise a classifier's spatial attention away from distracting context. We show that supervising spatial attention in this way improves performance on classification tasks with biased and noisy data, including about 3-15% worst-group accuracy improvements and 41-45% relative improvements on fairness metrics.
summary: While real world challenges typically define visual categories with language words or phrases, most visual classification methods define categories with numerical indices. However, the language specification of the classes provides an especially useful prior for biased and noisy datasets, where it can help disambiguate what features are task-relevant. Recently, large-scale multimodal models have been shown to recognize a wide variety of high-level concepts from a language specification even without additional image training data, but they are often unable to distinguish classes for more fine-grained tasks. CNNs, in contrast, can extract subtle image features that are required for fine-grained discrimination, but will overfit to any bias or noise in datasets. Our insight is to use high-level language specification as advice for constraining the classification evidence to task-relevant features, instead of distractors. To do this, we ground task-relevant words or phrases with attention maps from a pretrained large-scale model. We then use this grounding to supervise a classifier's spatial attention away from distracting context. We show that supervising spatial attention in this way improves performance on classification tasks with biased and noisy data, including about 3-15% worst-group accuracy improvements and 41-45% relative improvements on fairness metrics.
abstract_zh: 虽然现实世界的挑战通常使用语言单词或短语定义视觉类别，但大多数视觉分类方法使用数字索引定义类别。然而，类的语言规范为有偏差和嘈杂的数据集提供了特别有用的先验，它可以帮助消除哪些特征与任务相关的歧义。最近，即使没有额外的图像训练数据，大规模多模态模型也已被证明可以从语言规范中识别各种高级概念，但它们通常无法区分更细粒度任务的类别。相比之下，CNN 可以提取细粒度区分所需的细微图像特征，但会过度拟合数据集中的任何偏差或噪声。我们的见解是使用高级语言规范作为将分类证据限制为任务相关特征的建议，而不是干扰因素。为此，我们将与任务相关的单词或短语与来自预训练的大规模模型的注意力图结合起来。然后，我们使用这种基础来监督分类器的空间注意力，使其远离分散注意力的上下文。我们表明，以这种方式监督空间注意力可以提高使用有偏差和噪声数据的分类任务的性能，包括最差组准确率提高约 3-15%，公平性指标相对提高 41-45%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用语言规范引导视觉注意力，以提升在存在偏差和噪声数据下的图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉分类方法依赖数值索引定义类别，难以处理噪声数据；而大模型虽能理解语言概念，但难以处理细粒度任务，CNN则易过拟合噪声。
AI.method: 通过预训练模型将语言规范转化为注意力图，以此监督分类器空间注意力，使其聚焦任务相关特征并忽略干扰信息。
AI.result: 在偏差和噪声数据集上，方法使最差群体准确率提升3-15%，公平性指标相对提升41-45%。
AI.conclusion: 语言引导的注意力机制能有效提升分类器鲁棒性，兼顾细粒度区分能力与数据噪声容忍度。

authors_text: Nitisha Jain,Ralf Krestel
title: Discovering Fine-Grained Semantics in Knowledge Graph Relations
title_zh: 发现知识图关系中的细粒度语义
abstract: When it comes to comprehending and analyzing multi-relational data, the semantics of relations are crucial. Polysemous relations between different types of entities, that represent multiple semantics, are common in real-world relational datasets represented by knowledge graphs. For numerous use cases, such as entity type classification, question answering and knowledge graph completion, the correct semantic interpretation of these relations is necessary. In this work, we provide a strategy for discovering the different semantics associated with abstract relations and deriving many sub-relations with fine-grained meaning. To do this, we leverage the types of the entities associated with the relations and cluster the vector representations of entities and relations. The suggested method is able to automatically discover the best number of sub-relations for a polysemous relation and determine their semantic interpretation, according to our empirical evaluation.
summary: When it comes to comprehending and analyzing multi-relational data, the semantics of relations are crucial. Polysemous relations between different types of entities, that represent multiple semantics, are common in real-world relational datasets represented by knowledge graphs. For numerous use cases, such as entity type classification, question answering and knowledge graph completion, the correct semantic interpretation of these relations is necessary. In this work, we provide a strategy for discovering the different semantics associated with abstract relations and deriving many sub-relations with fine-grained meaning. To do this, we leverage the types of the entities associated with the relations and cluster the vector representations of entities and relations. The suggested method is able to automatically discover the best number of sub-relations for a polysemous relation and determine their semantic interpretation, according to our empirical evaluation.
abstract_zh: 在理解和分析多关系数据时，关系的语义至关重要。不同类型实体之间表示多种语义的多义关系在知识图表示的现实世界关系数据集中很常见。对于许多用例，例如实体类型分类、问题回答和知识图补全，这些关系的正确语义解释是必要的。在这项工作中，我们提供了一种策略来发现与抽象关系相关的不同语义并派生出许多具有细粒度含义的子关系。为此，我们利用与关系关联的实体类型并对实体和关系的向量表示进行聚类。根据我们的经验评估，所提出的方法能够自动发现多义关系的最佳子关系数量并确定它们的语义解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过聚类实体和关系向量表示，自动发现知识图谱中多义关系的细粒度语义并分解为多个子关系的方法。
AI.motivation: 现实中的知识图谱关系常具有多义性，不同实体类型间的关系可能包含多种语义，而现有方法难以准确捕捉这种复杂性，影响下游任务效果。
AI.method: 基于实体类型信息，通过聚类实体及关系的向量表示，自动识别多义关系的最佳子关系数量并推断其语义解释。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法能有效发现多义关系的细粒度语义，为知识图谱补全等任务提供了更精确的关系表示。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理知识图谱中多义关系提供了自动化解决方案，有助于提升基于关系语义的下游任务性能。
