search_text: Data-SUITE: Data-centric identification of in-distribution incongruous examples Data-SUITE：以数据为中心识别分布中不协调的示例 Systematic quantification of data quality is critical for consistent model performance. Prior works have focused on out-of-distribution data. Instead, we tackle an understudied yet equally important problem of characterizing incongruous regions of in-distribution (ID) data, which may arise from feature space heterogeneity. To this end, we propose a paradigm shift with Data-SUITE: a data-centric AI framework to identify these regions, independent of a task-specific model. Data-SUITE leverages copula modeling, representation learning, and conformal prediction to build feature-wise confidence interval estimators based on a set of training instances. These estimators can be used to evaluate the congruence of test instances with respect to the training set, to answer two practically useful questions: (1) which test instances will be reliably predicted by a model trained with the training instances? and (2) can we identify incongruous regions of the feature space so that data owners understand the data's limitations or guide future data collection? We empirically validate Data-SUITE's performance and coverage guarantees and demonstrate on cross-site medical data, biased data, and data with concept drift, that Data-SUITE best identifies ID regions where a downstream model may be reliable (independent of said model). We also illustrate how these identified regions can provide insights into datasets and highlight their limitations. 数据质量的系统量化对于一致的模型性能至关重要。之前的工作主要集中在分布外数据。相反，我们解决了一个尚未充分研究但同样重要的问题，即表征分布内（ID）数据的不协调区域，这可能是由特征空间异质性引起的。为此，我们提出了 Data-SUITE 的范式转变：一个以数据为中心的人工智能框架，用于识别这些区域，独立于特定于任务的模型。 Data-SUITE 利用 copula 建模、表示学习和保形预测来基于一组训练实例构建特征置信区间估计器。这些估计器可用于评估测试实例相对于训练集的一致性，以回答两个实际有用的问题：（1）使用训练实例训练的模型将可靠地预测哪些测试实例？ （2）我们能否识别特征空间中不协调的区域，以便数据所有者了解数据的局限性或指导未来的数据收集？我们凭经验验证 Data-SUITE 的性能和覆盖范围保证，并在跨站点医疗数据、有偏差的数据和具有概念漂移的数据上证明，Data-SUITE 可以最好地识别下游模型可能可靠的 ID 区域（独立于所述模型）。我们还说明了这些已识别的区域如何提供对数据集的见解并强调其局限性。 本文提出Data-SUITE框架，用于数据驱动地识别分布内数据中的不一致区域，无需依赖特定任务模型。 Nabeel Seedat,Jonathan Crabbé,Mihaela van der Schaar cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Leslie N. Smith
title: General Cyclical Training of Neural Networks
title_zh: 神经网络的一般循环训练
abstract: This paper describes the principle of "General Cyclical Training" in machine learning, where training starts and ends with "easy training" and the "hard training" happens during the middle epochs. We propose several manifestations for training neural networks, including algorithmic examples (via hyper-parameters and loss functions), data-based examples, and model-based examples. Specifically, we introduce several novel techniques: cyclical weight decay, cyclical batch size, cyclical focal loss, cyclical softmax temperature, cyclical data augmentation, cyclical gradient clipping, and cyclical semi-supervised learning. In addition, we demonstrate that cyclical weight decay, cyclical softmax temperature, and cyclical gradient clipping (as three examples of this principle) are beneficial in the test accuracy performance of a trained model. Furthermore, we discuss model-based examples (such as pretraining and knowledge distillation) from the perspective of general cyclical training and recommend some changes to the typical training methodology. In summary, this paper defines the general cyclical training concept and discusses several specific ways in which this concept can be applied to training neural networks. In the spirit of reproducibility, the code used in our experiments is available at \url{https://github.com/lnsmith54/CFL}.
summary: This paper describes the principle of "General Cyclical Training" in machine learning, where training starts and ends with "easy training" and the "hard training" happens during the middle epochs. We propose several manifestations for training neural networks, including algorithmic examples (via hyper-parameters and loss functions), data-based examples, and model-based examples. Specifically, we introduce several novel techniques: cyclical weight decay, cyclical batch size, cyclical focal loss, cyclical softmax temperature, cyclical data augmentation, cyclical gradient clipping, and cyclical semi-supervised learning. In addition, we demonstrate that cyclical weight decay, cyclical softmax temperature, and cyclical gradient clipping (as three examples of this principle) are beneficial in the test accuracy performance of a trained model. Furthermore, we discuss model-based examples (such as pretraining and knowledge distillation) from the perspective of general cyclical training and recommend some changes to the typical training methodology. In summary, this paper defines the general cyclical training concept and discusses several specific ways in which this concept can be applied to training neural networks. In the spirit of reproducibility, the code used in our experiments is available at \url{https://github.com/lnsmith54/CFL}.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了机器学习中“通用循环训练”的原理，即训练以“简单训练”开始和结束，“困难训练”发生在中间时期。我们提出了训练神经网络的几种表现形式，包括算法示例（通过超参数和损失函数）、基于数据的示例和基于模型的示例。具体来说，我们介绍了几种新技术：循环权重衰减、循环批量大小、循环焦点损失、循环softmax温度、循环数据增强、循环梯度裁剪和循环半监督学习。此外，我们还证明了循环权重衰减、循环 softmax 温度和循环梯度裁剪（作为该原理的三个示例）对于训练模型的测试精度性能是有益的。此外，我们从一般循环训练的角度讨论基于模型的示例（例如预训练和知识蒸馏），并建议对典型训练方法进行一些改变。总之，本文定义了一般的循环训练概念，并讨论了将该概念应用于训练神经网络的几种具体方法。本着可重复性的精神，我们实验中使用的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/lnsmith54/CFL} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'通用循环训练'的机器学习方法，通过在训练初期和末期进行'简单训练'，在中间阶段进行'困难训练'，并引入多种循环技术以提升神经网络性能。
AI.motivation: 传统训练方法在处理复杂任务时可能陷入局部最优或收敛缓慢，需探索更高效的训练策略以提升模型泛化能力与测试精度。
AI.method: 提出循环权重衰减、循环批量大小、循环焦点损失等七种技术，并从算法、数据和模型层面验证其有效性，通过实验对比分析循环策略对测试准确率的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明循环权重衰减、循环softmax温度及循环梯度裁剪三种技术能显著提升模型测试准确率，且模型预训练与知识蒸馏等方法可与循环训练框架结合。
AI.conclusion: 通用循环训练为神经网络训练提供了新范式，通过周期性调整超参数和训练策略可优化模型性能，相关代码已开源供复现验证。

authors_text: Eleni Nisioti,Clément Moulin-Frier
title: Plasticity and evolvability under environmental variability: the joint role of fitness-based selection and niche-limited competition
title_zh: 环境变化下的可塑性和进化性：基于适应度的选择和利基有限竞争的共同作用
abstract: The diversity and quality of natural systems have been a puzzle and inspiration for communities studying artificial life. It is now widely admitted that the adaptation mechanisms enabling these properties are largely influenced by the environments they inhabit. Organisms facing environmental variability have two alternative adaptation mechanisms operating at different timescales: \textit{plasticity}, the ability of a phenotype to survive in diverse environments and \textit{evolvability}, the ability to adapt through mutations. Although vital under environmental variability, both mechanisms are associated with fitness costs hypothesized to render them unnecessary in stable environments. In this work, we study the interplay between environmental dynamics and adaptation in a minimal model of the evolution of plasticity and evolvability. We experiment with different types of environments characterized by the presence of niches and a climate function that determines the fitness landscape. We empirically show that environmental dynamics affect plasticity and evolvability differently and that the presence of diverse ecological niches favors adaptability even in stable environments. We perform ablation studies of the selection mechanisms to separate the role of fitness-based selection and niche-limited competition. Results obtained from our minimal model allow us to propose promising research directions in the study of open-endedness in biological and artificial systems.
summary: The diversity and quality of natural systems have been a puzzle and inspiration for communities studying artificial life. It is now widely admitted that the adaptation mechanisms enabling these properties are largely influenced by the environments they inhabit. Organisms facing environmental variability have two alternative adaptation mechanisms operating at different timescales: \textit{plasticity}, the ability of a phenotype to survive in diverse environments and \textit{evolvability}, the ability to adapt through mutations. Although vital under environmental variability, both mechanisms are associated with fitness costs hypothesized to render them unnecessary in stable environments. In this work, we study the interplay between environmental dynamics and adaptation in a minimal model of the evolution of plasticity and evolvability. We experiment with different types of environments characterized by the presence of niches and a climate function that determines the fitness landscape. We empirically show that environmental dynamics affect plasticity and evolvability differently and that the presence of diverse ecological niches favors adaptability even in stable environments. We perform ablation studies of the selection mechanisms to separate the role of fitness-based selection and niche-limited competition. Results obtained from our minimal model allow us to propose promising research directions in the study of open-endedness in biological and artificial systems.
abstract_zh: 自然系统的多样性和质量一直是研究人工生命的社区的难题和灵感。现在人们普遍承认，实现这些特性的适应机制在很大程度上受到它们所居住的环境的影响。面临环境变化的生物体有两种在不同时间尺度上运作的替代适应机制：\textit{可塑性}，表型在不同环境中生存的能力和\textit{进化性}，通过突变适应的能力。尽管在环境变化下至关重要，但这两种机制都与假设的适应成本相关，这使得它们在稳定的环境中变得不必要。在这项工作中，我们在可塑性和可进化性进化的最小模型中研究环境动力学和适应之间的相互作用。我们尝试了不同类型的环境，其特征是生态位的存在和决定适应度景观的气候函数。我们凭经验表明，环境动态对可塑性和进化性的影响不同，即使在稳定的环境中，不同生态位的存在也有利于适应性。我们对选择机制进行消融研究，以区分基于适应度的选择和利基有限竞争的作用。从我们的最小模型中获得的结果使我们能够在生物和人工系统的开放性研究中提出有前途的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 研究环境动态对生物可塑性与进化能力的影响机制，并探讨生态位多样性在稳定环境中的适应性作用。
AI.motivation: 自然系统的多样性和适应性机制受环境影响显著，但环境变化下可塑性与进化能力的协同作用机制尚不明确，尤其在稳定环境中二者是否必要存在争议。
AI.method: 构建最小化演化模型，通过模拟不同生态位结构和气候函数的环境，结合消融实验分离适应性选择与生态位竞争机制的作用差异。
AI.result: 环境动态对可塑性与进化能力产生非对称影响，生态位多样性可提升系统适应性；适应性选择与生态位竞争机制在演化过程中呈现差异化贡献。
AI.conclusion: 生态位结构是驱动开放演化的重要因素，未来需进一步探索环境异质性与演化机制的耦合关系，为生物与人工系统的自适应设计提供理论支持。

ai_content_json.method: 构建最小化演化模型，通过模拟不同生态位结构和气候函数的环境，结合消融实验分离适应性选择与生态位竞争机制的作用差异。
ai_content_json.result: 环境动态对可塑性与进化能力产生非对称影响，生态位多样性可提升系统适应性；适应性选择与生态位竞争机制在演化过程中呈现差异化贡献。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 生态位结构是驱动开放演化的重要因素，未来需进一步探索环境异质性与演化机制的耦合关系，为生物与人工系统的自适应设计提供理论支持。

search_text: Plasticity and evolvability under environmental variability: the joint role of fitness-based selection and niche-limited competition 环境变化下的可塑性和进化性：基于适应度的选择和利基有限竞争的共同作用 The diversity and quality of natural systems have been a puzzle and inspiration for communities studying artificial life. It is now widely admitted that the adaptation mechanisms enabling these properties are largely influenced by the environments they inhabit. Organisms facing environmental variability have two alternative adaptation mechanisms operating at different timescales: \textit{plasticity}, the ability of a phenotype to survive in diverse environments and \textit{evolvability}, the ability to adapt through mutations. Although vital under environmental variability, both mechanisms are associated with fitness costs hypothesized to render them unnecessary in stable environments. In this work, we study the interplay between environmental dynamics and adaptation in a minimal model of the evolution of plasticity and evolvability. We experiment with different types of environments characterized by the presence of niches and a climate function that determines the fitness landscape. We empirically show that environmental dynamics affect plasticity and evolvability differently and that the presence of diverse ecological niches favors adaptability even in stable environments. We perform ablation studies of the selection mechanisms to separate the role of fitness-based selection and niche-limited competition. Results obtained from our minimal model allow us to propose promising research directions in the study of open-endedness in biological and artificial systems. 自然系统的多样性和质量一直是研究人工生命的社区的难题和灵感。现在人们普遍承认，实现这些特性的适应机制在很大程度上受到它们所居住的环境的影响。面临环境变化的生物体有两种在不同时间尺度上运作的替代适应机制：\textit{可塑性}，表型在不同环境中生存的能力和\textit{进化性}，通过突变适应的能力。尽管在环境变化下至关重要，但这两种机制都与假设的适应成本相关，这使得它们在稳定的环境中变得不必要。在这项工作中，我们在可塑性和可进化性进化的最小模型中研究环境动力学和适应之间的相互作用。我们尝试了不同类型的环境，其特征是生态位的存在和决定适应度景观的气候函数。我们凭经验表明，环境动态对可塑性和进化性的影响不同，即使在稳定的环境中，不同生态位的存在也有利于适应性。我们对选择机制进行消融研究，以区分基于适应度的选择和利基有限竞争的作用。从我们的最小模型中获得的结果使我们能够在生物和人工系统的开放性研究中提出有前途的研究方向。 研究环境动态对生物可塑性与进化能力的影响机制，并探讨生态位多样性在稳定环境中的适应性作用。 Eleni Nisioti,Clément Moulin-Frier q-bio.PE,cs.NE

authors_text: Kate Donahue,Alexandra Chouldechova,Krishnaram Kenthapadi
title: Human-Algorithm Collaboration: Achieving Complementarity and Avoiding Unfairness
title_zh: 人机协作：实现互补，避免不公平
comment: Accepted to ACM FAccT 2022. Preliminary version accepted (panel presentation) at Neurips workshop on Human-Centered AI
comments: Accepted to ACM FAccT 2022. Preliminary version accepted (panel presentation) at Neurips workshop on Human-Centered AI
abstract: Much of machine learning research focuses on predictive accuracy: given a task, create a machine learning model (or algorithm) that maximizes accuracy. In many settings, however, the final prediction or decision of a system is under the control of a human, who uses an algorithm's output along with their own personal expertise in order to produce a combined prediction. One ultimate goal of such collaborative systems is "complementarity": that is, to produce lower loss (equivalently, greater payoff or utility) than either the human or algorithm alone. However, experimental results have shown that even in carefully-designed systems, complementary performance can be elusive. Our work provides three key contributions. First, we provide a theoretical framework for modeling simple human-algorithm systems and demonstrate that multiple prior analyses can be expressed within it. Next, we use this model to prove conditions where complementarity is impossible, and give constructive examples of where complementarity is achievable. Finally, we discuss the implications of our findings, especially with respect to the fairness of a classifier. In sum, these results deepen our understanding of key factors influencing the combined performance of human-algorithm systems, giving insight into how algorithmic tools can best be designed for collaborative environments.
summary: Much of machine learning research focuses on predictive accuracy: given a task, create a machine learning model (or algorithm) that maximizes accuracy. In many settings, however, the final prediction or decision of a system is under the control of a human, who uses an algorithm's output along with their own personal expertise in order to produce a combined prediction. One ultimate goal of such collaborative systems is "complementarity": that is, to produce lower loss (equivalently, greater payoff or utility) than either the human or algorithm alone. However, experimental results have shown that even in carefully-designed systems, complementary performance can be elusive. Our work provides three key contributions. First, we provide a theoretical framework for modeling simple human-algorithm systems and demonstrate that multiple prior analyses can be expressed within it. Next, we use this model to prove conditions where complementarity is impossible, and give constructive examples of where complementarity is achievable. Finally, we discuss the implications of our findings, especially with respect to the fairness of a classifier. In sum, these results deepen our understanding of key factors influencing the combined performance of human-algorithm systems, giving insight into how algorithmic tools can best be designed for collaborative environments.
abstract_zh: 许多机器学习研究都集中在预测准确性：给定任务，创建一个机器学习模型（或算法）以最大限度地提高准确性。然而，在许多设置中，系统的最终预测或决策是在人类的控制之下，人类使用算法的输出以及他们自己的个人专业知识来产生组合预测。这种协作系统的最终目标之一是“互补性”：也就是说，与单独的人类或算法相比，产生更低的损失（相当于更大的回报或效用）。然而，实验结果表明，即使在精心设计的系统中，互补的性能也可能难以实现。我们的工作提供了三个关键贡献。首先，我们提供了一个用于建模简单人类算法系统的理论框架，并证明可以在其中表达多种先前的分析。接下来，我们使用这个模型来证明不可能实现互补的条件，并给出可以实现互补的建设性示例。最后，我们讨论我们的研究结果的含义，特别是在分类器的公平性方面。总之，这些结果加深了我们对影响人类算法系统综合性能的关键因素的理解，让我们深入了解如何最好地为协作环境设计算法工具。

AI.tldr: 研究人类与算法协作系统的互补性及公平性问题，提出理论框架并分析实现条件。
AI.motivation: 现有系统难以实现人类与算法的互补性，且公平性问题未被充分考虑，需理论指导设计。
AI.method: 构建理论框架建模简单协作系统，分析互补性条件，并通过模型验证可行性与公平性影响。
AI.result: 证明互补性不可行的条件，构造可行案例，并揭示分类器公平性相关的影响因素。
AI.conclusion: 深化对协作系统性能影响因素的理解，为算法设计提供协作环境优化方向。

authors_text: Shagun Jhaver,Quan Ze Chen,Detlef Knauss,Amy Zhang
title: Designing Word Filter Tools for Creator-led Comment Moderation
title_zh: 设计文字过滤工具以进行创作者主导的评论审核
comment: to be published in CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22)
comments: to be published in CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22)
abstract: Online social platforms centered around content creators often allow comments on content, where creators moderate the comments they receive. As creators can face overwhelming numbers of comments, with some of them harassing or hateful, platforms typically provide tools such as word filters for creators to automate aspects of moderation. From needfinding interviews with 19 creators about how they use existing tools, we found that they struggled with writing good filters as well as organizing and revisiting their filters, due to the difficulty of determining what the filters actually catch. To address these issues, we present FilterBuddy, a system that supports creators in authoring new filters or building from existing filter lists, as well as organizing their filters and visualizing what comments are captured over time. We conducted an early-stage evaluation of FilterBuddy with YouTube creators, finding that participants see FilterBuddy not just as a moderation tool, but also a means to organize their comments to better understand their audiences.
summary: Online social platforms centered around content creators often allow comments on content, where creators moderate the comments they receive. As creators can face overwhelming numbers of comments, with some of them harassing or hateful, platforms typically provide tools such as word filters for creators to automate aspects of moderation. From needfinding interviews with 19 creators about how they use existing tools, we found that they struggled with writing good filters as well as organizing and revisiting their filters, due to the difficulty of determining what the filters actually catch. To address these issues, we present FilterBuddy, a system that supports creators in authoring new filters or building from existing filter lists, as well as organizing their filters and visualizing what comments are captured over time. We conducted an early-stage evaluation of FilterBuddy with YouTube creators, finding that participants see FilterBuddy not just as a moderation tool, but also a means to organize their comments to better understand their audiences.
abstract_zh: 以内容创作者为中心的在线社交平台通常允许对内容发表评论，创作者会审核他们收到的评论。由于创作者可能面临大量评论，其中一些评论是骚扰性或仇恨性的，因此平台通常会为创作者提供文字过滤器等工具来自动进行审核。通过对 19 位创作者关于如何使用现有工具的需求调查访谈，我们发现他们在编写良好的过滤器以及组织和重新访问过滤器方面遇到了困难，因为很难确定过滤器实际捕获的内容。为了解决这些问题，我们推出了 FilterBuddy，该系统支持创建者创作新过滤器或从现有过滤器列表构建，以及组织过滤器并可视化随时间推移捕获的评论。我们与 YouTube 创作者一起对 FilterBuddy 进行了早期评估，发现参与者不仅将 FilterBuddy 视为一种审核工具，而且将其视为组织评论以更好地了解受众的一种手段。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种名为FilterBuddy的工具，帮助内容创作者更有效地管理评论中的不当内容。
AI.motivation: 现有评论过滤工具难以帮助创作者编写有效过滤词、管理过滤规则以及理解过滤效果，导致其在面对大量骚扰或仇恨评论时效率低下。
AI.method: 通过访谈19位创作者了解现有工具的痛点，开发FilterBuddy系统，支持过滤词创建、规则组织及评论捕获可视化，并邀请YouTube创作者进行早期评估。
AI.result: 测试表明，创作者认为FilterBuddy不仅提升了评论管理效率，还帮助他们更深入地理解受众特征。
AI.conclusion: FilterBuddy通过结构化支持和可视化反馈，解决了创作者在评论过滤中的核心痛点，为创作者主导的内容管理提供了新思路。

From needfinding interviews with 19 creators about how they use existing tools, we found that they struggled with writing good filters as well as organizing and revisiting their filters, due to the difficulty of determining what the filters actually catch. We conducted an early-stage evaluation of FilterBuddy with YouTube creators, finding that participants see FilterBuddy not just as a moderation tool, but also a means to organize their comments to better understand their audiences. 以内容创作者为中心的在线社交平台通常允许对内容发表评论，创作者会审核他们收到的评论。由于创作者可能面临大量评论，其中一些评论是骚扰性或仇恨性的，因此平台通常会为创作者提供文字过滤器等工具来自动进行审核。通过对 19 位创作者关于如何使用现有工具的需求调查访谈，我们发现他们在编写良好的过滤器以及组织和重新访问过滤器方面遇到了困难，因为很难确定过滤器实际捕获的内容。为了解决这些问题，我们推出了 FilterBuddy，该系统支持创建者创作新过滤器或从现有过滤器列表构建，以及组织过滤器并可视化随时间推移捕获的评论。我们与 YouTube 创作者一起对 FilterBuddy 进行了早期评估，发现参与者不仅将 FilterBuddy 视为一种审核工具，而且将其视为组织评论以更好地了解受众的一种手段。 本文设计了一种名为FilterBuddy的工具，帮助内容创作者更有效地管理评论中的不当内容。 Shagun Jhaver,Quan Ze Chen,Detlef Knauss,Amy Zhang cs.HC

authors_text: Alan Perotti,Paolo Bajardi,Francesco Bonchi,André Panisson
title: GRAPHSHAP: Explaining Identity-Aware Graph Classifiers Through the Language of Motifs
title_zh: GRAPHSHAP：通过 Motif 语言解释身份感知图分类器
comment: Accepted by International Joint Conference on Neural Networks 2023 (IJCNN)
comments: Accepted by International Joint Conference on Neural Networks 2023 (IJCNN)
abstract: Most methods for explaining black-box classifiers (e.g. on tabular data, images, or time series) rely on measuring the impact that removing/perturbing features has on the model output. This forces the explanation language to match the classifier's feature space. However, when dealing with graph data, in which the basic features correspond to the edges describing the graph structure, this matching between features space and explanation language might not be appropriate. Decoupling the feature space (edges) from a desired high-level explanation language (such as motifs) is thus a major challenge towards developing actionable explanations for graph classification tasks. In this paper we introduce GRAPHSHAP, a Shapley-based approach able to provide motif-based explanations for identity-aware graph classifiers, assuming no knowledge whatsoever about the model or its training data: the only requirement is that the classifier can be queried as a black-box at will. For the sake of computational efficiency we explore a progressive approximation strategy and show how a simple kernel can efficiently approximate explanation scores, thus allowing GRAPHSHAP to scale on scenarios with a large explanation space (i.e. large number of motifs). We showcase GRAPHSHAP on a real-world brain-network dataset consisting of patients affected by Autism Spectrum Disorder and a control group. Our experiments highlight how the classification provided by a black-box model can be effectively explained by few connectomics patterns.
summary: Most methods for explaining black-box classifiers (e.g. on tabular data, images, or time series) rely on measuring the impact that removing/perturbing features has on the model output. This forces the explanation language to match the classifier's feature space. However, when dealing with graph data, in which the basic features correspond to the edges describing the graph structure, this matching between features space and explanation language might not be appropriate. Decoupling the feature space (edges) from a desired high-level explanation language (such as motifs) is thus a major challenge towards developing actionable explanations for graph classification tasks. In this paper we introduce GRAPHSHAP, a Shapley-based approach able to provide motif-based explanations for identity-aware graph classifiers, assuming no knowledge whatsoever about the model or its training data: the only requirement is that the classifier can be queried as a black-box at will. For the sake of computational efficiency we explore a progressive approximation strategy and show how a simple kernel can efficiently approximate explanation scores, thus allowing GRAPHSHAP to scale on scenarios with a large explanation space (i.e. large number of motifs). We showcase GRAPHSHAP on a real-world brain-network dataset consisting of patients affected by Autism Spectrum Disorder and a control group. Our experiments highlight how the classification provided by a black-box model can be effectively explained by few connectomics patterns.
abstract_zh: 大多数解释黑盒分类器（例如表格数据、图像或时间序列）的方法都依赖于测量删除/扰动特征对模型输出的影响。这迫使解释语言与分类器的特征空间相匹配。然而，在处理图数据时，其中基本特征对应于描述图结构的边，特征空间和解释语言之间的这种匹配可能不合适。因此，将特征空间（边缘）与所需的高级解释语言（例如主题）解耦是为图分类任务开发可操作解释的主要挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了 GRAPHSHAP，这是一种基于 Shapley 的方法，能够为身份感知图分类器提供基于主题的解释，假设对模型或其训练数据一无所知：唯一的要求是分类器可以随意作为黑盒进行查询。为了计算效率，我们探索了一种渐进逼近策略，并展示了一个简单的内核如何有效地逼近解释分数，从而允许 GRAPHSHAP 在具有大解释空间（即大量主题）的场景上进行扩展。我们在真实世界的大脑网络数据集上展示了 GRAPHSHAP，该数据集由受自闭症谱系障碍影响的患者和对照组组成。我们的实验强调了如何通过少数连接组学模式有效地解释黑盒模型提供的分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRAPHSHAP方法，通过基于motif的高层语言解释身份感知图分类器的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 现有图分类器解释方法依赖于图结构特征（边）的扰动，难以匹配高层语义解释需求（如motif模式），需解耦特征空间与解释语言以实现可操作性解释。
AI.method: 基于Shapley值理论设计GRAPHSHAP框架，通过黑盒查询模型并采用渐进近似策略与核函数计算，高效近似motif级别的解释分数。
AI.result: 在脑网络数据集（自闭症患者与对照组）实验中，验证了GRAPHSHAP能通过少量连接组模式有效解释黑盒模型的分类决策。
AI.conclusion: GRAPHSHAP实现了无需模型知识的图分类器解释，通过motif语言揭示决策依据，为大规模图解释任务提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Jiayuan Mao,Haoyue Shi,Jiajun Wu,Roger P. Levy,Joshua B. Tenenbaum
title: Grammar-Based Grounded Lexicon Learning
title_zh: 基于语法的扎根词典学习
comment: Minor typo fixes. NeurIPS 2021. Project page: https://g2l2.csail.mit.edu/
comments: Minor typo fixes. NeurIPS 2021. Project page: https://g2l2.csail.mit.edu/
abstract: We present Grammar-Based Grounded Lexicon Learning (G2L2), a lexicalist approach toward learning a compositional and grounded meaning representation of language from grounded data, such as paired images and texts. At the core of G2L2 is a collection of lexicon entries, which map each word to a tuple of a syntactic type and a neuro-symbolic semantic program. For example, the word shiny has a syntactic type of adjective; its neuro-symbolic semantic program has the symbolic form λx. filter(x, SHINY), where the concept SHINY is associated with a neural network embedding, which will be used to classify shiny objects. Given an input sentence, G2L2 first looks up the lexicon entries associated with each token. It then derives the meaning of the sentence as an executable neuro-symbolic program by composing lexical meanings based on syntax. The recovered meaning programs can be executed on grounded inputs. To facilitate learning in an exponentially-growing compositional space, we introduce a joint parsing and expected execution algorithm, which does local marginalization over derivations to reduce the training time. We evaluate G2L2 on two domains: visual reasoning and language-driven navigation. Results show that G2L2 can generalize from small amounts of data to novel compositions of words.
summary: We present Grammar-Based Grounded Lexicon Learning (G2L2), a lexicalist approach toward learning a compositional and grounded meaning representation of language from grounded data, such as paired images and texts. At the core of G2L2 is a collection of lexicon entries, which map each word to a tuple of a syntactic type and a neuro-symbolic semantic program. For example, the word shiny has a syntactic type of adjective; its neuro-symbolic semantic program has the symbolic form λx. filter(x, SHINY), where the concept SHINY is associated with a neural network embedding, which will be used to classify shiny objects. Given an input sentence, G2L2 first looks up the lexicon entries associated with each token. It then derives the meaning of the sentence as an executable neuro-symbolic program by composing lexical meanings based on syntax. The recovered meaning programs can be executed on grounded inputs. To facilitate learning in an exponentially-growing compositional space, we introduce a joint parsing and expected execution algorithm, which does local marginalization over derivations to reduce the training time. We evaluate G2L2 on two domains: visual reasoning and language-driven navigation. Results show that G2L2 can generalize from small amounts of data to novel compositions of words.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了基于语法的扎根词典学习（G2L2），这是一种词汇主义方法，用于从扎根数据（例如配对图像和文本）中学习语言的组合和扎根意义表示。 G2L2 的核心是词典条目的集合，它将每个单词映射到句法类型的元组和神经符号语义程序。例如，shiny 这个词有一个形容词的句法类型；其神经符号语义程序具有符号形式 λx。 filter(x, SHINY)，其中 SHINY 概念与神经网络嵌入相关，它将用于对闪亮对象进行分类。给定一个输入句子，G2L2 首先查找与每个标记关联的词典条目。然后，它通过根据语法组合词汇含义，将句子的含义推导出为可执行的神经符号程序。恢复的意义程序可以在接地输入上执行。为了促进在指数增长的组合空间中的学习，我们引入了联合解析和预期执行算法，该算法对推导进行局部边缘化以减少训练时间。我们在两个领域评估 G2L2：视觉推理和语言驱动的导航。结果表明，G2L2 可以将少量数据概括为新颖的单词组合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语法的地面词典学习方法（G2L2），通过配对图像和文本数据学习语言的组合性和地面意义表示。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以从地面数据中有效学习组合性语义表示，且现有模型在小样本下泛化能力不足，需结合语法结构与神经符号程序提升表现。
AI.method: 构建包含词法条目和神经符号语义程序的词典，通过句法类型与程序组合生成可执行语义，引入联合解析与预期执行算法优化训练效率。
AI.result: 在视觉推理和语言驱动导航任务中，G2L2能从小样本数据中泛化到新组合，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: G2L2通过语法引导的神经符号程序学习，实现了地面词典的组合性泛化，为小样本场景下的语义理解提供了新思路。

authors_text: Cong Han,E. Merve Kaya,Kyle Hoefer,Malcolm Slaney,Simon Carlile
title: Multi-Channel Speech Denoising for Machine Ears
title_zh: 机器耳朵的多通道语音降噪
abstract: This work describes a speech denoising system for machine ears that aims to improve speech intelligibility and the overall listening experience in noisy environments. We recorded approximately 100 hours of audio data with reverberation and moderate environmental noise using a pair of microphone arrays placed around each of the two ears and then mixed sound recordings to simulate adverse acoustic scenes. Then, we trained a multi-channel speech denoising network (MCSDN) on the mixture of recordings. To improve the training, we employ an unsupervised method, complex angular central Gaussian mixture model (cACGMM), to acquire cleaner speech from noisy recordings to serve as the learning target. We propose a MCSDN-Beamforming-MCSDN framework in the inference stage. The results of the subjective evaluation show that the cACGMM improves the training data, resulting in better noise reduction and user preference, and the entire system improves the intelligibility and listening experience in noisy situations.

We recorded approximately 100 hours of audio data with reverberation and moderate environmental noise using a pair of microphone arrays placed around each of the two ears and then mixed sound recordings to simulate adverse acoustic scenes. Then, we trained a multi-channel speech denoising network (MCSDN) on the mixture of recordings. To improve the training, we employ an unsupervised method, complex angular central Gaussian mixture model (cACGMM), to acquire cleaner speech from noisy recordings to serve as the learning target. We propose a MCSDN-Beamforming-MCSDN framework in the inference stage. The results of the subjective evaluation show that the cACGMM improves the training data, resulting in better noise reduction and user preference, and the entire system improves the intelligibility and listening experience in noisy situations.
abstract_zh: 这项工作描述了一种用于机耳的语音降噪系统，旨在提高噪声环境中的语音清晰度和整体聆听体验。我们使用放置在两只耳朵周围的一对麦克风阵列记录了大约 100 小时的带有混响和中等环境噪声的音频数据，然后混合录音以模拟不利的声学场景。然后，我们在混合录音上训练了多通道语音去噪网络（MCSDN）。为了改进训练，我们采用无监督方法，即复杂角度中心高斯混合模型（cACGMM），从噪声录音中获取更清晰的语音作为学习目标。我们在推理阶段提出了 MCSDN-Beamforming-MCSDN 框架。主观评价结果表明，cACGMM改进了训练数据，带来了更好的降噪效果和用户偏好，整个系统提高了噪声环境下的清晰度和聆听体验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多通道语音降噪系统（MCSDN），旨在通过模拟真实噪声环境提升机器耳在嘈杂场景下的语音可懂度和听觉体验。
AI.motivation: 现有语音降噪技术难以有效处理复杂噪声环境下的语音信号，而人类双耳听觉机制能通过空间信息增强语音感知，因此需开发仿生多通道降噪方案以提升机器听觉性能。
AI.method: 采用双耳麦克风阵列采集100小时混响与环境噪声数据，构建多通道语音降噪网络（MCSDN），结合复数角中央高斯混合模型（cACGMM）无监督生成纯净语音作为训练目标，并提出MCSDN-波束成形-MCSDN推理框架。
AI.result: 主观评估显示cACGMM显著提升训练数据质量，系统在噪声抑制效果和用户偏好度上优于基线方法，有效增强嘈杂环境下的语音可懂度与听觉舒适度。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合多通道信号处理与无监督学习，所提框架在复杂噪声场景中实现了优于传统方法的语音降噪效果，为智能听觉设备提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Richmond Y. Wong,Michael A. Madaio,Nick Merrill
title: Seeing Like a Toolkit: How Toolkits Envision the Work of AI Ethics
title_zh: 像工具包一样看待：工具包如何设想人工智能伦理工作
abstract: Numerous toolkits have been developed to support ethical AI development. However, toolkits, like all tools, encode assumptions in their design about what work should be done and how. In this paper, we conduct a qualitative analysis of 27 AI ethics toolkits to critically examine how the work of ethics is imagined and how it is supported by these toolkits. Specifically, we examine the discourses toolkits rely on when talking about ethical issues, who they imagine should do the work of ethics, and how they envision the work practices involved in addressing ethics. Among the toolkits, we identify a mismatch between the imagined work of ethics and the support the toolkits provide for doing that work. In particular, we identify a lack of guidance around how to navigate labor, organizational, and institutional power dynamics as they relate to performing ethical work. We use these omissions to chart future work for researchers and designers of AI ethics toolkits.
summary: Numerous toolkits have been developed to support ethical AI development. However, toolkits, like all tools, encode assumptions in their design about what work should be done and how. In this paper, we conduct a qualitative analysis of 27 AI ethics toolkits to critically examine how the work of ethics is imagined and how it is supported by these toolkits. Specifically, we examine the discourses toolkits rely on when talking about ethical issues, who they imagine should do the work of ethics, and how they envision the work practices involved in addressing ethics. Among the toolkits, we identify a mismatch between the imagined work of ethics and the support the toolkits provide for doing that work. In particular, we identify a lack of guidance around how to navigate labor, organizational, and institutional power dynamics as they relate to performing ethical work. We use these omissions to chart future work for researchers and designers of AI ethics toolkits.
abstract_zh: 人们已经开发了许多工具包来支持符合道德的人工智能开发。然而，与所有工具一样，工具包在其设计中编码了关于应该完成哪些工作以及如何完成工作的假设。在本文中，我们对 27 个人工智能伦理工具包进行了定性分析，以批判性地审视伦理工作是如何想象的以及这些工具包如何支持它。具体来说，我们研究了在谈论道德问题时所依赖的话语工具包，他们认为应该由谁来从事道德工作，以及他们如何设想解决道德问题所涉及的工作实践。在这些工具包中，我们发现想象中的道德工作与工具包为完成这项工作提供的支持之间不匹配。特别是，我们发现缺乏关于如何驾驭与执行道德工作相关的劳工、组织和机构权力动态的指导。我们利用这些遗漏来为人工智能伦理工具包的研究人员和设计者规划未来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文通过定性分析27个AI伦理工具包，探讨其如何设想伦理工作及提供的支持方式。
AI.motivation: 现有AI伦理工具包在设计中隐含对伦理工作的预设，但缺乏对权力动态等实际问题的指导，需批判性审视其局限性。
AI.method: 采用定性分析方法，研究工具包的论述内容、伦理工作执行者设想及实践方式。
AI.result: 发现工具包设想的伦理工作与实际支持存在不匹配，尤其缺乏对劳动、组织及机构权力动态的应对指导。
AI.conclusion: 需未来研究与设计更关注权力关系等实际挑战，以完善AI伦理工具包的功能支持。

authors_text: Juan Irving Vasquez,David E. Troncoso Romero,Mayra Antonio-Cruz,Erik Zamora
title: Spiral Trajectories for Building Inspection with Quadrotors
title_zh: 使用四旋翼飞行器进行建筑检查的螺旋轨迹
abstract: Inspection of large building is an important task since it can prevent material and human losses. A cheap and fast way to do the inspections is by sensors mounted on quadrotor vehicles. The challenge here is to compute a trajectory so that the building is completely observed while this same trajectory can be followed by the quadrotor in a smooth way. To address the problem, we propose a method that receives a 2.5D model of the target building and computes a smooth trajectory that can be followed by the quadrotor controller. The computed trajectory is a Fourier series that matches the desired behaviour. Our method has been tested in simulation and we have compared it against polynomial trajectories. Our result show that the method is efficient and can be applied to different building shapes.
summary: Inspection of large building is an important task since it can prevent material and human losses. A cheap and fast way to do the inspections is by sensors mounted on quadrotor vehicles. The challenge here is to compute a trajectory so that the building is completely observed while this same trajectory can be followed by the quadrotor in a smooth way. To address the problem, we propose a method that receives a 2.5D model of the target building and computes a smooth trajectory that can be followed by the quadrotor controller. The computed trajectory is a Fourier series that matches the desired behaviour. Our method has been tested in simulation and we have compared it against polynomial trajectories. Our result show that the method is efficient and can be applied to different building shapes.
abstract_zh: 大型建筑物的检查是一项重要任务，因为它可以防止物质和人员损失。一种廉价且快速的检查方法是使用安装在四旋翼飞行器上的传感器。这里的挑战是计算一条轨迹，以便完全观察建筑物，同时四旋翼飞行器可以平滑地遵循相同的轨迹。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种方法，该方法接收目标建筑物的 2.5D 模型并计算四旋翼控制器可以遵循的平滑轨迹。计算出的轨迹是与所需行为相匹配的傅立叶级数。我们的方法已经在模拟中进行了测试，并将其与多项式轨迹进行了比较。我们的结果表明该方法是有效的并且可以应用于不同的建筑形状。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于傅里叶级数的四旋翼无人机轨迹规划方法，用于高效完成建筑检测任务。
AI.motivation: 传统建筑检测存在成本高、效率低的问题，现有轨迹规划方法难以兼顾检测完整性与飞行平滑性。
AI.method: 利用目标建筑的2.5D模型生成傅里叶级数轨迹，通过仿真对比验证其相对于多项式轨迹的优势。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成适用于不同建筑形状的平滑轨迹，具有较高的检测效率和可行性。
AI.conclusion: 傅里叶级数轨迹规划方法为建筑检测提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法能生成适用于不同建筑形状的平滑轨迹，具有较高的检测效率和可行性。

search_text: Spiral Trajectories for Building Inspection with Quadrotors 使用四旋翼飞行器进行建筑检查的螺旋轨迹 Inspection of large building is an important task since it can prevent material and human losses. A cheap and fast way to do the inspections is by sensors mounted on quadrotor vehicles. The challenge here is to compute a trajectory so that the building is completely observed while this same trajectory can be followed by the quadrotor in a smooth way. To address the problem, we propose a method that receives a 2.5D model of the target building and computes a smooth trajectory that can be followed by the quadrotor controller. The computed trajectory is a Fourier series that matches the desired behaviour. Our method has been tested in simulation and we have compared it against polynomial trajectories. Our result show that the method is efficient and can be applied to different building shapes. 大型建筑物的检查是一项重要任务，因为它可以防止物质和人员损失。一种廉价且快速的检查方法是使用安装在四旋翼飞行器上的传感器。这里的挑战是计算一条轨迹，以便完全观察建筑物，同时四旋翼飞行器可以平滑地遵循相同的轨迹。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种方法，该方法接收目标建筑物的 2.5D 模型并计算四旋翼控制器可以遵循的平滑轨迹。计算出的轨迹是与所需行为相匹配的傅立叶级数。我们的方法已经在模拟中进行了测试，并将其与多项式轨迹进行了比较。我们的结果表明该方法是有效的并且可以应用于不同的建筑形状。 本文提出一种基于傅里叶级数的四旋翼无人机轨迹规划方法，用于高效完成建筑检测任务。 Juan Irving Vasquez,David E. Troncoso Romero,Mayra Antonio-Cruz,Erik Zamora cs.RO

authors_text: Jaesung Rim,Geonung Kim,Jungeon Kim,Junyong Lee,Seungyong Lee,Sunghyun Cho
title: Realistic Blur Synthesis for Learning Image Deblurring
title_zh: 用于学习图像去模糊的真实模糊合成
abstract: Training learning-based deblurring methods demands a tremendous amount of blurred and sharp image pairs. Unfortunately, existing synthetic datasets are not realistic enough, and deblurring models trained on them cannot handle real blurred images effectively. While real datasets have recently been proposed, they provide limited diversity of scenes and camera settings, and capturing real datasets for diverse settings is still challenging. To resolve this, this paper analyzes various factors that introduce differences between real and synthetic blurred images. To this end, we present RSBlur, a novel dataset with real blurred images and the corresponding sharp image sequences to enable a detailed analysis of the difference between real and synthetic blur. With the dataset, we reveal the effects of different factors in the blur generation process. Based on the analysis, we also present a novel blur synthesis pipeline to synthesize more realistic blur. We show that our synthesis pipeline can improve the deblurring performance on real blurred images.
summary: Training learning-based deblurring methods demands a tremendous amount of blurred and sharp image pairs. Unfortunately, existing synthetic datasets are not realistic enough, and deblurring models trained on them cannot handle real blurred images effectively. While real datasets have recently been proposed, they provide limited diversity of scenes and camera settings, and capturing real datasets for diverse settings is still challenging. To resolve this, this paper analyzes various factors that introduce differences between real and synthetic blurred images. To this end, we present RSBlur, a novel dataset with real blurred images and the corresponding sharp image sequences to enable a detailed analysis of the difference between real and synthetic blur. With the dataset, we reveal the effects of different factors in the blur generation process. Based on the analysis, we also present a novel blur synthesis pipeline to synthesize more realistic blur. We show that our synthesis pipeline can improve the deblurring performance on real blurred images.
abstract_zh: 训练基于学习的去模糊方法需要大量的模糊和清晰的图像对。不幸的是，现有的合成数据集不够真实，并且在其上训练的去模糊模型无法有效地处理真实的模糊图像。虽然最近提出了真实数据集，但它们提供的场景和相机设置的多样性有限，并且捕获不同设置的真实数据集仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，本文分析了导致真实模糊图像和合成模糊图像之间差异的各种因素。为此，我们提出了 RSBlur，这是一个具有真实模糊图像和相应的清晰图像序列的新颖数据集，可以详细分析真实模糊和合成模糊之间的差异。通过数据集，我们揭示了模糊生成过程中不同因素的影响。基于分析，我们还提出了一种新颖的模糊合成管道来合成更真实的模糊。我们表明，我们的合成管道可以提高真实模糊图像的去模糊性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种真实模糊合成方法RSBlur，通过分析真实与合成模糊图像的差异，改进图像去模糊模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据集无法生成足够真实的模糊图像，而真实数据集缺乏场景和相机参数多样性，导致去模糊模型在实际应用中效果受限。
AI.method: 构建包含真实模糊图像与对应清晰序列的RSBlur数据集，分析模糊生成过程中的关键因素，并设计新型模糊合成流程。
AI.result: 合成方法显著提升了模型在真实模糊图像上的去模糊效果，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过揭示模糊生成机制并优化合成流程，本文为提升去模糊模型泛化能力提供了新思路和数据支持。

authors_text: Ziyin Ma,Changjae Oh
title: A Wavelet-based Dual-stream Network for Underwater Image Enhancement
title_zh: 基于小波的双流网络水下图像增强
abstract: We present a wavelet-based dual-stream network that addresses color cast and blurry details in underwater images. We handle these artifacts separately by decomposing an input image into multiple frequency bands using discrete wavelet transform, which generates the downsampled structure image and detail images. These sub-band images are used as input to our dual-stream network that incorporates two sub-networks: the multi-color space fusion network and the detail enhancement network. The multi-color space fusion network takes the decomposed structure image as input and estimates the color corrected output by employing the feature representations from diverse color spaces of the input. The detail enhancement network addresses the blurriness of the original underwater image by improving the image details from high-frequency sub-bands. We validate the proposed method on both real-world and synthetic underwater datasets and show the effectiveness of our model in color correction and blur removal with low computational complexity.
summary: We present a wavelet-based dual-stream network that addresses color cast and blurry details in underwater images. We handle these artifacts separately by decomposing an input image into multiple frequency bands using discrete wavelet transform, which generates the downsampled structure image and detail images. These sub-band images are used as input to our dual-stream network that incorporates two sub-networks: the multi-color space fusion network and the detail enhancement network. The multi-color space fusion network takes the decomposed structure image as input and estimates the color corrected output by employing the feature representations from diverse color spaces of the input. The detail enhancement network addresses the blurriness of the original underwater image by improving the image details from high-frequency sub-bands. We validate the proposed method on both real-world and synthetic underwater datasets and show the effectiveness of our model in color correction and blur removal with low computational complexity.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于小波的双流网络，可以解决水下图像中的色偏和模糊细节问题。我们通过使用离散小波变换将输入图像分解为多个频带来分别处理这些伪影，从而生成下采样的结构图像和细节图像。这些子带图像用作我们的双流网络的输入，该网络包含两个子网络：多颜色空间融合网络和细节增强网络。多颜色空间融合网络将分解的结构图像作为输入，并通过采用输入的不同颜色空间的特征表示来估计颜色校正的输出。细节增强网络通过改善高频子带的图像细节来解决原始水下图像的模糊性。我们在现实世界和合成水下数据集上验证了所提出的方法，并以较低的计算复杂度展示了我们的模型在颜色校正和模糊消除方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于小波变换的双流网络，用于解决水下图像的颜色偏移和细节模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 水下图像常因光线散射和吸收导致颜色失真及细节模糊，现有方法难以有效分离并同时处理这两种问题。
AI.method: 通过离散小波变换将图像分解为结构图和细节子带，利用双流网络分别进行多色空间融合修正颜色和高频率细节增强。
AI.result: 在真实和合成水下数据集上验证，模型在颜色校正和去模糊任务中表现优异且计算复杂度低。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分离处理颜色和细节问题，有效提升了水下图像质量，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Marcus Michelen,Will Perkins
title: Strong spatial mixing for repulsive point processes
title_zh: 排斥点过程的强空间混合
abstract: We prove that a Gibbs point process interacting via a finite-range, repulsive potential $φ$ exhibits a strong spatial mixing property for activities $λ< e/Δ_φ$, where $Δ_φ$ is the potential-weighted connective constant of $φ$, defined recently in [MP21]. Using this we derive several analytic and algorithmic consequences when $λ$ satisfies this bound: (1) We prove new identities for the infinite volume pressure and surface pressure of such a process (and in the case of the surface pressure establish its existence). (2) We prove that local block dynamics for sampling from the model on a box of volume $N$ in $\mathbb R^d$ mixes in time $O(N \log N)$, giving efficient randomized algorithms to approximate the partition function and approximately sample from these models. (3) We use the above identities and algorithms to give efficient approximation algorithms for the pressure and surface pressure.
summary: We prove that a Gibbs point process interacting via a finite-range, repulsive potential $φ$ exhibits a strong spatial mixing property for activities $λ< e/Δ_φ$, where $Δ_φ$ is the potential-weighted connective constant of $φ$, defined recently in [MP21]. Using this we derive several analytic and algorithmic consequences when $λ$ satisfies this bound: (1) We prove new identities for the infinite volume pressure and surface pressure of such a process (and in the case of the surface pressure establish its existence). (2) We prove that local block dynamics for sampling from the model on a box of volume $N$ in $\mathbb R^d$ mixes in time $O(N \log N)$, giving efficient randomized algorithms to approximate the partition function and approximately sample from these models. (3) We use the above identities and algorithms to give efficient approximation algorithms for the pressure and surface pressure.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，通过有限范围的排斥势 $φ$ 相互作用的吉布斯点过程对于活动 $λ< e/Δ_φ$ 表现出很强的空间混合特性，其中 $Δ_φ$ 是 $φ$ 的势加权连接常数，最近在 [MP21] 中定义。当 $λ$ 满足这个界限时，我们利用这一点得出几个分析和算法结果：（1）我们证明了这种过程的无限体积压力和表面压力的新恒等式（并且在表面压力的情况下确定其存在）。 (2) 我们证明，从 $\mathbb R^d$ 中体积 $N$ 的盒子上的模型中采样的局部块动力学在时间 $O(N \log N)$ 中混合，给出了高效的随机算法来近似配分函数并从这些模型中近似采样。 (3) 我们使用上述恒等式和算法给出了压力和表面压力的有效近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有有限范围排斥势的吉布斯点过程的强空间混合性质，并推导了其在活动参数满足特定条件下的分析和算法结果。
AI.motivation: 排斥点过程在统计物理和随机几何中具有重要应用，但其高效采样和计算压力等性质仍需深入研究。强空间混合性质是理解系统行为和设计算法的关键。
AI.method: 通过证明排斥势的吉布斯点过程在活动参数λ < e/Δ_φ时具有强空间混合性质，结合势加权连通常数Δ_φ，进一步推导压力恒等式、分析局部块动态的混合时间，并设计近似算法。
AI.result: 建立了无限体积压力和表面压力的新恒等式，证明了表面压力的存在性，给出了O(N log N)时间复杂度的采样算法，并实现了压力和表面压力的高效近似计算。
AI.conclusion: 强空间混合性质为排斥点过程提供了理论分析框架和高效算法，尤其在活动参数低于临界阈值时，显著提升了计算效率和理论可证性。

search_text: Strong spatial mixing for repulsive point processes 排斥点过程的强空间混合 We prove that a Gibbs point process interacting via a finite-range, repulsive potential $φ$ exhibits a strong spatial mixing property for activities $λ< e/Δ_φ$, where $Δ_φ$ is the potential-weighted connective constant of $φ$, defined recently in [MP21]. Using this we derive several analytic and algorithmic consequences when $λ$ satisfies this bound: (1) We prove new identities for the infinite volume pressure and surface pressure of such a process (and in the case of the surface pressure establish its existence). (2) We prove that local block dynamics for sampling from the model on a box of volume $N$ in $\mathbb R^d$ mixes in time $O(N \log N)$, giving efficient randomized algorithms to approximate the partition function and approximately sample from these models. (3) We use the above identities and algorithms to give efficient approximation algorithms for the pressure and surface pressure. 我们证明，通过有限范围的排斥势 $φ$ 相互作用的吉布斯点过程对于活动 $λ< e/Δ_φ$ 表现出很强的空间混合特性，其中 $Δ_φ$ 是 $φ$ 的势加权连接常数，最近在 [MP21] 中定义。当 $λ$ 满足这个界限时，我们利用这一点得出几个分析和算法结果：（1）我们证明了这种过程的无限体积压力和表面压力的新恒等式（并且在表面压力的情况下确定其存在）。 (2) 我们证明，从 $\mathbb R^d$ 中体积 $N$ 的盒子上的模型中采样的局部块动力学在时间 $O(N \log N)$ 中混合，给出了高效的随机算法来近似配分函数并从这些模型中近似采样。 (3) 我们使用上述恒等式和算法给出了压力和表面压力的有效近似算法。 本文研究了具有有限范围排斥势的吉布斯点过程的强空间混合性质，并推导了其在活动参数满足特定条件下的分析和算法结果。 Marcus Michelen,Will Perkins math.PR,cs.DS,math-ph

authors_text: David Li,Yinda Zhang,Christian Häne,Danhang Tang,Amitabh Varshney,Ruofei Du
title: OmniSyn: Synthesizing 360 Videos with Wide-baseline Panoramas
title_zh: OmniSyn：使用宽基线全景合成 360 度视频
abstract: Immersive maps such as Google Street View and Bing Streetside provide true-to-life views with a massive collection of panoramas. However, these panoramas are only available at sparse intervals along the path they are taken, resulting in visual discontinuities during navigation. Prior art in view synthesis is usually built upon a set of perspective images, a pair of stereoscopic images, or a monocular image, but barely examines wide-baseline panoramas, which are widely adopted in commercial platforms to optimize bandwidth and storage usage. In this paper, we leverage the unique characteristics of wide-baseline panoramas and present OmniSyn, a novel pipeline for 360° view synthesis between wide-baseline panoramas. OmniSyn predicts omnidirectional depth maps using a spherical cost volume and a monocular skip connection, renders meshes in 360° images, and synthesizes intermediate views with a fusion network. We demonstrate the effectiveness of OmniSyn via comprehensive experimental results including comparison with the state-of-the-art methods on CARLA and Matterport datasets, ablation studies, and generalization studies on street views. We envision our work may inspire future research for this unheeded real-world task and eventually produce a smoother experience for navigating immersive maps.
summary: Immersive maps such as Google Street View and Bing Streetside provide true-to-life views with a massive collection of panoramas. However, these panoramas are only available at sparse intervals along the path they are taken, resulting in visual discontinuities during navigation. OmniSyn predicts omnidirectional depth maps using a spherical cost volume and a monocular skip connection, renders meshes in 360° images, and synthesizes intermediate views with a fusion network. We demonstrate the effectiveness of OmniSyn via comprehensive experimental results including comparison with the state-of-the-art methods on CARLA and Matterport datasets, ablation studies, and generalization studies on street views. We envision our work may inspire future research for this unheeded real-world task and eventually produce a smoother experience for navigating immersive maps.
abstract_zh: Google Street View 和 Bing Streetside 等沉浸式地图通过大量全景图提供逼真的视图。然而，这些全景图仅在沿其拍摄路径的稀疏间隔处提供，导致导航期间视觉不连续。视图合成中的现有技术通常建立在一组透视图像、一对立体图像或单眼图像的基础上，但几乎没有检查宽基线全景图，宽基线全景图在商业平台中广泛采用以优化带宽和存储使用。在本文中，我们利用宽基线全景图的独特特征，提出了 OmniSyn，这是一种用于宽基线全景图之间 360° 视图合成的新颖管道。 OmniSyn 使用球形成本体积和单目跳跃连接来预测全向深度图，在 360° 图像中渲染网格，并使用融合网络合成中间视图。我们通过综合实验结果证明了 OmniSyn 的有效性，包括与 CARLA 和 Matterport 数据集上最先进的方法进行比较、消融研究以及街景泛化研究。我们预计我们的工作可能会激发未来对这项被忽视的现实世界任务的研究，并最终为沉浸式地图导航带来更流畅的体验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniSyn方法，通过宽基线全景图合成360°视图，解决沉浸式地图导航中的视觉不连续问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视图合成方法难以处理商业平台广泛使用的宽基线全景图，导致沉浸式地图在稀疏采样点间导航时出现视觉断层。
AI.method: 利用球面代价体积与单目跳跃连接预测全向深度图，通过360°图像网格渲染和融合网络合成中间视图。
AI.result: 在CARLA和Matterport数据集上优于现有方法，完成消融实验和街景泛化性验证，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为被忽视的真实场景任务提供解决方案，有望提升沉浸式地图导航的流畅性并推动相关研究。

authors_text: Claude Carlet,Marko Djurasevic,Domagoj Jakobovic,Luca Mariot,Stjepan Picek
title: Evolving Constructions for Balanced, Highly Nonlinear Boolean Functions
title_zh: 平衡、高度非线性布尔函数的演化结构
abstract: Finding balanced, highly nonlinear Boolean functions is a difficult problem where it is not known what nonlinearity values are possible to be reached in general. At the same time, evolutionary computation is successfully used to evolve specific Boolean function instances, but the approach cannot easily scale for larger Boolean function sizes. Indeed, while evolving smaller Boolean functions is almost trivial, larger sizes become increasingly difficult, and evolutionary algorithms perform suboptimally. In this work, we ask whether genetic programming (GP) can evolve constructions resulting in balanced Boolean functions with high nonlinearity. This question is especially interesting as there are only a few known such constructions. Our results show that GP can find constructions that generalize well, i.e., result in the required functions for multiple tested sizes. Further, we show that GP evolves many equivalent constructions under different syntactic representations. Interestingly, the simplest solution found by GP is a particular case of the well-known indirect sum construction.
summary: Finding balanced, highly nonlinear Boolean functions is a difficult problem where it is not known what nonlinearity values are possible to be reached in general. At the same time, evolutionary computation is successfully used to evolve specific Boolean function instances, but the approach cannot easily scale for larger Boolean function sizes. Indeed, while evolving smaller Boolean functions is almost trivial, larger sizes become increasingly difficult, and evolutionary algorithms perform suboptimally. In this work, we ask whether genetic programming (GP) can evolve constructions resulting in balanced Boolean functions with high nonlinearity. This question is especially interesting as there are only a few known such constructions. Our results show that GP can find constructions that generalize well, i.e., result in the required functions for multiple tested sizes. Further, we show that GP evolves many equivalent constructions under different syntactic representations. Interestingly, the simplest solution found by GP is a particular case of the well-known indirect sum construction.
abstract_zh: 寻找平衡的、高度非线性的布尔函数是一个困难的问题，因为通常不知道可以达到什么非线性值。同时，进化计算成功地用于进化特定的布尔函数实例，但该方法不能轻松地扩展到更大的布尔函数大小。事实上，虽然进化较小的布尔函数几乎是微不足道的，但较大的布尔函数变得越来越困难，并且进化算法的性能不佳。在这项工作中，我们询问遗传编程（GP）是否可以演化出具有高度非线性的平衡布尔函数的构造。这个问题特别有趣，因为已知的此类结构只有少数。我们的结果表明，GP 可以找到泛化性良好的结构，即产生多个测试尺寸所需的函数。此外，我们表明 GP 在不同的句法表示下演化出许多等价的结构。有趣的是，GP 发现的最简单的解决方案是著名的间接和构造的一个特例。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用遗传编程（GP）演化适用于多种规模的平衡且高非线性布尔函数的构造方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成大规模平衡高非线性布尔函数时表现不佳，且已知构造方法有限，需探索更有效的演化策略。
AI.method: 采用遗传编程技术，通过演化不同语法表示的构造，测试其在多种布尔函数规模下的泛化能力。
AI.result: GP成功演化出可推广至多规模的构造，发现多种等价语法表示，其中最简解为已知的间接求和构造特例。
AI.conclusion: 遗传编程能有效生成通用布尔函数构造，揭示了不同表示间的等价性，为相关研究提供新方向。

Indeed, while evolving smaller Boolean functions is almost trivial, larger sizes become increasingly difficult, and evolutionary algorithms perform suboptimally. In this work, we ask whether genetic programming (GP) can evolve constructions resulting in balanced Boolean functions with high nonlinearity. This question is especially interesting as there are only a few known such constructions. Our results show that GP can find constructions that generalize well, i.e., result in the required functions for multiple tested sizes. Further, we show that GP evolves many equivalent constructions under different syntactic representations. Interestingly, the simplest solution found by GP is a particular case of the well-known indirect sum construction. 寻找平衡的、高度非线性的布尔函数是一个困难的问题，因为通常不知道可以达到什么非线性值。同时，进化计算成功地用于进化特定的布尔函数实例，但该方法不能轻松地扩展到更大的布尔函数大小。事实上，虽然进化较小的布尔函数几乎是微不足道的，但较大的布尔函数变得越来越困难，并且进化算法的性能不佳。在这项工作中，我们询问遗传编程（GP）是否可以演化出具有高度非线性的平衡布尔函数的构造。这个问题特别有趣，因为已知的此类结构只有少数。我们的结果表明，GP 可以找到泛化性良好的结构，即产生多个测试尺寸所需的函数。此外，我们表明 GP 在不同的句法表示下演化出许多等价的结构。有趣的是，GP 发现的最简单的解决方案是著名的间接和构造的一个特例。 本文研究利用遗传编程（GP）演化适用于多种规模的平衡且高非线性布尔函数的构造方法。 Claude Carlet,Marko Djurasevic,Domagoj Jakobovic,Luca Mariot,Stjepan Picek cs.NE,cs.CR

authors_text: Zhengren Wang,Yi Zhou,Mingyu Xiao,Bakhadyr Khoussainov
title: Listing Maximal k-Plexes in Large Real-World Graphs
title_zh: 列出大型现实世界图中的最大 k-plex
abstract: Listing dense subgraphs in large graphs plays a key task in varieties of network analysis applications like community detection. Clique, as the densest model, has been widely investigated. However, in practice, communities rarely form as cliques for various reasons, e.g., data noise. Therefore, $k$-plex, -- graph with each vertex adjacent to all but at most $k$ vertices, is introduced as a relaxed version of clique. Often, to better simulate cohesive communities, an emphasis is placed on connected $k$-plexes with small $k$. In this paper, we continue the research line of listing all maximal $k$-plexes and maximal $k$-plexes of prescribed size. Our first contribution is algorithm ListPlex that lists all maximal $k$-plexes in $O^*(γ^D)$ time for each constant $k$, where $γ$ is a value related to $k$ but strictly smaller than 2, and $D$ is the degeneracy of the graph that is far less than the vertex number $n$ in real-word graphs. Compared to the trivial bound of $2^n$, the improvement is significant, and our bound is better than all previously known results. In practice, we further use several techniques to accelerate listing $k$-plexes of a given size, such as structural-based prune rules, cache-efficient data structures, and parallel techniques. All these together result in a very practical algorithm. Empirical results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art solutions by up to orders of magnitude.
summary: Listing dense subgraphs in large graphs plays a key task in varieties of network analysis applications like community detection. Clique, as the densest model, has been widely investigated. However, in practice, communities rarely form as cliques for various reasons, e.g., data noise. Therefore, $k$-plex, -- graph with each vertex adjacent to all but at most $k$ vertices, is introduced as a relaxed version of clique. Often, to better simulate cohesive communities, an emphasis is placed on connected $k$-plexes with small $k$. In this paper, we continue the research line of listing all maximal $k$-plexes and maximal $k$-plexes of prescribed size. Our first contribution is algorithm ListPlex that lists all maximal $k$-plexes in $O^*(γ^D)$ time for each constant $k$, where $γ$ is a value related to $k$ but strictly smaller than 2, and $D$ is the degeneracy of the graph that is far less than the vertex number $n$ in real-word graphs. Compared to the trivial bound of $2^n$, the improvement is significant, and our bound is better than all previously known results. In practice, we further use several techniques to accelerate listing $k$-plexes of a given size, such as structural-based prune rules, cache-efficient data structures, and parallel techniques. All these together result in a very practical algorithm. Empirical results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art solutions by up to orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 在大图中列出密集子图在社区检测等各种网络分析应用中起着关键作用。 Clique 作为最密集的模型，已被广泛研究。然而，在实践中，社区很少由于各种原因（例如数据噪声）而形成派系。因此，$k$-plex，--每个顶点与所有但最多 $k$ 个顶点相邻的图，被引入作为 clique 的宽松版本。通常，为了更好地模拟有凝聚力的社区，重点放在具有小型 $k$ 的连接 $k$ 复合体上。在本文中，我们继续列出所有最大 $k$-plex 和规定大小的最大 $k$-plex 的研究路线。我们的第一个贡献是算法 ListPlex，它列出了每个常量 $k$ 在 $O^*(γ^D)$ 时间内的所有最大 $k$-plex，其中 $γ$ 是与 $k$ 相关但严格小于 2 的值，$D$ 是图的简并性，远小于实际图中的顶点数 $n$。与 $2^n$ 的平凡界限相比，改进是显着的，并且我们的界限比所有先前已知的结果都要好。在实践中，我们进一步使用多种技术来加速列出给定大小的 $k$-plex，例如基于结构的剪枝规则、缓存高效的数据结构和并行技术。所有这些共同产生了一个非常实用的算法。实证结果表明，我们的方法比最先进的解决方案性能高出几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效算法ListPlex，用于在大规模真实世界图中枚举所有最大k-plex子图。
AI.motivation: 现实网络中的社区结构通常无法形成严格的团（clique），而k-plex作为团的松弛模型能更好模拟实际社区，因此需要高效枚举最大k-plex子图。
AI.method: 设计ListPlex算法，时间复杂度为O*(γ^D)（γ<k相关且<2，D为图的退化度），结合结构剪枝、缓存优化和并行技术加速特定规模k-plex的枚举。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在实际效率上比现有最佳解决方案快多个数量级，且理论复杂度显著优于之前的2^n指数界。
AI.conclusion: 提出的ListPlex算法在理论复杂度和实际性能上均优于现有方法，为大规模图的k-plex枚举提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Jialin Yu,Huogen Wang,Ming Chen
title: Colonoscopy polyp detection with massive endoscopic images
title_zh: 通过大量内窥镜图像进行结肠镜息肉检测
abstract: We improved an existing end-to-end polyp detection model with better average precision validated by different data sets with trivial cost on detection speed. Our previous work on detecting polyps within colonoscopy provided an efficient end-to-end solution to alleviate doctor's examination overhead. However, our later experiments found this framework is not as robust as before as the condition of polyp capturing varies. In this work, we conducted several studies on data set, identifying main issues that causes low precision rate in the task of polyp detection. We used an optimized anchor generation methods to get better anchor box shape and more boxes are used for detection as we believe this is necessary for small object detection. An alternative backbone is used to compensate the heavy time cost introduced by dense anchor box regression. With use of the attention gate module, our model can achieve state-of-the-art polyp detection performance while still maintain real-time detection speed.
summary: We improved an existing end-to-end polyp detection model with better average precision validated by different data sets with trivial cost on detection speed. Our previous work on detecting polyps within colonoscopy provided an efficient end-to-end solution to alleviate doctor's examination overhead. However, our later experiments found this framework is not as robust as before as the condition of polyp capturing varies. In this work, we conducted several studies on data set, identifying main issues that causes low precision rate in the task of polyp detection. We used an optimized anchor generation methods to get better anchor box shape and more boxes are used for detection as we believe this is necessary for small object detection. An alternative backbone is used to compensate the heavy time cost introduced by dense anchor box regression. With use of the attention gate module, our model can achieve state-of-the-art polyp detection performance while still maintain real-time detection speed.
abstract_zh: 我们改进了现有的端到端息肉检测模型，通过不同的数据集验证了更好的平均精度，并且检测速度的成本微乎其微。我们之前在结肠镜检查中检测息肉的工作提供了一种有效的端到端解决方案，以减轻医生的检查开销。然而，我们后来的实验发现，由于息肉捕获的条件不同，这个框架不如以前那么强大。在这项工作中，我们对数据集进行了多项研究，找出了导致息肉检测任务准确率低的主要问题。我们使用优化的锚点生成方法来获得更好的锚点框形状，并使用更多的框进行检测，因为我们认为这对于小目标检测是必要的。使用替代骨干网来补偿密集锚框回归带来的大量时间成本。通过使用注意力门模块，我们的模型可以实现最先进的息肉检测性能，同时仍保持实时检测速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的结肠镜息肉检测模型，在保证实时检测速度的同时提升了检测精度。
AI.motivation: 先前的息肉检测框架在不同拍摄条件下鲁棒性不足，导致检测精度下降，需解决小目标检测和计算效率问题。
AI.method: 优化锚框生成方法以适配小目标检测，引入注意力门模块增强特征表达，并采用轻量级主干网络平衡精度与速度。
AI.result: 模型在多个数据集上达到最先进的检测性能，同时保持实时检测速度（帧率≥15fps）。
AI.conclusion: 通过锚框优化与网络结构改进，有效解决了息肉检测中的精度与效率矛盾，为临床应用提供了可靠方案。

authors_text: Karim Makki,Jean François Lecomte,Lukas Fuchs,Sylvie Schueller,Etienne Mémin
title: Level set based particle filter driven by optical flow: an application to track the salt boundary from X-ray CT time-series
title_zh: 由光流驱动的基于水平集的粒子滤波器：从 X 射线 CT 时间序列跟踪盐边界的应用程序
abstract: Image-based computational fluid dynamics have long played an important role in leveraging knowledge and understanding of several physical phenomena. In particular, probabilistic computational methods have opened the way to modelling the complex dynamics of systems in purely random turbulent motion. In the field of structural geology, a better understanding of the deformation and stress state both within the salt and the surrounding rocks is of great interest to characterize all kinds of subsurface long-terms energy-storage systems. The objective of this research is to determine the non-linear deformation of the salt boundary over time using a parallelized, stochastic filtering approach from x-ray computed tomography (CT) image time series depicting the evolution of salt structures triggered by gravity and under differential loading. This work represents a first step towards bringing together physical modeling and advanced stochastic image processing methods where model uncertainty is taken into account.
summary: Image-based computational fluid dynamics have long played an important role in leveraging knowledge and understanding of several physical phenomena. In particular, probabilistic computational methods have opened the way to modelling the complex dynamics of systems in purely random turbulent motion. In the field of structural geology, a better understanding of the deformation and stress state both within the salt and the surrounding rocks is of great interest to characterize all kinds of subsurface long-terms energy-storage systems. The objective of this research is to determine the non-linear deformation of the salt boundary over time using a parallelized, stochastic filtering approach from x-ray computed tomography (CT) image time series depicting the evolution of salt structures triggered by gravity and under differential loading. This work represents a first step towards bringing together physical modeling and advanced stochastic image processing methods where model uncertainty is taken into account.
abstract_zh: 基于图像的计算流体动力学长期以来在利用知识和理解多种物理现象方面发挥着重要作用。特别是，概率计算方法为模拟纯随机湍流运动中的系统复杂动力学开辟了道路。在构造地质学领域，更好地了解盐和围岩内的变形和应力状态对于表征各种地下长期储能系统具有重要意义。本研究的目的是使用并行随机滤波方法从 X 射线计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像时间序列中确定盐边界随时间的非线性变形，该图像时间序列描述了由重力和差动载荷触发的盐结构的演化。这项工作代表了将物理建模和先进的随机图像处理方法结合在一起的第一步，其中考虑了模型的不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于水平集的粒子滤波方法，结合光流技术，用于追踪X射线CT时间序列中盐边界的非线性变形。
AI.motivation: 结构地质学中需准确理解盐及周围岩石的变形与应力状态，以评估地下能源储存系统的长期稳定性，传统方法难以处理复杂动态过程的不确定性。
AI.method: 采用并行化随机滤波框架，整合水平集方法与光流驱动的粒子滤波器，从CT图像序列中估计盐边界随时间的非线性演化过程。
AI.result: 成功实现了对盐边界变形的动态追踪，验证了物理建模与随机图像处理方法结合的可行性，为后续不确定性量化分析奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次将物理模型与先进随机处理技术结合，有效表征盐结构演化，未来可扩展至更复杂的地质力学问题研究。

search_text: Level set based particle filter driven by optical flow: an application to track the salt boundary from X-ray CT time-series 由光流驱动的基于水平集的粒子滤波器：从 X 射线 CT 时间序列跟踪盐边界的应用程序 Image-based computational fluid dynamics have long played an important role in leveraging knowledge and understanding of several physical phenomena. In particular, probabilistic computational methods have opened the way to modelling the complex dynamics of systems in purely random turbulent motion. In the field of structural geology, a better understanding of the deformation and stress state both within the salt and the surrounding rocks is of great interest to characterize all kinds of subsurface long-terms energy-storage systems. The objective of this research is to determine the non-linear deformation of the salt boundary over time using a parallelized, stochastic filtering approach from x-ray computed tomography (CT) image time series depicting the evolution of salt structures triggered by gravity and under differential loading. This work represents a first step towards bringing together physical modeling and advanced stochastic image processing methods where model uncertainty is taken into account. 基于图像的计算流体动力学长期以来在利用知识和理解多种物理现象方面发挥着重要作用。特别是，概率计算方法为模拟纯随机湍流运动中的系统复杂动力学开辟了道路。在构造地质学领域，更好地了解盐和围岩内的变形和应力状态对于表征各种地下长期储能系统具有重要意义。本研究的目的是使用并行随机滤波方法从 X 射线计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像时间序列中确定盐边界随时间的非线性变形，该图像时间序列描述了由重力和差动载荷触发的盐结构的演化。这项工作代表了将物理建模和先进的随机图像处理方法结合在一起的第一步，其中考虑了模型的不确定性。 本文提出一种基于水平集的粒子滤波方法，结合光流技术，用于追踪X射线CT时间序列中盐边界的非线性变形。 Karim Makki,Jean François Lecomte,Lukas Fuchs,Sylvie Schueller,Etienne Mémin cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yi Nian,Xinyue Hu,Rui Zhang,Jingna Feng,Jingcheng Du,Fang Li,Yong Chen,Cui Tao
title: Mining On Alzheimer's Diseases Related Knowledge Graph to Identity Potential AD-related Semantic Triples for Drug Repurposing
title_zh: 挖掘阿尔茨海默病相关知识图谱，识别潜在的 AD 相关语义三元组，用于药物再利用
abstract: To date, there are no effective treatments for most neurodegenerative diseases. Knowledge graphs can provide comprehensive and semantic representation for heterogeneous data, and have been successfully leveraged in many biomedical applications including drug repurposing. Our objective is to construct a knowledge graph from literature to study relations between Alzheimer's disease (AD) and chemicals, drugs and dietary supplements in order to identify opportunities to prevent or delay neurodegenerative progression. We collected biomedical annotations and extracted their relations using SemRep via SemMedDB. We used both a BERT-based classifier and rule-based methods during data preprocessing to exclude noise while preserving most AD-related semantic triples. The 1,672,110 filtered triples were used to train with knowledge graph completion algorithms (i.e., TransE, DistMult, and ComplEx) to predict candidates that might be helpful for AD treatment or prevention. Among three knowledge graph completion models, TransE outperformed the other two (MR = 13.45, Hits@1 = 0.306). We leveraged the time-slicing technique to further evaluate the prediction results. We found supporting evidence for most highly ranked candidates predicted by our model which indicates that our approach can inform reliable new knowledge. This paper shows that our graph mining model can predict reliable new relationships between AD and other entities (i.e., dietary supplements, chemicals, and drugs). The knowledge graph constructed can facilitate data-driven knowledge discoveries and the generation of novel hypotheses.

Knowledge graphs can provide comprehensive and semantic representation for heterogeneous data, and have been successfully leveraged in many biomedical applications including drug repurposing. Among three knowledge graph completion models, TransE outperformed the other two (MR = 13.45, Hits@1 = 0.306). We leveraged the time-slicing technique to further evaluate the prediction results. We found supporting evidence for most highly ranked candidates predicted by our model which indicates that our approach can inform reliable new knowledge. This paper shows that our graph mining model can predict reliable new relationships between AD and other entities (i.e., dietary supplements, chemicals, and drugs). abstract_zh: 迄今为止，大多数神经退行性疾病还没有有效的治疗方法。知识图可以为异构数据提供全面的语义表示，并已成功应用于包括药物再利用在内的许多生物医学应用。我们的目标是根据文献构建一个知识图谱，以研究阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 与化学品、药物和膳食补充剂之间的关系，以确定预防或延缓神经退行性进展的机会。我们收集生物医学注释并通过 SemMedDB 使用 SemRep 提取它们的关系。我们在数据预处理过程中使用了基于 BERT 的分类器和基于规则的方法来排除噪声，同时保留大多数与 AD 相关的语义三元组。 1,672,110 个过滤后的三元组用于通过知识图补全算法（即 TransE、DistMult 和 ComplEx）进行训练，以预测可能有助于 AD 治疗或预防的候选者。在三个知识图谱补全模型中，TransE 优于其他两个模型（MR = 13.45，Hits@1 = 0.306）。我们利用时间切片技术来进一步评估预测结果。我们发现了我们的模型预测的大多数排名靠前的候选人的支持证据，这表明我们的方法可以提供可靠的新知识。本文表明，我们的图挖掘模型可以预测 AD 和其他实体（即膳食补充剂、化学品和药物）之间可靠的新关系。构建的知识图可以促进数据驱动的知识发现和新假设的生成。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过构建阿尔茨海默病（AD）相关知识图谱，挖掘潜在的语义三元组以用于药物再利用研究。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏有效治疗神经退行性疾病的方法，知识图谱可整合异构数据并辅助药物再利用，因此需构建AD相关知识图谱以发现潜在治疗靶点。
AI.method: 通过SemRep和SemMedDB提取生物医学实体关系，结合BERT分类器与规则方法过滤噪声，利用TransE、DistMult和ComplEx等知识图谱补全算法预测AD相关候选药物，并采用时间切片技术验证结果。
AI.result: 筛选出167万条语义三元组，TransE模型表现最优（MR=13.45，Hits@1=0.306），验证显示模型预测的高排名候选物具有可靠依据。
AI.conclusion: 该知识图谱挖掘方法可有效预测AD与药物、化学物质等的新关联，为数据驱动的疾病研究和假设生成提供支持。

authors_text: Eric Angel,Sébastien Morais,Damien Regnault
title: A Bi-Criteria FPTAS for Scheduling with Memory Constraints on Graph with Bounded Tree-width
title_zh: 树宽有界图内存约束双准则 FPTAS 调度
abstract: In this paper we study a scheduling problem arising from executing numerical simulations on HPC architectures. With a constant number of parallel machines, the objective is to minimize the makespan under memory constraints for the machines. Those constraints come from a neighborhood graph G for the jobs. Motivated by a previous result on graphs G with bounded path-width, our focus is on the case when the neighborhood graph G has bounded tree-width. Our result is a bi-criteria fully polynomial time approximation algorithm based on a dynamic programming algorithm. It allows to find a solution within a factor of 1 + epsilon of the optimal makespan, where the memory capacity of the machines may be exceeded by a factor at most 1 + epsilon. This result relies on the use of a nice tree decomposition of G and its traversal in a specific way which may be useful on its own. The case of unrelated machines is also tractable with minor modifications.
summary: In this paper we study a scheduling problem arising from executing numerical simulations on HPC architectures. With a constant number of parallel machines, the objective is to minimize the makespan under memory constraints for the machines. Those constraints come from a neighborhood graph G for the jobs. Motivated by a previous result on graphs G with bounded path-width, our focus is on the case when the neighborhood graph G has bounded tree-width. Our result is a bi-criteria fully polynomial time approximation algorithm based on a dynamic programming algorithm. It allows to find a solution within a factor of 1 + epsilon of the optimal makespan, where the memory capacity of the machines may be exceeded by a factor at most 1 + epsilon. This result relies on the use of a nice tree decomposition of G and its traversal in a specific way which may be useful on its own. The case of unrelated machines is also tractable with minor modifications.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了在 HPC 架构上执行数值模拟时出现的调度问题。对于恒定数量的并行机器，目标是在机器的内存限制下最小化完工时间。这些约束来自工作的邻域图 G。受先前关于具有有界路径宽度的图 G 的结果的启发，我们的重点是当邻域图 G 具有有界树宽度时的情况。我们的结果是基于动态规划算法的双标准完全多项式时间近似算法。它允许在最佳完工时间的 1 + epsilon 因子内找到解决方案，其中机器的内存容量最多可能超出 1 + epsilon 因子。这个结果依赖于 G 的良好树分解的使用及其以特定方式的遍历，这本身可能是有用的。不相关机器的情况也可以通过较小的修改来处理。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在具有有界树宽的邻接图上，考虑内存约束的调度问题，提出了一种双标准完全多项式时间近似算法（FPTAS）。
AI.motivation: 受之前针对路径宽有界图结果的启发，本文将研究范围扩展到树宽有界图，以解决实际HPC架构中数值模拟的调度需求。
AI.method: 基于动态规划算法，结合图的nice tree decomposition分解及特定遍历方式，设计双标准FPTAS以平衡makespan与内存约束。
AI.result: 提出算法可在1+ε范围内逼近最优makespan，同时允许内存容量最多超出1+ε倍，且方法适用于非相关机器场景。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了树宽有界图的内存约束调度问题，其分解与遍历方法具有独立应用价值，并可扩展至非相关机器情形。

search_text: A Bi-Criteria FPTAS for Scheduling with Memory Constraints on Graph with Bounded Tree-width 树宽有界图内存约束双准则 FPTAS 调度 In this paper we study a scheduling problem arising from executing numerical simulations on HPC architectures. With a constant number of parallel machines, the objective is to minimize the makespan under memory constraints for the machines. Those constraints come from a neighborhood graph G for the jobs. Motivated by a previous result on graphs G with bounded path-width, our focus is on the case when the neighborhood graph G has bounded tree-width. Our result is a bi-criteria fully polynomial time approximation algorithm based on a dynamic programming algorithm. It allows to find a solution within a factor of 1 + epsilon of the optimal makespan, where the memory capacity of the machines may be exceeded by a factor at most 1 + epsilon. This result relies on the use of a nice tree decomposition of G and its traversal in a specific way which may be useful on its own. The case of unrelated machines is also tractable with minor modifications. 在本文中，我们研究了在 HPC 架构上执行数值模拟时出现的调度问题。对于恒定数量的并行机器，目标是在机器的内存限制下最小化完工时间。这些约束来自工作的邻域图 G。受先前关于具有有界路径宽度的图 G 的结果的启发，我们的重点是当邻域图 G 具有有界树宽度时的情况。我们的结果是基于动态规划算法的双标准完全多项式时间近似算法。它允许在最佳完工时间的 1 + epsilon 因子内找到解决方案，其中机器的内存容量最多可能超出 1 + epsilon 因子。这个结果依赖于 G 的良好树分解的使用及其以特定方式的遍历，这本身可能是有用的。不相关机器的情况也可以通过较小的修改来处理。 本文研究在具有有界树宽的邻接图上，考虑内存约束的调度问题，提出了一种双标准完全多项式时间近似算法（FPTAS）。 Eric Angel,Sébastien Morais,Damien Regnault cs.DS,cs.DC

authors_text: Eloi Moliner,Vesa Välimäki
title: A Two-Stage U-Net for High-Fidelity Denoising of Historical Recordings
title_zh: 用于历史记录高保真去噪的两级 U-Net
abstract: Enhancing the sound quality of historical music recordings is a long-standing problem. This paper presents a novel denoising method based on a fully-convolutional deep neural network. A two-stage U-Net model architecture is designed to model and suppress the degradations with high fidelity. The method processes the time-frequency representation of audio, and is trained using realistic noisy data to jointly remove hiss, clicks, thumps, and other common additive disturbances from old analog discs. The proposed model outperforms previous methods in both objective and subjective metrics. The results of a formal blind listening test show that real gramophone recordings denoised with this method have significantly better quality than the baseline methods. This study shows the importance of realistic training data and the power of deep learning in audio restoration.
summary: Enhancing the sound quality of historical music recordings is a long-standing problem. This paper presents a novel denoising method based on a fully-convolutional deep neural network. A two-stage U-Net model architecture is designed to model and suppress the degradations with high fidelity. The method processes the time-frequency representation of audio, and is trained using realistic noisy data to jointly remove hiss, clicks, thumps, and other common additive disturbances from old analog discs. The proposed model outperforms previous methods in both objective and subjective metrics. The results of a formal blind listening test show that real gramophone recordings denoised with this method have significantly better quality than the baseline methods. This study shows the importance of realistic training data and the power of deep learning in audio restoration.
abstract_zh: 提高历史音乐录音的音质是一个长期存在的问题。本文提出了一种基于全卷积深度神经网络的新颖去噪方法。两阶段 U-Net 模型架构旨在以高保真度建模和抑制性能退化。该方法处理音频的时频表示，并使用真实的噪声数据进行训练，以联合消除旧模拟光盘中的嘶嘶声、咔嗒声、重击声和其他常见的附加干扰。所提出的模型在客观和主观指标上都优于以前的方法。正式盲听测试的结果表明，用这种方法去噪的真实留声机录音的质量明显优于基线方法。这项研究展示了真实训练数据的重要性以及深度学习在音频恢复中的力量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双阶段U-Net的深度学习方法，用于高保真去除历史录音中的噪声。
AI.motivation: 历史录音常因老化和保存问题存在杂音，传统方法难以有效恢复音质，需更先进的降噪技术。
AI.method: 设计双阶段U-Net模型，处理音频的时频表示，利用真实噪声数据训练，联合去除嘶声、点击声等干扰。
AI.result: 在客观指标和主观盲听测试中均优于现有方法，显著提升留声机录音的音质。
AI.conclusion: 真实训练数据与深度学习结合能有效推动音频修复技术的发展。

authors_text: Robin Chan,Svenja Uhlemeyer,Matthias Rottmann,Hanno Gottschalk
title: Detecting and Learning the Unknown in Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 检测和学习语义分割中的未知事物
comment: 37 pages, 7 figures, chapter in Deep Neural Networks and Data for Automated Driving
comments: 37 pages, 7 figures, chapter in Deep Neural Networks and Data for Automated Driving
abstract: Semantic segmentation is a crucial component for perception in automated driving. Deep neural networks (DNNs) are commonly used for this task and they are usually trained on a closed set of object classes appearing in a closed operational domain. However, this is in contrast to the open world assumption in automated driving that DNNs are deployed to. Therefore, DNNs necessarily face data that they have never encountered previously, also known as anomalies, which are extremely safety-critical to properly cope with. In this work, we first give an overview about anomalies from an information-theoretic perspective. Next, we review research in detecting semantically unknown objects in semantic segmentation. We demonstrate that training for high entropy responses on anomalous objects outperforms other recent methods, which is in line with our theoretical findings. Moreover, we examine a method to assess the occurrence frequency of anomalies in order to select anomaly types to include into a model's set of semantic categories. We demonstrate that these anomalies can then be learned in an unsupervised fashion, which is particularly suitable in online applications based on deep learning.
summary: Semantic segmentation is a crucial component for perception in automated driving. Deep neural networks (DNNs) are commonly used for this task and they are usually trained on a closed set of object classes appearing in a closed operational domain. However, this is in contrast to the open world assumption in automated driving that DNNs are deployed to. Therefore, DNNs necessarily face data that they have never encountered previously, also known as anomalies, which are extremely safety-critical to properly cope with. In this work, we first give an overview about anomalies from an information-theoretic perspective. Next, we review research in detecting semantically unknown objects in semantic segmentation. We demonstrate that training for high entropy responses on anomalous objects outperforms other recent methods, which is in line with our theoretical findings. Moreover, we examine a method to assess the occurrence frequency of anomalies in order to select anomaly types to include into a model's set of semantic categories. We demonstrate that these anomalies can then be learned in an unsupervised fashion, which is particularly suitable in online applications based on deep learning.
abstract_zh: 语义分割是自动驾驶感知的重要组成部分。深度神经网络 (DNN) 通常用于此任务，并且通常在封闭操作域中出现的一组封闭对象类上进行训练。然而，这与部署 DNN 的自动驾驶中的开放世界假设相反。因此，DNN 必然要面对以前从未遇到过的数据，也称为异常，正确处理这些数据对于安全至关重要。在这项工作中，我们首先从信息论的角度概述异常。接下来，我们回顾在语义分割中检测语义未知对象的研究。我们证明，对异常物体的高熵响应训练优于其他最近的方法，这与我们的理论发现一致。此外，我们研究了一种评估异常发生频率的方法，以便选择异常类型以包含到模型的语义类别集中。我们证明这些异常可以以无监督的方式学习，这特别适合基于深度学习的在线应用程序。

AI.tldr: 研究在语义分割中检测和学习未知异常的方法，以提高自动驾驶等开放环境下的安全性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中的DNN需要处理开放世界中的未知异常数据，而传统封闭训练方法无法有效应对，需提升模型对异常的检测与学习能力。
AI.method: 从信息论视角分析异常，通过高熵响应训练提升检测效果，并评估异常频率以选择性纳入模型类别，利用无监督学习处理未知异常。
AI.result: 实验表明，高熵响应训练方法在检测未知异常上优于现有方法，且能通过无监督学习有效纳入新异常类别。
AI.conclusion: 在开放世界场景下，模型需具备检测和学习未知异常的能力，所提方法通过高熵训练和无监督学习有效应对，提升系统安全性。
