authors_text: Rémi Kazmierczak,Gianni Franchi,Nacim Belkhir,Antoine Manzanera,David Filliat
title: A study of deep perceptual metrics for image quality assessment
title_zh: 图像质量评估的深层感知指标研究
abstract: Several metrics exist to quantify the similarity between images, but they are inefficient when it comes to measure the similarity of highly distorted images. In this work, we propose to empirically investigate perceptual metrics based on deep neural networks for tackling the Image Quality Assessment (IQA) task. We study deep perceptual metrics according to different hyperparameters like the network's architecture or training procedure. Finally, we propose our multi-resolution perceptual metric (MR-Perceptual), that allows us to aggregate perceptual information at different resolutions and outperforms standard perceptual metrics on IQA tasks with varying image deformations. Our code is available at https://github.com/ENSTA-U2IS/MR_perceptual
summary: Several metrics exist to quantify the similarity between images, but they are inefficient when it comes to measure the similarity of highly distorted images. In this work, we propose to empirically investigate perceptual metrics based on deep neural networks for tackling the Image Quality Assessment (IQA) task. We study deep perceptual metrics according to different hyperparameters like the network's architecture or training procedure. Finally, we propose our multi-resolution perceptual metric (MR-Perceptual), that allows us to aggregate perceptual information at different resolutions and outperforms standard perceptual metrics on IQA tasks with varying image deformations. Our code is available at https://github.com/ENSTA-U2IS/MR_perceptual
abstract_zh: 存在多种度量来量化图像之间的相似性，但在测量高度扭曲图像的相似性时，它们的效率很低。在这项工作中，我们建议对基于深度神经网络的感知指标进行实证研究，以解决图像质量评估（IQA）任务。我们根据不同的超参数（例如网络架构或训练过程）研究深层感知指标。最后，我们提出了多分辨率感知度量（MR-Perceptual），它允许我们聚合不同分辨率下的感知信息，并在具有不同图像变形的 IQA 任务上优于标准感知度量。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/ENSTA-U2IS/MR_perceptual

AI.conclusion: 多分辨率感知度量有效提升了IQA任务性能，为未来研究提供了新方向

search_text: A study of deep perceptual metrics for image quality assessment 图像质量评估的深层感知指标研究 Several metrics exist to quantify the similarity between images, but they are inefficient when it comes to measure the similarity of highly distorted images. In this work, we propose to empirically investigate perceptual metrics based on deep neural networks for tackling the Image Quality Assessment (IQA) task. We study deep perceptual metrics according to different hyperparameters like the network's architecture or training procedure. Finally, we propose our multi-resolution perceptual metric (MR-Perceptual), that allows us to aggregate perceptual information at different resolutions and outperforms standard perceptual metrics on IQA tasks with varying image deformations. Our code is available at https://github.com/ENSTA-U2IS/MR_perceptual 存在多种度量来量化图像之间的相似性，但在测量高度扭曲图像的相似性时，它们的效率很低。在这项工作中，我们建议对基于深度神经网络的感知指标进行实证研究，以解决图像质量评估（IQA）任务。我们根据不同的超参数（例如网络架构或训练过程）研究深层感知指标。最后，我们提出了多分辨率感知度量（MR-Perceptual），它允许我们聚合不同分辨率下的感知信息，并在具有不同图像变形的 IQA 任务上优于标准感知度量。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/ENSTA-U2IS/MR_perceptual 研究基于深度神经网络的感知度量方法以改进图像质量评估（IQA）任务 Rémi Kazmierczak,Gianni Franchi,Nacim Belkhir,Antoine Manzanera,David Filliat cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR

authors_text: Wanda Zhao,Alexandr Klimchik,Anatol Pashkevich,Damien Chablat
title: Non-linear stiffness behavior of planar serial robotic manipulators
title_zh: 平面串行机器人操纵器的非线性刚度行为
abstract: The paper focuses on the stiffness analysis of multi-link serial planar manipulators, which may demonstrate nonlinear stiffness behavior under the compressive loading. Two important cases are considered, where the manipulator has either a straight or non-straight initial configuration. It was proved that in the first case the loading may cause the buckling if it exceeds some critical value, and the manipulator suddenly changes its straight shape and stiffness properties. For computing this critical force, a general eigenvalue-based technique was proposed that can be applied to any multi-link serial manipulator. For the second case dealing with non-straight initial configurations, a universal energy-based technique was applied that allowed to detect quasi-buckling phenomenon when it is observed very fast but not instant change of the manipulator shape and its stiffness coefficient under the loading. These results are illustrated by numerous examples of non-linear stiffness behavior of three-and four-link manipulators that are subjected to compressive force.
summary: The paper focuses on the stiffness analysis of multi-link serial planar manipulators, which may demonstrate nonlinear stiffness behavior under the compressive loading. Two important cases are considered, where the manipulator has either a straight or non-straight initial configuration. It was proved that in the first case the loading may cause the buckling if it exceeds some critical value, and the manipulator suddenly changes its straight shape and stiffness properties. For computing this critical force, a general eigenvalue-based technique was proposed that can be applied to any multi-link serial manipulator. For the second case dealing with non-straight initial configurations, a universal energy-based technique was applied that allowed to detect quasi-buckling phenomenon when it is observed very fast but not instant change of the manipulator shape and its stiffness coefficient under the loading. These results are illustrated by numerous examples of non-linear stiffness behavior of three-and four-link manipulators that are subjected to compressive force.
abstract_zh: 本文重点研究多连杆串联平面机械臂的刚度分析，该分析可以展示压缩载荷下的非线性刚度行为。考虑两种重要的情况，其中操纵器具有直线或非直线初始配置。事实证明，在第一种情况下，如果载荷超过某个临界值，可能会导致屈曲，并且机械臂突然改变其直线形状和刚度特性。为了计算该临界力，提出了一种基于特征值的通用技术，该技术可应用于任何多链接串行机械手。对于处理非直线初始配置的第二种情况，应用了一种通用的基于能量的技术，当观察到机械臂形状及其在负载下的刚度系数非常快但不是即时变化时，可以检测准屈曲现象。这些结果通过受到压缩力的三连杆和四连杆机械手的非线性刚度行为的许多示例进行了说明。

AI.tldr: 研究平面串联机械臂在压缩载荷下的非线性刚度行为，分析其屈曲与准屈曲现象。
AI.motivation: 传统线性刚度分析无法准确描述机械臂在复杂载荷下的稳定性问题，需建立非线性模型以保障设计安全性。
AI.method: 针对直线初始配置采用特征值法计算临界屈曲力，非直线配置则通过能量法检测准屈曲现象。
AI.result: 通过三连杆与四连杆机械臂实例验证了两种方法的有效性，揭示了不同初始形态下的非线性刚度特性。
AI.conclusion: 提出通用分析方法可准确预测机械臂屈曲临界点及准屈曲行为，为高精度控制与结构优化提供理论依据。

authors_text: Durgesh Haribhau Salunkhe,Christoforos Spartalis,Jose Capco,Damien Chablat,Philippe Wenger
title: Necessary and sufficient condition for a generic 3R serial manipulator to be cuspidal
title_zh: 通用3R串行机械手成为尖头的充要条件
comment: ef:Mechanism and Machine Theory, Elsevier, 2022, 171, pp.104729
comments: ef:Mechanism and Machine Theory, Elsevier, 2022, 171, pp.104729
abstract: Cuspidal robots can travel from one inverse kinematic solution to another without meeting a singularity. The name cuspidal was coined based on the existence of a cusp point in the workspace of 3R serial robots. The existence of a cusp point was proved to be a necessary and sufficient condition for orthogonal robots to be cuspidal, but it was not possible to extend this condition to non-orthogonal robots. The goal of this paper is to prove that this condition stands for any generic 3R robot. This result would give the designer more flexibility. In the presented work, the geometrical interpretation of the inverse kinematics of 3R robots is revisited and important observations on the nonsingular change of posture are noted. The paper presents a theorem regarding the existence of reduced aspects in any generic 3R serial robot. Based on these observations and on this theorem, we prove that the existence of a cusp point is a necessary and sufficient condition for any 3R generic robot to be cuspidal.
summary: Cuspidal robots can travel from one inverse kinematic solution to another without meeting a singularity. The name cuspidal was coined based on the existence of a cusp point in the workspace of 3R serial robots. The existence of a cusp point was proved to be a necessary and sufficient condition for orthogonal robots to be cuspidal, but it was not possible to extend this condition to non-orthogonal robots. The goal of this paper is to prove that this condition stands for any generic 3R robot. This result would give the designer more flexibility. In the presented work, the geometrical interpretation of the inverse kinematics of 3R robots is revisited and important observations on the nonsingular change of posture are noted. The paper presents a theorem regarding the existence of reduced aspects in any generic 3R serial robot. Based on these observations and on this theorem, we prove that the existence of a cusp point is a necessary and sufficient condition for any 3R generic robot to be cuspidal.
abstract_zh: 尖瓣机器人可以从一种逆运动学解移动到另一种，而不会遇到奇点。 cuspidal 这个名字是根据 3R 系列机器人工作空间中存在的尖点而创造的。尖点的​​存在被证明是正交机器人成为尖点的充分必要条件，但无法将此条件推广到非正交机器人。本文的目的是证明这个条件适用于任何通用 3R 机器人。这个结果将为设计者提供更大的灵活性。在所提出的工作中，重新审视了 3R 机器人逆运动学的几何解释，并注意到了对非奇异姿态变化的重要观察。该论文提出了一个关于任何通用 3R 串行机器人中存在简化方面的定理。基于这些观察和这个定理，我们证明尖点的存在是任何3R通用机器人成为尖点的充分必要条件。

AI.tldr: 证明存在尖点是任何通用3R串联机械臂成为尖点的充要条件
AI.motivation: 为非正交3R机器人提供更通用的充要条件，增加设计灵活性
AI.method: 通过几何解释逆运动学和姿态变化的观察，结合减少方面的定理进行证明
AI.result: 证明存在尖点是任何通用3R串联机械臂成为尖点的充要条件
AI.conclusion: 为设计通用3R串联机械臂提供了更灵活的条件

authors_text: Huaqian Wu,Nicolas Souedet,Caroline Jan,Cédric Clouchoux,Thierry Delzescaux
title: A General Deep Learning framework for Neuron Instance Segmentation based on Efficient UNet and Morphological Post-processing
title_zh: 基于高效 UNet 和形态后处理的神经元实例分割通用深度学习框架
abstract: Recent studies have demonstrated the superiority of deep learning in medical image analysis, especially in cell instance segmentation, a fundamental step for many biological studies. However, the excellent performance of the neural networks requires training on large, unbiased dataset and annotations, which is labor-intensive and expertise-demanding. This paper presents an end-to-end framework to automatically detect and segment NeuN stained neuronal cells on histological images using only point annotations. Unlike traditional nuclei segmentation with point annotation, we propose using point annotation and binary segmentation to synthesize pixel-level annotations. The synthetic masks are used as the ground truth to train the neural network, a U-Net-like architecture with a state-of-the-art network, EfficientNet, as the encoder. Validation results show the superiority of our model compared to other recent methods. In addition, we investigated multiple post-processing schemes and proposed an original strategy to convert the probability map into segmented instances using ultimate erosion and dynamic reconstruction. This approach is easy to configure and outperforms other classical post-processing techniques. This work aims to develop a robust and efficient framework for analyzing neurons using optical microscopic data, which can be used in preclinical biological studies and, more specifically, in the context of neurodegenerative diseases.
summary: Recent studies have demonstrated the superiority of deep learning in medical image analysis, especially in cell instance segmentation, a fundamental step for many biological studies. However, the excellent performance of the neural networks requires training on large, unbiased dataset and annotations, which is labor-intensive and expertise-demanding. Unlike traditional nuclei segmentation with point annotation, we propose using point annotation and binary segmentation to synthesize pixel-level annotations. The synthetic masks are used as the ground truth to train the neural network, a U-Net-like architecture with a state-of-the-art network, EfficientNet, as the encoder. Validation results show the superiority of our model compared to other recent methods. In addition, we investigated multiple post-processing schemes and proposed an original strategy to convert the probability map into segmented instances using ultimate erosion and dynamic reconstruction. This approach is easy to configure and outperforms other classical post-processing techniques. This work aims to develop a robust and efficient framework for analyzing neurons using optical microscopic data, which can be used in preclinical biological studies and, more specifically, in the context of neurodegenerative diseases.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究证明了深度学习在医学图像分析中的优越性，特别是在细胞实例分割方面，这是许多生物学研究的基本步骤。然而，神经网络的优异性能需要对大型、无偏差的数据集和注释进行训练，这是劳动密集型且需要专业知识的。本文提出了一种端到端框架，仅使用点注释即可自动检测和分割组织学图像上 NeuN 染色的神经元细胞。与传统的点注释核分割不同，我们建议使用点注释和二元分割来合成像素级注释。合成掩码用作训练神经网络的基本事实，神经网络是一种类似 U-Net 的架构，并以最先进的网络 EfficientNet 作为编码器。验证结果表明，与其他最新方法相比，我们的模型具有优越性。此外，我们研究了多种后处理方案，并提出了一种原始策略，使用终极侵蚀和动态重建将概率图转换为分段实例。这种方法易于配置，并且优于其他经典的后处理技术。这项工作旨在开发一个强大而有效的框架，用于使用光学显微数据分析神经元，该框架可用于临床前生物学研究，更具体地说，可用于神经退行性疾病的背景下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Efficient UNet和形态学后处理的深度学习框架，用于神经元实例分割。
AI.motivation: 传统神经元分割依赖大量人工标注数据，耗时且成本高，需开发无需完整标注的高效方法。
AI.method: 利用点标注与二值分割合成像素级标注训练EfficientNet编码器的U-Net网络，并采用终极腐蚀与动态重建的形态学后处理策略。
AI.result: 模型性能优于现有方法，合成标注策略与形态学后处理均显著提升分割精度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为神经元分析提供高效解决方案，适用于神经退行性疾病的临床前研究。

search_text: A General Deep Learning framework for Neuron Instance Segmentation based on Efficient UNet and Morphological Post-processing 基于高效 UNet 和形态后处理的神经元实例分割通用深度学习框架 Recent studies have demonstrated the superiority of deep learning in medical image analysis, especially in cell instance segmentation, a fundamental step for many biological studies. However, the excellent performance of the neural networks requires training on large, unbiased dataset and annotations, which is labor-intensive and expertise-demanding. This paper presents an end-to-end framework to automatically detect and segment NeuN stained neuronal cells on histological images using only point annotations. Unlike traditional nuclei segmentation with point annotation, we propose using point annotation and binary segmentation to synthesize pixel-level annotations. The synthetic masks are used as the ground truth to train the neural network, a U-Net-like architecture with a state-of-the-art network, EfficientNet, as the encoder. Validation results show the superiority of our model compared to other recent methods. In addition, we investigated multiple post-processing schemes and proposed an original strategy to convert the probability map into segmented instances using ultimate erosion and dynamic reconstruction. This approach is easy to configure and outperforms other classical post-processing techniques. This work aims to develop a robust and efficient framework for analyzing neurons using optical microscopic data, which can be used in preclinical biological studies and, more specifically, in the context of neurodegenerative diseases. 最近的研究证明了深度学习在医学图像分析中的优越性，特别是在细胞实例分割方面，这是许多生物学研究的基本步骤。然而，神经网络的优异性能需要对大型、无偏差的数据集和注释进行训练，这是劳动密集型且需要专业知识的。本文提出了一种端到端框架，仅使用点注释即可自动检测和分割组织学图像上 NeuN 染色的神经元细胞。与传统的点注释核分割不同，我们建议使用点注释和二元分割来合成像素级注释。合成掩码用作训练神经网络的基本事实，神经网络是一种类似 U-Net 的架构，并以最先进的网络 EfficientNet 作为编码器。验证结果表明，与其他最新方法相比，我们的模型具有优越性。此外，我们研究了多种后处理方案，并提出了一种原始策略，使用终极侵蚀和动态重建将概率图转换为分段实例。这种方法易于配置，并且优于其他经典的后处理技术。这项工作旨在开发一个强大而有效的框架，用于使用光学显微数据分析神经元，该框架可用于临床前生物学研究，更具体地说，可用于神经退行性疾病的背景下。 本文提出一种基于Efficient UNet和形态学后处理的深度学习框架，用于神经元实例分割。 Huaqian Wu,Nicolas Souedet,Caroline Jan,Cédric Clouchoux,Thierry Delzescaux eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Enric Moreu,Kevin McGuinness,Noel E. O'Connor
title: Synthetic data for unsupervised polyp segmentation
title_zh: 无监督息肉分割的合成数据
abstract: Deep learning has shown excellent performance in analysing medical images. However, datasets are difficult to obtain due privacy issues, standardization problems, and lack of annotations. We address these problems by producing realistic synthetic images using a combination of 3D technologies and generative adversarial networks. We use zero annotations from medical professionals in our pipeline. Our fully unsupervised method achieves promising results on five real polyp segmentation datasets. As a part of this study we release Synth-Colon, an entirely synthetic dataset that includes 20000 realistic colon images and additional details about depth and 3D geometry: https://enric1994.github.io/synth-colon
summary: Deep learning has shown excellent performance in analysing medical images. However, datasets are difficult to obtain due privacy issues, standardization problems, and lack of annotations. We address these problems by producing realistic synthetic images using a combination of 3D technologies and generative adversarial networks. We use zero annotations from medical professionals in our pipeline. Our fully unsupervised method achieves promising results on five real polyp segmentation datasets. As a part of this study we release Synth-Colon, an entirely synthetic dataset that includes 20000 realistic colon images and additional details about depth and 3D geometry: https://enric1994.github.io/synth-colon
abstract_zh: 深度学习在分析医学图像方面表现出了出色的性能。然而，由于隐私问题、标准化问题和缺乏注释，数据集很难获得。我们通过结合 3D 技术和生成对抗网络生成逼真的合成图像来解决这些问题。我们在管道中使用医疗专业人员的零注释。我们完全无监督的方法在五个真实的息肉分割数据集上取得了有希望的结果。作为本研究的一部分，我们发布了 Synth-Colon，这是一个完全合成的数据集，其中包括 20000 个真实的结肠图像以及有关深度和 3D 几何形状的其他详细信息：https://enric1994.github.io/synth-colon

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用合成数据进行无监督息肉分割的方法，以解决医学图像分析中数据获取困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 由于隐私问题、标准化困难及标注不足，医学图像数据集难以获取，限制了深度学习的应用，因此需要生成合成数据来克服这些挑战。
AI.method: 结合3D建模与生成对抗网络（GANs）生成逼真合成图像，无需医学专家标注，采用全无监督学习方法进行息肉分割。
AI.result: 该方法在五个真实息肉分割数据集上取得良好效果，并发布了包含20000张合成结肠图像及3D几何信息的Synth-Colon数据集。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了合成数据在无监督医学图像分割中的有效性，为解决数据获取难题提供了新途径，并推动了相关领域的研究进展。

authors_text: Rory W Spanton,Olivia Guest
title: Measuring Trustworthiness or Automating Physiognomy? A Comment on Safra, Chevallier, Grèzes, and Baumard (2020)
title_zh: 衡量可信度还是自动化面相？对 Safra、Chevallier、Grèzes 和 Baumard 的评论 (2020)
abstract: Interpersonal trust - a shared display of confidence and vulnerability toward other individuals - can be seen as instrumental in the development of human societies. Safra, Chevallier, Grèzes, and Baumard (2020) studied the historical progression of interpersonal trust by training a machine learning (ML) algorithm to generate trustworthiness ratings of historical portraits, based on facial features. They reported that trustworthiness ratings of portraits dated between 1500--2000CE increased with time, claiming that this evidenced a broader increase in interpersonal trust coinciding with several metrics of societal progress. We argue that these claims are confounded by several methodological and analytical issues and highlight troubling parallels between Safra et al.'s algorithm and the pseudoscience of physiognomy. We discuss the implications and potential real-world consequences of these issues in further detail.
summary: Interpersonal trust - a shared display of confidence and vulnerability toward other individuals - can be seen as instrumental in the development of human societies. Safra, Chevallier, Grèzes, and Baumard (2020) studied the historical progression of interpersonal trust by training a machine learning (ML) algorithm to generate trustworthiness ratings of historical portraits, based on facial features. They reported that trustworthiness ratings of portraits dated between 1500--2000CE increased with time, claiming that this evidenced a broader increase in interpersonal trust coinciding with several metrics of societal progress. We argue that these claims are confounded by several methodological and analytical issues and highlight troubling parallels between Safra et al.'s algorithm and the pseudoscience of physiognomy. We discuss the implications and potential real-world consequences of these issues in further detail.
abstract_zh: 人际信任——对他人共同表现出的信心和脆弱性——可以被视为对人类社会发展的重要作用。 Safra、Chevallier、Grèzes 和 Baumard（2020）通过训练机器学习 (ML) 算法根据面部特征生成历史肖像的可信度评级，研究了人际信任的历史进程。他们报告说，公元 1500--2000 年之间肖像的可信度随着时间的推移而增加，声称这证明了人际信任的更广泛增加，与社会进步的几个指标相一致。我们认为，这些主张被几个方法论和分析问题所混淆，并强调了 Safra 等人的算法与面相伪科学之间令人不安的相似之处。我们更详细地讨论这些问题的影响和潜在的现实世界后果。

AI.tldr: 评论并批评Safra等人使用机器学习分析历史肖像以测量人际信任的研究，指出其方法论问题并类比于相面术。
AI.motivation: 质疑Safra等人结论的可靠性，指出其方法可能存在的偏见和科学性问题，并探讨潜在的社会影响。
AI.method: 分析Safra等人的机器学习模型和数据分析方法，指出其局限性和与相面术的相似之处。
AI.result: 发现Safra等人的结论受方法论问题影响，模型存在与相面术相似的伪科学风险。
AI.conclusion: 认为使用机器学习自动评估可信度存在科学缺陷，可能误导社会对人际信任的理解。

authors_text: Enric Moreu,Kevin McGuinness,Diego Ortego,Noel E. O'Connor
title: Domain Randomization for Object Counting
title_zh: 对象计数的域随机化
abstract: Recently, the use of synthetic datasets based on game engines has been shown to improve the performance of several tasks in computer vision. However, these datasets are typically only appropriate for the specific domains depicted in computer games, such as urban scenes involving vehicles and people. In this paper, we present an approach to generate synthetic datasets for object counting for any domain without the need for photo-realistic techniques manually generated by expensive teams of 3D artists. We introduce a domain randomization approach for object counting based on synthetic datasets that are quick and inexpensive to generate. We deliberately avoid photorealism and drastically increase the variability of the dataset, producing images with random textures and 3D transformations, which improves generalization. Experiments show that our method facilitates good performance on various real word object counting datasets for multiple domains: people, vehicles, penguins, and fruit. The source code is available at: https://github.com/enric1994/dr4oc
summary: Recently, the use of synthetic datasets based on game engines has been shown to improve the performance of several tasks in computer vision. However, these datasets are typically only appropriate for the specific domains depicted in computer games, such as urban scenes involving vehicles and people. In this paper, we present an approach to generate synthetic datasets for object counting for any domain without the need for photo-realistic techniques manually generated by expensive teams of 3D artists. We introduce a domain randomization approach for object counting based on synthetic datasets that are quick and inexpensive to generate. We deliberately avoid photorealism and drastically increase the variability of the dataset, producing images with random textures and 3D transformations, which improves generalization. Experiments show that our method facilitates good performance on various real word object counting datasets for multiple domains: people, vehicles, penguins, and fruit. The source code is available at: https://github.com/enric1994/dr4oc
abstract_zh: 最近，基于游戏引擎的合成数据集的使用已被证明可以提高计算机视觉中多项任务的性能。然而，这些数据集通常仅适用于计算机游戏中描绘的特定领域，例如涉及车辆和人员的城市场景。在本文中，我们提出了一种为任何领域的对象计数生成合成数据集的方法，而不需要由昂贵的 3D 艺术家团队手动生成的逼真技术。我们引入了一种基于合成数据集的对象计数领域随机化方法，该方法生成速度快且成本低廉。我们刻意避免照片写实主义并大幅增加数据集的可变性，生成具有随机纹理和 3D 变换的图像，从而提高泛化能力。实验表明，我们的方法有助于在多个领域的各种真实物体计数数据集上取得良好的性能：人、车辆、企鹅和水果。源代码位于：https://github.com/enric1994/dr4oc

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需依赖逼真渲染的领域随机化方法，用于生成适用于多种场景的合成数据集以提升目标计数任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于游戏引擎的合成数据集通常局限于特定领域（如城市场景），且依赖昂贵的3D艺术家手动生成逼真图像，限制了其通用性。
AI.method: 通过引入领域随机化技术，生成包含随机纹理和3D变换的合成图像，刻意避免逼真渲染以显著增加数据集多样性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个真实世界目标计数数据集（人群、车辆、企鹅、水果等）上均取得良好性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需依赖高成本的逼真渲染技术，即可通过领域随机化有效提升目标计数模型的跨领域泛化能力。

authors_text: Emmanuel Abbe,Enric Boix-Adsera,Theodor Misiakiewicz
title: The merged-staircase property: a necessary and nearly sufficient condition for SGD learning of sparse functions on two-layer neural networks
title_zh: 合并阶梯性质：两层神经网络稀疏函数SGD学习的必要且近充分条件
abstract: It is currently known how to characterize functions that neural networks can learn with SGD for two extremal parameterizations: neural networks in the linear regime, and neural networks with no structural constraints. However, for the main parametrization of interest (non-linear but regular networks) no tight characterization has yet been achieved, despite significant developments. We take a step in this direction by considering depth-2 neural networks trained by SGD in the mean-field regime. We consider functions on binary inputs that depend on a latent low-dimensional subspace (i.e., small number of coordinates). This regime is of interest since it is poorly understood how neural networks routinely tackle high-dimensional datasets and adapt to latent low-dimensional structure without suffering from the curse of dimensionality. Accordingly, we study SGD-learnability with $O(d)$ sample complexity in a large ambient dimension $d$. Our main results characterize a hierarchical property, the "merged-staircase property", that is both necessary and nearly sufficient for learning in this setting. We further show that non-linear training is necessary: for this class of functions, linear methods on any feature map (e.g., the NTK) are not capable of learning efficiently. The key tools are a new "dimension-free" dynamics approximation result that applies to functions defined on a latent space of low-dimension, a proof of global convergence based on polynomial identity testing, and an improvement of lower bounds against linear methods for non-almost orthogonal functions.
summary: It is currently known how to characterize functions that neural networks can learn with SGD for two extremal parameterizations: neural networks in the linear regime, and neural networks with no structural constraints. However, for the main parametrization of interest (non-linear but regular networks) no tight characterization has yet been achieved, despite significant developments. We take a step in this direction by considering depth-2 neural networks trained by SGD in the mean-field regime. We consider functions on binary inputs that depend on a latent low-dimensional subspace (i.e., small number of coordinates). This regime is of interest since it is poorly understood how neural networks routinely tackle high-dimensional datasets and adapt to latent low-dimensional structure without suffering from the curse of dimensionality. Accordingly, we study SGD-learnability with $O(d)$ sample complexity in a large ambient dimension $d$. Our main results characterize a hierarchical property, the "merged-staircase property", that is both necessary and nearly sufficient for learning in this setting. We further show that non-linear training is necessary: for this class of functions, linear methods on any feature map (e.g., the NTK) are not capable of learning efficiently. The key tools are a new "dimension-free" dynamics approximation result that applies to functions defined on a latent space of low-dimension, a proof of global convergence based on polynomial identity testing, and an improvement of lower bounds against linear methods for non-almost orthogonal functions.
abstract_zh: 目前已知如何表征神经网络可以使用 SGD 学习的两个极值参数化函数：线性状态的神经网络和没有结构约束的神经网络。然而，对于感兴趣的主要参数化（非线性但规则的网络），尽管取得了重大进展，但尚未实现严格的表征。我们通过考虑 SGD 在平均场机制中训练的深度 2 神经网络，朝这个方向迈出了一步。我们考虑依赖于潜在低维子空间（即少量坐标）的二进制输入上的函数。这种机制很有趣，因为人们对神经网络如何常规处理高维数据集并适应潜在的低维结构而不遭受维数灾难的了解甚少。因此，我们研究了大环境维度 $d$ 中样本复杂度为 $O(d)$ 的 SGD 学习能力。我们的主要结果描述了分层属性，即“合并楼梯属性”，这对于在此环境中的学习来说既是必要的，也是几乎充分的。我们进一步表明，非线性训练是必要的：对于此类函数，任何特征图（例如 NTK）上的线性方法都无法有效学习。关键工具是一个新的“无维”动力学近似结果，适用于低维潜在空间上定义的函数，基于多项式恒等测试的全局收敛证明，以及针对非几乎正交函数的线性方法的下界改进。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了使用随机梯度下降（SGD）在二层神经网络中学习稀疏函数的必要且几乎充分条件，提出了'合并阶梯特性'。
AI.motivation: 当前对非线性但结构正常的神经网络学习能力缺乏精确刻画，尤其在高维数据中如何利用潜在低维结构仍不明确。
AI.method: 通过维度无关的动力学近似、基于多项式恒等式检测的全局收敛证明，以及改进对非近似正交函数的线性方法下界。
AI.result: 证明了'合并阶梯特性'是学习的必要且几乎充分条件，并表明非线性训练对于此类函数学习是必要的。
AI.conclusion: 该特性为理解高维稀疏函数的SGD学习提供了理论框架，强调了非线性方法在处理潜在低维结构中的重要性。

authors_text: Jingquan Wang,Jing Xu,Yu Pan,Zenglin Xu
title: Semantically Proportional Patchmix for Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: 用于少样本学习的语义比例补丁混合
abstract: Few-shot learning aims to classify unseen classes with only a limited number of labeled data. Recent works have demonstrated that training models with a simple transfer learning strategy can achieve competitive results in few-shot classification. Although excelling at distinguishing training data, these models are not well generalized to unseen data, probably due to insufficient feature representations on evaluation. To tackle this issue, we propose Semantically Proportional Patchmix (SePPMix), in which patches are cut and pasted among training images and the ground truth labels are mixed proportionally to the semantic information of the patches. In this way, we can improve the generalization ability of the model by regional dropout effect without introducing severe label noise. To learn more robust representations of data, we further take rotate transformation on the mixed images and predict rotations as a rule-based regularizer. Extensive experiments on prevalent few-shot benchmarks have shown the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Few-shot learning aims to classify unseen classes with only a limited number of labeled data. Recent works have demonstrated that training models with a simple transfer learning strategy can achieve competitive results in few-shot classification. Although excelling at distinguishing training data, these models are not well generalized to unseen data, probably due to insufficient feature representations on evaluation. To tackle this issue, we propose Semantically Proportional Patchmix (SePPMix), in which patches are cut and pasted among training images and the ground truth labels are mixed proportionally to the semantic information of the patches. In this way, we can improve the generalization ability of the model by regional dropout effect without introducing severe label noise. To learn more robust representations of data, we further take rotate transformation on the mixed images and predict rotations as a rule-based regularizer. Extensive experiments on prevalent few-shot benchmarks have shown the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 少样本学习旨在仅使用有限数量的标记数据对看不见的类进行分类。最近的工作表明，采用简单的迁移学习策略的训练模型可以在少样本分类中取得有竞争力的结果。尽管擅长区分训练数据，但这些模型并不能很好地推广到未见过的数据，这可能是由于评估时特征表示不足。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了语义比例补丁混合（SePPMix），其中在训练图像之间剪切和粘贴补丁，并且地面实况标签与补丁的语义信息成比例地混合。这样，我们就可以通过区域dropout效应来提高模型的泛化能力，而不会引入严重的标签噪声。为了学习更稳健的数据表示，我们进一步对混合图像进行旋转变换，并将旋转预测为基于规则的正则化器。对流行的少样本基准的大量实验表明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Semantically Proportional Patchmix (SePPMix)的方法，旨在通过改进特征表示来提升少样本学习中的模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本学习模型在区分训练数据时表现优异，但对未见数据的泛化能力不足，可能由于评估时特征表示不够充分。
AI.method: 通过按语义信息比例切割粘贴图像块并混合标签，实现区域丢弃效应以增强鲁棒性；同时对混合图像进行旋转变换并预测旋转角度作为规则化正则项。
AI.result: 在主流少样本学习基准测试中验证了该方法的有效性，显著提升了模型泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: SePPMix通过语义比例混合与旋转正则化，在不引入严重标签噪声的情况下有效增强了少样本学习的特征表示能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Semantically Proportional Patchmix (SePPMix)的方法，旨在通过改进特征表示来提升少样本学习中的模型泛化能力。

search_text: Semantically Proportional Patchmix for Few-Shot Learning 用于少样本学习的语义比例补丁混合 Few-shot learning aims to classify unseen classes with only a limited number of labeled data. Recent works have demonstrated that training models with a simple transfer learning strategy can achieve competitive results in few-shot classification. Although excelling at distinguishing training data, these models are not well generalized to unseen data, probably due to insufficient feature representations on evaluation. To tackle this issue, we propose Semantically Proportional Patchmix (SePPMix), in which patches are cut and pasted among training images and the ground truth labels are mixed proportionally to the semantic information of the patches. In this way, we can improve the generalization ability of the model by regional dropout effect without introducing severe label noise. To learn more robust representations of data, we further take rotate transformation on the mixed images and predict rotations as a rule-based regularizer. Extensive experiments on prevalent few-shot benchmarks have shown the effectiveness of our proposed method. 少样本学习旨在仅使用有限数量的标记数据对看不见的类进行分类。最近的工作表明，采用简单的迁移学习策略的训练模型可以在少样本分类中取得有竞争力的结果。尽管擅长区分训练数据，但这些模型并不能很好地推广到未见过的数据，这可能是由于评估时特征表示不足。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了语义比例补丁混合（SePPMix），其中在训练图像之间剪切和粘贴补丁，并且地面实况标签与补丁的语义信息成比例地混合。这样，我们就可以通过区域dropout效应来提高模型的泛化能力，而不会引入严重的标签噪声。为了学习更稳健的数据表示，我们进一步对混合图像进行旋转变换，并将旋转预测为基于规则的正则化器。对流行的少样本基准的大量实验表明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种名为Semantically Proportional Patchmix (SePPMix)的方法，旨在通过改进特征表示来提升少样本学习中的模型泛化能力。 Jingquan Wang,Jing Xu,Yu Pan,Zenglin Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Stefan Reimann
title: A novel HD Computing Algebra: Non-associative superposition of states creating sparse bundles representing order information
title_zh: 一种新颖的高清计算代数：状态的非关联叠加创建表示顺序信息的稀疏束
abstract: Information inflow into a computational system is by a sequence of information items. Cognitive computing, i.e. performing transformations along that sequence, requires to represent item information as well as sequential information. Among the most elementary operations is bundling, i.e. adding items, leading to 'memory states', i.e. bundles, from which information can be retrieved. If the bundling operation used is associative, e.g. ordinary vector-addition, sequential information can not be represented without imposing additional algebraic structure. A simple stochastic binary bundling rule inspired by the stochastic summation of neuronal activities allows the resulting memory state to represent both, item information as well as sequential information as long as it is non-associative. The memory state resulting from bundling together an arbitrary number of items is non-homogeneous and has a degree of sparseness, which is controlled by the activation threshold in summation. The bundling operation proposed allows to build a filter in the temporal as well as in the items' domain, which can be used to navigate the continuous inflow of information.
summary: Information inflow into a computational system is by a sequence of information items. Cognitive computing, i.e. performing transformations along that sequence, requires to represent item information as well as sequential information. If the bundling operation used is associative, e.g. ordinary vector-addition, sequential information can not be represented without imposing additional algebraic structure. A simple stochastic binary bundling rule inspired by the stochastic summation of neuronal activities allows the resulting memory state to represent both, item information as well as sequential information as long as it is non-associative. The memory state resulting from bundling together an arbitrary number of items is non-homogeneous and has a degree of sparseness, which is controlled by the activation threshold in summation. The bundling operation proposed allows to build a filter in the temporal as well as in the items' domain, which can be used to navigate the continuous inflow of information.
abstract_zh: 信息通过一系列信息项流入计算系统。认知计算，即沿着该序列执行转换，需要表示项目信息以及顺序信息。最基本的操作之一是捆绑，即添加项目，导致“内存状态”，即捆绑，可以从中检索信息。如果使用的捆绑操作是关联的，例如普通的向量加法，如果不施加额外的代数结构就无法表示顺序信息。受神经元活动随机求和启发的简单随机二进制捆绑规则允许生成的记忆状态既表示项目信息又表示顺序信息，只要它是非关联的。将任意数量的项目捆绑在一起所产生的记忆状态是非同质的并且具有一定程度的稀疏性，这由总和中的激活阈值控制。所提出的捆绑操作允许在时间域和项目域中构建过滤器，该过滤器可用于导航信息的连续流入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的高维计算代数，通过非结合的态叠加生成稀疏束以表示顺序信息。
AI.motivation: 传统结合性操作（如向量相加）无法在不增加额外结构的情况下表示顺序信息，需寻找更高效的表示方法。
AI.method: 基于神经元活动随机求和的启发，设计非结合的随机二进制捆绑规则，通过激活阈值控制稀疏度。
AI.result: 生成的稀疏记忆状态可同时表征项目信息与顺序信息，并构建时空域过滤器处理连续信息流。
AI.conclusion: 非结合代数结构能更自然地表示顺序信息，为认知计算提供更高效的数学工具。

authors_text: Yueheng Zhou,Ming Liu,Chaoyang Song,Jianwen Luo
title: Kirin: A Quadruped Robot with High Payload Carrying Capability
title_zh: 麒麟：具有高负载能力的四足机器人
comment: We found some errors in the presented results and hope to remove this submission and we hope submit it later after we have carefully checked it. We feel sorry for the inconvenience and really appreciate it for the technical support
comments: We found some errors in the presented results and hope to remove this submission and we hope submit it later after we have carefully checked it. We feel sorry for the inconvenience and really appreciate it for the technical support
abstract: The quadruped robot is a versatile mobile platform with potential ability for high payload carrying. However, most of the existing quadruped robots aim at high maneuverability, highly dynamic and agile locomotion. In spite of this, payload carrying is still an indispensable ability for the quadruped robots. Design of a quadruped robot with high payload capacity is yet deeply explored. In this study, a 50 kg electrically-actuated quadruped robot, Kirin, is presented to leverage the payload carrying capability. Kirin is an characterized with prismatic quasi-direct-drive (QDD) leg. This mechanism greatly augments the payload carrying capability. This study presents several design principles for the payload-carrying-oriented quadruped robots, including the mechanical design, actuator parameters selection, and locomotion control method. The theoretical analysis implies that the lifting task tends to be a bottleneck for the existing robots with the articulated knee joints. By using prismatic QDD leg, the payload carrying capability of Kirin is enhanced greatly. To demonstrate Kirin's payload carrying capability, in preliminary experiment, up to 125 kg payload lifting in static stance and 50 kg payload carrying in dynamic trotting are tested. Whole body compliance with payload carrying is also demonstrated.
summary: The quadruped robot is a versatile mobile platform with potential ability for high payload carrying. However, most of the existing quadruped robots aim at high maneuverability, highly dynamic and agile locomotion. In spite of this, payload carrying is still an indispensable ability for the quadruped robots. Design of a quadruped robot with high payload capacity is yet deeply explored. In this study, a 50 kg electrically-actuated quadruped robot, Kirin, is presented to leverage the payload carrying capability. Kirin is an characterized with prismatic quasi-direct-drive (QDD) leg. This mechanism greatly augments the payload carrying capability. This study presents several design principles for the payload-carrying-oriented quadruped robots, including the mechanical design, actuator parameters selection, and locomotion control method. The theoretical analysis implies that the lifting task tends to be a bottleneck for the existing robots with the articulated knee joints. By using prismatic QDD leg, the payload carrying capability of Kirin is enhanced greatly. To demonstrate Kirin's payload carrying capability, in preliminary experiment, up to 125 kg payload lifting in static stance and 50 kg payload carrying in dynamic trotting are tested. Whole body compliance with payload carrying is also demonstrated.
abstract_zh: 四足机器人是一种多功能移动平台，具有高负载承载能力。然而，现有的四足机器人大多以高机动性、高动态性和敏捷运动为目标。尽管如此，有效载荷承载仍然是四足机器人不可或缺的能力。高负载能力四足机器人的设计尚未深入探索。在这项研究中，提出了一种重 50 公斤的电动四足机器人 Kirin，以利用有效负载的承载能力。 Kirin 的特点是棱柱形准直驱（QDD）腿。这种机制大大增强了有效载荷的承载能力。本研究提出了面向负载的四足机器人的几种设计原则，包括机械设计、执行器参数选择和运动控制方法。理论分析表明，举升任务往往是现有铰接膝关节机器人的瓶颈。通过采用棱柱QDD腿，麒麟的有效载荷承载能力大大增强。为了验证麒麟的有效载荷能力，在初步实验中，测试了静态站立时有效载荷提升125公斤和动态小跑时有效载荷50公斤的承载能力。还证明了整个身体对有效载荷携带的顺应性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一款名为Kirin的四足机器人，通过设计原理和实验验证其高负载能力。
AI.motivation: 现有四足机器人多关注机动性和动态性能，但负载能力仍需深入探索，尤其在静态和动态任务中存在瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用棱柱准直接驱动（QDD）腿机构，结合机械设计、执行器参数选择和运动控制方法，通过理论分析与实验验证负载能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，Kirin在静态姿态下可举起125kg负载，在动态奔跑中可携带50kg负载，并实现全身合规性控制。
AI.conclusion: QDD腿机构显著提升负载能力，验证了面向负载的四足机器人设计原则的有效性。

Whole body compliance with payload carrying is also demonstrated. 四足机器人是一种多功能移动平台，具有高负载承载能力。然而，现有的四足机器人大多以高机动性、高动态性和敏捷运动为目标。尽管如此，有效载荷承载仍然是四足机器人不可或缺的能力。高负载能力四足机器人的设计尚未深入探索。在这项研究中，提出了一种重 50 公斤的电动四足机器人 Kirin，以利用有效负载的承载能力。 Kirin 的特点是棱柱形准直驱（QDD）腿。这种机制大大增强了有效载荷的承载能力。本研究提出了面向负载的四足机器人的几种设计原则，包括机械设计、执行器参数选择和运动控制方法。理论分析表明，举升任务往往是现有铰接膝关节机器人的瓶颈。通过采用棱柱QDD腿，麒麟的有效载荷承载能力大大增强。为了验证麒麟的有效载荷能力，在初步实验中，测试了静态站立时有效载荷提升125公斤和动态小跑时有效载荷50公斤的承载能力。还证明了整个身体对有效载荷携带的顺应性。 本文提出了一款名为Kirin的四足机器人，通过设计原理和实验验证其高负载能力。 Yueheng Zhou,Ming Liu,Chaoyang Song,Jianwen Luo cs.RO

authors_text: Liao Wang,Jiakai Zhang,Xinhang Liu,Fuqiang Zhao,Yanshun Zhang,Yingliang Zhang,Minye Wu,Lan Xu,Jingyi Yu
title: Fourier PlenOctrees for Dynamic Radiance Field Rendering in Real-time
title_zh: 用于实时动态辐射场渲染的 Fourier PlenOctrees
abstract: Implicit neural representations such as Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) have focused mainly on modeling static objects captured under multi-view settings where real-time rendering can be achieved with smart data structures, e.g., PlenOctree. In this paper, we present a novel Fourier PlenOctree (FPO) technique to tackle efficient neural modeling and real-time rendering of dynamic scenes captured under the free-view video (FVV) setting. The key idea in our FPO is a novel combination of generalized NeRF, PlenOctree representation, volumetric fusion and Fourier transform. To accelerate FPO construction, we present a novel coarse-to-fine fusion scheme that leverages the generalizable NeRF technique to generate the tree via spatial blending. To tackle dynamic scenes, we tailor the implicit network to model the Fourier coefficients of timevarying density and color attributes. Finally, we construct the FPO and train the Fourier coefficients directly on the leaves of a union PlenOctree structure of the dynamic sequence. We show that the resulting FPO enables compact memory overload to handle dynamic objects and supports efficient fine-tuning. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method is 3000 times faster than the original NeRF and achieves over an order of magnitude acceleration over SOTA while preserving high visual quality for the free-viewpoint rendering of unseen dynamic scenes.
summary: Implicit neural representations such as Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) have focused mainly on modeling static objects captured under multi-view settings where real-time rendering can be achieved with smart data structures, e.g., PlenOctree. In this paper, we present a novel Fourier PlenOctree (FPO) technique to tackle efficient neural modeling and real-time rendering of dynamic scenes captured under the free-view video (FVV) setting. The key idea in our FPO is a novel combination of generalized NeRF, PlenOctree representation, volumetric fusion and Fourier transform. To accelerate FPO construction, we present a novel coarse-to-fine fusion scheme that leverages the generalizable NeRF technique to generate the tree via spatial blending. To tackle dynamic scenes, we tailor the implicit network to model the Fourier coefficients of timevarying density and color attributes. Finally, we construct the FPO and train the Fourier coefficients directly on the leaves of a union PlenOctree structure of the dynamic sequence. We show that the resulting FPO enables compact memory overload to handle dynamic objects and supports efficient fine-tuning. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method is 3000 times faster than the original NeRF and achieves over an order of magnitude acceleration over SOTA while preserving high visual quality for the free-viewpoint rendering of unseen dynamic scenes.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 等隐式神经表示主要侧重于对多视图设置下捕获的静态对象进行建模，其中可以使用智能数据结构（例如 PlenOctree）实现实时渲染。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的傅里叶 PlenOctree (FPO) 技术，用于解决在自由视图视频 (FVV) 设置下捕获的动态场景的高效神经建模和实时渲染。我们的 FPO 的关键思想是广义 NeRF、PlenOctree 表示、体积融合和傅立叶变换的新颖组合。为了加速 FPO 构建，我们提出了一种新颖的从粗到精的融合方案，该方案利用可推广的 NeRF 技术通过空间混合生成树。为了处理动态场景，我们定制隐式网络来模拟随时间变化的密度和颜色属性的傅立叶系数。最后，我们构建 FPO 并直接在动态序列的联合 PlenOctree 结构的叶子上训练傅里叶系数。我们表明，由此产生的 FPO 能够实现紧凑的内存过载来处理动态对象并支持高效的微调。大量实验表明，所提出的方法比原始 NeRF 快 3000 倍，并且比 SOTA 实现了一个数量级的加速，同时保持了未见过的动态场景的自由视点渲染的高视觉质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Fourier PlenOctree (FPO)的新技术，用于在自由视角视频(FVV)设置下实现动态场景的实时辐射场渲染。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法主要针对静态物体建模，难以高效处理动态场景的实时渲染需求，现有方法在动态场景建模和渲染效率上存在不足。
AI.method: 结合广义NeRF、PlenOctree表示、体积分割和傅里叶变换，提出粗到细的融合方案，通过空间混合生成树结构，并利用傅里叶系数建模时间变化的密度和颜色属性，直接在动态序列的联合PlenOctree结构叶节点上训练傅里叶系数。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法比原始NeRF快3000倍，比现有最优方法加速一个数量级，在保持高质量视觉效果的同时实现动态场景的实时自由视角渲染。
AI.conclusion: FPO通过紧凑的内存占用和高效的微调能力，为动态场景的实时辐射场渲染提供了有效解决方案，显著优于现有方法。

authors_text: Roberto Amadini,Maurizio Gabbrielli,Tong Liu,Jacopo Mauro
title: On the evaluation of (meta-)solver approaches
title_zh: 关于（元）求解器方法的评估
abstract: Meta-solver approaches exploits a number of individual solvers to potentially build a better solver. To assess the performance of meta-solvers, one can simply adopt the metrics typically used for individual solvers (e.g., runtime or solution quality), or employ more specific evaluation metrics (e.g., by measuring how close the meta-solver gets to its virtual best performance). In this paper, based on some recently published works, we provide an overview of different performance metrics for evaluating (meta-)solvers, by underlying their strengths and weaknesses.
summary: Meta-solver approaches exploits a number of individual solvers to potentially build a better solver. To assess the performance of meta-solvers, one can simply adopt the metrics typically used for individual solvers (e.g., runtime or solution quality), or employ more specific evaluation metrics (e.g., by measuring how close the meta-solver gets to its virtual best performance). In this paper, based on some recently published works, we provide an overview of different performance metrics for evaluating (meta-)solvers, by underlying their strengths and weaknesses.
abstract_zh: 元求解器方法利用许多单独的求解器来构建更好的求解器。为了评估元求解器的性能，可以简单地采用通常用于单个求解器的指标（例如，运行时间或解决方案质量），或者采用更具体的评估指标（例如，通过测量元求解器与其虚拟最佳性能的接近程度）。在本文中，基于最近发表的一些著作，我们通过揭示其优缺点，概述了用于评估（元）求解器的不同性能指标。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了评估元求解器的各种性能指标，并分析了这些指标的优缺点。
AI.motivation: 元求解器通过整合多个求解器提升性能，但现有评估指标存在局限性，需系统性分析不同指标的适用性。
AI.method: 基于近期研究，系统梳理并比较了包括运行时间、解质量及虚拟最佳性能接近度等指标，分析其适用场景与不足。
AI.result: 总结了主流评估指标体系，明确了各指标在衡量元求解器性能时的优势与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 评估指标的选择需结合具体应用场景，未来需进一步探索更全面的元求解器评价方法。

authors_text: Youngkee Kim,Won Joon Yun,Youn Kyu Lee,Soyi Jung,Joongheon Kim
title: Two-stage architectural fine-tuning with neural architecture search using early-stopping in image classification
title_zh: 在图像分类中使用早期停止进行两阶段架构微调和神经架构搜索
abstract: In many deep neural network (DNN) applications, the difficulty of gathering high-quality data in the industry field hinders the practical use of DNN. Thus, the concept of transfer learning has emerged, which leverages the pretrained knowledge of DNNs trained on large-scale datasets. Therefore, this paper suggests two-stage architectural fine-tuning, inspired by neural architecture search (NAS). One of main ideas is mutation, which reduces the search cost using given architectural information. Moreover, early-stopping is considered which cuts NAS costs by terminating the search process in advance. Experimental results verify our proposed method reduces 32.4% computational and 22.3% searching costs.
summary: In many deep neural network (DNN) applications, the difficulty of gathering high-quality data in the industry field hinders the practical use of DNN. Thus, the concept of transfer learning has emerged, which leverages the pretrained knowledge of DNNs trained on large-scale datasets. Therefore, this paper suggests two-stage architectural fine-tuning, inspired by neural architecture search (NAS). One of main ideas is mutation, which reduces the search cost using given architectural information. Moreover, early-stopping is considered which cuts NAS costs by terminating the search process in advance. Experimental results verify our proposed method reduces 32.4% computational and 22.3% searching costs.
abstract_zh: 在许多深度神经网络（DNN）应用中，工业领域高质量数据的收集困难阻碍了DNN的实际使用。因此，迁移学习的概念应运而生，它利用了在大规模数据集上训练的 DNN 的预训练知识。因此，受神经架构搜索（NAS）的启发，本文建议进行两阶段架构微调。主要思想之一是变异，它可以降低使用给定架构信息的搜索成本。此外，还考虑了提前停止，通过提前终止搜索过程来降低 NAS 成本。实验结果验证了我们提出的方法减少了 32.4% 的计算成本和 22.3% 的搜索成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合神经架构搜索（NAS）和早停技术的两阶段架构微调方法，用于降低图像分类中的计算和搜索成本。
AI.motivation: 工业领域中高质量数据获取困难限制了深度神经网络的应用，而传统NAS方法计算成本高，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用两阶段架构微调，通过变异操作减少搜索空间，并引入早停机制提前终止搜索过程以降低计算开销。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持性能的同时，减少32.4%的计算成本和22.3%的搜索成本。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了模型性能与效率，适用于数据获取受限的实际工业场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合神经架构搜索（NAS）和早停技术的两阶段架构微调方法，用于降低图像分类中的计算和搜索成本。

search_text: Two-stage architectural fine-tuning with neural architecture search using early-stopping in image classification 在图像分类中使用早期停止进行两阶段架构微调和神经架构搜索 In many deep neural network (DNN) applications, the difficulty of gathering high-quality data in the industry field hinders the practical use of DNN. Thus, the concept of transfer learning has emerged, which leverages the pretrained knowledge of DNNs trained on large-scale datasets. Therefore, this paper suggests two-stage architectural fine-tuning, inspired by neural architecture search (NAS). One of main ideas is mutation, which reduces the search cost using given architectural information. Moreover, early-stopping is considered which cuts NAS costs by terminating the search process in advance. Experimental results verify our proposed method reduces 32.4% computational and 22.3% searching costs. 在许多深度神经网络（DNN）应用中，工业领域高质量数据的收集困难阻碍了DNN的实际使用。因此，迁移学习的概念应运而生，它利用了在大规模数据集上训练的 DNN 的预训练知识。因此，受神经架构搜索（NAS）的启发，本文建议进行两阶段架构微调。主要思想之一是变异，它可以降低使用给定架构信息的搜索成本。此外，还考虑了提前停止，通过提前终止搜索过程来降低 NAS 成本。实验结果验证了我们提出的方法减少了 32.4% 的计算成本和 22.3% 的搜索成本。 本文提出一种结合神经架构搜索（NAS）和早停技术的两阶段架构微调方法，用于降低图像分类中的计算和搜索成本。 Youngkee Kim,Won Joon Yun,Youn Kyu Lee,Soyi Jung,Joongheon Kim cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Zirui Peng,Shaofeng Li,Guoxing Chen,Cheng Zhang,Haojin Zhu,Minhui Xue
title: Fingerprinting Deep Neural Networks Globally via Universal Adversarial Perturbations
title_zh: 通过通用对抗性扰动对深度神经网络进行全局指纹识别
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel and practical mechanism which enables the service provider to verify whether a suspect model is stolen from the victim model via model extraction attacks. Our key insight is that the profile of a DNN model's decision boundary can be uniquely characterized by its Universal Adversarial Perturbations (UAPs). UAPs belong to a low-dimensional subspace and piracy models' subspaces are more consistent with victim model's subspace compared with non-piracy model. Based on this, we propose a UAP fingerprinting method for DNN models and train an encoder via contrastive learning that takes fingerprint as inputs, outputs a similarity score. Extensive studies show that our framework can detect model IP breaches with confidence > 99.99 within only 20 fingerprints of the suspect model. It has good generalizability across different model architectures and is robust against post-modifications on stolen models.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel and practical mechanism which enables the service provider to verify whether a suspect model is stolen from the victim model via model extraction attacks. Our key insight is that the profile of a DNN model's decision boundary can be uniquely characterized by its Universal Adversarial Perturbations (UAPs). UAPs belong to a low-dimensional subspace and piracy models' subspaces are more consistent with victim model's subspace compared with non-piracy model. Based on this, we propose a UAP fingerprinting method for DNN models and train an encoder via contrastive learning that takes fingerprint as inputs, outputs a similarity score. Extensive studies show that our framework can detect model IP breaches with confidence > 99.99 within only 20 fingerprints of the suspect model. It has good generalizability across different model architectures and is robust against post-modifications on stolen models.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖实用的机制，使服务提供商能够通过模型提取攻击来验证可疑模型是否是从受害者模型中窃取的。我们的主要见解是，DNN 模型决策边界的轮廓可以通过其通用对抗性扰动 (UAP) 来独特地表征。 UAP属于低维子空间，与非盗版模型相比，盗版模型的子空间与受害者模型的子空间更加一致。基于此，我们提出了一种用于 DNN 模型的 UAP 指纹识别方法，并通过对比学习训练编码器，以指纹为输入，输出相似度得分。广泛的研究表明，我们的框架可以在可疑模型的 20 个指纹内检测出模型 IP 泄露，置信度 > 99.99。它在不同模型架构之间具有良好的通用性，并且对于被盗模型的后期修改具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于通用对抗扰动（UAP）的深度神经网络模型指纹方法，用于检测模型盗用行为。
AI.motivation: 现有模型提取攻击难以有效检测模型盗用行为，需开发一种可靠的方法验证模型是否被盗，保护知识产权。
AI.method: 通过分析DNN决策边界的UAP低维子空间特性，构建指纹识别框架并利用对比学习训练编码器计算相似度分数。
AI.result: 仅需20个指纹即可实现>99.99%置信度的盗版检测，具有跨架构泛化性和抗后修改鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为模型知识产权保护提供了高效且通用的检测方案，具有重要实践价值。

authors_text: Boxue Xiao,Zhuoran Zheng,Xiang Chen,Chen Lv,Yunliang Zhuang,Tao Wang
title: Single UHD Image Dehazing via Interpretable Pyramid Network
title_zh: 通过可解释金字塔网络进行单张超高清图像去雾
abstract: Currently, most single image dehazing models cannot run an ultra-high-resolution (UHD) image with a single GPU shader in real-time. To address the problem, we introduce the principle of infinite approximation of Taylor's theorem with the Laplace pyramid pattern to build a model which is capable of handling 4K hazy images in real-time. The N branch networks of the pyramid network correspond to the N constraint terms in Taylor's theorem. Low-order polynomials reconstruct the low-frequency information of the image (e.g. color, illumination). High-order polynomials regress the high-frequency information of the image (e.g. texture). In addition, we propose a Tucker reconstruction-based regularization term that acts on each branch network of the pyramid model. It further constrains the generation of anomalous signals in the feature space. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our approach can not only run 4K images with haze in real-time on a single GPU (80FPS) but also has unparalleled interpretability. The developed method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on two benchmarks (O/I-HAZE) and our updated 4KID dataset while providing the reliable groundwork for subsequent optimization schemes.
summary: Currently, most single image dehazing models cannot run an ultra-high-resolution (UHD) image with a single GPU shader in real-time. To address the problem, we introduce the principle of infinite approximation of Taylor's theorem with the Laplace pyramid pattern to build a model which is capable of handling 4K hazy images in real-time. The N branch networks of the pyramid network correspond to the N constraint terms in Taylor's theorem. Low-order polynomials reconstruct the low-frequency information of the image (e.g. color, illumination). High-order polynomials regress the high-frequency information of the image (e.g. texture). In addition, we propose a Tucker reconstruction-based regularization term that acts on each branch network of the pyramid model. It further constrains the generation of anomalous signals in the feature space. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our approach can not only run 4K images with haze in real-time on a single GPU (80FPS) but also has unparalleled interpretability. The developed method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on two benchmarks (O/I-HAZE) and our updated 4KID dataset while providing the reliable groundwork for subsequent optimization schemes.
abstract_zh: 目前，大多数单图像去雾模型无法使用单个 GPU 着色器实时运行超高分辨率 (UHD) 图像。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了拉普拉斯金字塔模式无限逼近泰勒定理的原理，建立了一个能够实时处理4K模糊图像的模型。金字塔网络的N个分支网络对应泰勒定理中的N个约束项。低阶多项式重建图像的低频信息（例如颜色、照明）。高阶多项式回归图像的高频信息（例如纹理）。此外，我们提出了一种基于塔克重建的正则化项，作用于金字塔模型的每个分支网络。它进一步限制了特征空间中异常信号的生成。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅可以在单个 GPU (80FPS) 上实时运行有雾霾的 4K 图像，而且还具有无与伦比的可解释性。所开发的方法在两个基准测试 (O/I-HAZE) 和我们更新的 4KID 数据集上实现了最先进的 (SOTA) 性能，同时为后续优化方案提供了可靠的基础。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于可解释金字塔网络的单幅超高清图像实时去雾方法。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像去雾模型无法在单GPU上实时处理4K超高清图像，且缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 结合泰勒定理无限逼近原理与拉普拉斯金字塔结构，构建多分支网络。低阶多项式重建低频信息（颜色、光照），高阶多项式回归高频信息（纹理），并引入Tucker重建正则化项约束特征空间。
AI.result: 在单GPU上实现4K图像80FPS实时去雾，性能达SOTA，在O/I-HAZE和4KID数据集验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 方法兼顾实时性与可解释性，为后续优化提供可靠基础。

authors_text: Zejia Su,Haibin Huang,Chongyang Ma,Hui Huang,Ruizhen Hu
title: Point cloud completion via structured feature maps using a feedback network
title_zh: 使用反馈网络通过结构化特征图完成点云
comment: to be published in journel of computational visual media
comments: to be published in journel of computational visual media
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the challenging problem of point cloud completion from the perspective of feature learning. Our key observation is that to recover the underlying structures as well as surface details, given partial input, a fundamental component is a good feature representation that can capture both global structure and local geometric details. We accordingly first propose FSNet, a feature structuring module that can adaptively aggregate point-wise features into a 2D structured feature map by learning multiple latent patterns from local regions. We then integrate FSNet into a coarse-tofine pipeline for point cloud completion. Specifically, a 2D convolutional neural network is adopted to decode feature maps from FSNet into a coarse and complete point cloud. Next, a point cloud upsampling network is used to generate a dense point cloud from the partial input and the coarse intermediate output. To efficiently exploit local structures and enhance point distribution uniformity, we propose IFNet, a point upsampling module with a self-correction mechanism that can progressively refine details of the generated dense point cloud. We have conducted qualitative and quantitative experiments on ShapeNet, MVP, and KITTI datasets, which demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-theart point cloud completion approaches.
summary: In this paper, we tackle the challenging problem of point cloud completion from the perspective of feature learning. Our key observation is that to recover the underlying structures as well as surface details, given partial input, a fundamental component is a good feature representation that can capture both global structure and local geometric details. We accordingly first propose FSNet, a feature structuring module that can adaptively aggregate point-wise features into a 2D structured feature map by learning multiple latent patterns from local regions. We then integrate FSNet into a coarse-tofine pipeline for point cloud completion. Specifically, a 2D convolutional neural network is adopted to decode feature maps from FSNet into a coarse and complete point cloud. Next, a point cloud upsampling network is used to generate a dense point cloud from the partial input and the coarse intermediate output. To efficiently exploit local structures and enhance point distribution uniformity, we propose IFNet, a point upsampling module with a self-correction mechanism that can progressively refine details of the generated dense point cloud. We have conducted qualitative and quantitative experiments on ShapeNet, MVP, and KITTI datasets, which demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-theart point cloud completion approaches.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们从特征学习的角度解决点云补全这一具有挑战性的问题。我们的关键观察是，为了恢复底层结构以及表面细节，在给定部分输入的情况下，基本组件是一个良好的特征表示，可以捕获全局结构和局部几何细节。因此，我们首先提出了 FSNet，这是一种特征结构化模块，可以通过从局部区域学习多个潜在模式来自适应地将逐点特征聚合成 2D 结构化特征图。然后，我们将 FSNet 集成到从粗到细的管道中以完成点云。具体来说，采用二维卷积神经网络将 FSNet 的特征图解码为粗略且完整的点云。接下来，使用点云上采样网络从部分输入和粗中间输出生成密集点云。为了有效地利用局部结构并增强点分布均匀性，我们提出了 IFNet，这是一种具有自校正机制的点上采样模块，可以逐步细化生成的密集点云的细节。我们在 ShapeNet、MVP 和 KITTI 数据集上进行了定性和定量实验，这表明我们的方法优于最先进的点云补全方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构化特征图和反馈网络的点云补全方法，通过学习全局结构和局部几何细节实现高质量点云重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时捕捉点云的全局结构与局部细节特征，导致补全结果不够精确完整。
AI.method: 设计FSNet模块将点特征转化为2D结构化特征图，结合粗到细的生成流程，采用CNN生成粗略点云，并通过带自校正机制的IFNet进行密度提升和细节优化。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet、MVP和KITTI数据集上均优于现有最先进的点云补全方法，定性和定量实验验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化特征学习与反馈机制的结合能显著提升点云补全的精度和完整性，为相关研究提供新思路。

search_text: Point cloud completion via structured feature maps using a feedback network 使用反馈网络通过结构化特征图完成点云 In this paper, we tackle the challenging problem of point cloud completion from the perspective of feature learning. Our key observation is that to recover the underlying structures as well as surface details, given partial input, a fundamental component is a good feature representation that can capture both global structure and local geometric details. We accordingly first propose FSNet, a feature structuring module that can adaptively aggregate point-wise features into a 2D structured feature map by learning multiple latent patterns from local regions. We then integrate FSNet into a coarse-tofine pipeline for point cloud completion. Specifically, a 2D convolutional neural network is adopted to decode feature maps from FSNet into a coarse and complete point cloud. Next, a point cloud upsampling network is used to generate a dense point cloud from the partial input and the coarse intermediate output. To efficiently exploit local structures and enhance point distribution uniformity, we propose IFNet, a point upsampling module with a self-correction mechanism that can progressively refine details of the generated dense point cloud. We have conducted qualitative and quantitative experiments on ShapeNet, MVP, and KITTI datasets, which demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-theart point cloud completion approaches. 在本文中，我们从特征学习的角度解决点云补全这一具有挑战性的问题。我们的关键观察是，为了恢复底层结构以及表面细节，在给定部分输入的情况下，基本组件是一个良好的特征表示，可以捕获全局结构和局部几何细节。因此，我们首先提出了 FSNet，这是一种特征结构化模块，可以通过从局部区域学习多个潜在模式来自适应地将逐点特征聚合成 2D 结构化特征图。然后，我们将 FSNet 集成到从粗到细的管道中以完成点云。具体来说，采用二维卷积神经网络将 FSNet 的特征图解码为粗略且完整的点云。接下来，使用点云上采样网络从部分输入和粗中间输出生成密集点云。为了有效地利用局部结构并增强点分布均匀性，我们提出了 IFNet，这是一种具有自校正机制的点上采样模块，可以逐步细化生成的密集点云的细节。我们在 ShapeNet、MVP 和 KITTI 数据集上进行了定性和定量实验，这表明我们的方法优于最先进的点云补全方法。 本文提出一种基于结构化特征图和反馈网络的点云补全方法，通过学习全局结构和局部几何细节实现高质量点云重建。 Zejia Su,Haibin Huang,Chongyang Ma,Hui Huang,Ruizhen Hu cs.CV

authors_text: Arnaud Boutillon,Asma Salhi,Valérie Burdin,Bhushan Borotikar
title: Anatomically Parameterized Statistical Shape Model: Explaining Morphometry through Statistical Learning
title_zh: 解剖参数化统计形状模型：通过统计学习解释形态测量
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables, Accepted for publication at IEEE Transactions on Biomedical Engineering
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables, Accepted for publication at IEEE Transactions on Biomedical Engineering
abstract: Statistical shape models (SSMs) are a popular tool to conduct morphological analysis of anatomical structures which is a crucial step in clinical practices. However, shape representations through SSMs are based on shape coefficients and lack an explicit one-to-one relationship with anatomical measures of clinical relevance. While a shape coefficient embeds a combination of anatomical measures, a formalized approach to find the relationship between them remains elusive in the literature. This limits the use of SSMs to subjective evaluations in clinical practices. We propose a novel SSM controlled by anatomical parameters derived from morphometric analysis. The proposed anatomically parameterized SSM (ANAT-SSM) is based on learning a linear mapping between shape coefficients and selected anatomical parameters. This mapping is learned from a synthetic population generated by the standard SSM. Determining the pseudo-inverse of the mapping allows us to build the ANAT-SSM. We further impose orthogonality constraints to the anatomical parameterization to obtain independent shape variation patterns. The proposed contribution was evaluated on two skeletal databases of femoral and scapular bone shapes using clinically relevant anatomical parameters. Anatomical measures of the synthetically generated shapes exhibited realistic statistics. The learned matrices corroborated well with the obtained statistical relationship, while the two SSMs achieved moderate to excellent performance in predicting anatomical parameters on unseen shapes. This study demonstrates the use of anatomical representation for creating anatomically parameterized SSM and as a result, removes the limited clinical interpretability of standard SSMs. The proposed models could help analyze differences in relevant bone morphometry between populations, and be integrated in patient-specific pre-surgery planning or in-surgery assessment.

However, shape representations through SSMs are based on shape coefficients and lack an explicit one-to-one relationship with anatomical measures of clinical relevance. While a shape coefficient embeds a combination of anatomical measures, a formalized approach to find the relationship between them remains elusive in the literature. This limits the use of SSMs to subjective evaluations in clinical practices. We propose a novel SSM controlled by anatomical parameters derived from morphometric analysis. The proposed anatomically parameterized SSM (ANAT-SSM) is based on learning a linear mapping between shape coefficients and selected anatomical parameters. This mapping is learned from a synthetic population generated by the standard SSM. Determining the pseudo-inverse of the mapping allows us to build the ANAT-SSM. We further impose orthogonality constraints to the anatomical parameterization to obtain independent shape variation patterns. The proposed contribution was evaluated on two skeletal databases of femoral and scapular bone shapes using clinically relevant anatomical parameters. Anatomical measures of the synthetically generated shapes exhibited realistic statistics. The learned matrices corroborated well with the obtained statistical relationship, while the two SSMs achieved moderate to excellent performance in predicting anatomical parameters on unseen shapes. This study demonstrates the use of anatomical representation for creating anatomically parameterized SSM and as a result, removes the limited clinical interpretability of standard SSMs. The proposed models could help analyze differences in relevant bone morphometry between populations, and be integrated in patient-specific pre-surgery planning or in-surgery assessment.
abstract_zh: 统计形状模型（SSM）是一种流行的工具，用于对解剖结构进行形态学分析，这是临床实践中的关键步骤。然而，通过 SSM 的形状表示基于形状系数，缺乏与临床相关解剖测量的明确的一对一关系。虽然形状系数嵌入了解剖测量的组合，但文献中仍然难以找到一种形式化的方法来查找它们之间的关系。这限制了 SSM 在临床实践中的主观评估的使用。我们提出了一种由形态测量分析得出的解剖参数控制的新型 SSM。所提出的解剖参数化 SSM（ANAT-SSM）基于学习形状系数和所选解剖参数之间的线性映射。该映射是从标准 SSM 生成的合成群体中学习的。确定映射的伪逆允许我们构建 ANAT-SSM。我们进一步对解剖参数化施加正交约束以获得独立的形状变化模式。使用临床相关的解剖参数在股骨和肩胛骨形状的两个骨骼数据库上评估了所提出的贡献。合成生成的形状的解剖测量显示出真实的统计数据。学习到的矩阵与获得的统计关系得到了很好的证实，而两个 SSM 在预测不可见形状的解剖参数方面取得了中等至优异的性能。本研究演示了使用解剖表示来创建解剖参数化 SSM，从而消除了标准 SSM 的有限临床可解释性。所提出的模型可以帮助分析人群之间相关骨形态测量的差异，并整合到患者特定的术前计划或术中评估中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于解剖参数的统计形状模型（ANAT-SSM），通过建立形状系数与临床相关解剖参数之间的线性映射，提升统计形状模型在临床中的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统统计形状模型（SSM）的形状系数缺乏与临床相关解剖指标的直接对应关系，导致其在临床实践中依赖主观评估，限制了其应用价值。
AI.method: 通过标准SSM生成合成人群数据，学习形状系数与选定解剖参数间的线性映射，并利用伪逆运算构建ANAT-SSM；通过正交约束确保解剖参数化独立性。
AI.result: 在股骨和肩胛骨数据集上验证，合成形状的解剖指标统计学特征合理，模型在预测未知形状参数时表现中等到优秀，显著提升了临床可解释性。
AI.conclusion: ANAT-SSM通过解剖参数化实现了统计形状模型与临床指标的直接关联，可应用于人群骨形态差异分析及术前术后评估等临床场景。

authors_text: Yinuo Zhao,Kun Wu,Zhiyuan Xu,Zhengping Che,Qi Lu,Jian Tang,Chi Harold Liu
title: CADRE: A Cascade Deep Reinforcement Learning Framework for Vision-based Autonomous Urban Driving
title_zh: CADRE：基于视觉的城市自主驾驶的级联深度强化学习框架
abstract: Vision-based autonomous urban driving in dense traffic is quite challenging due to the complicated urban environment and the dynamics of the driving behaviors. Widely-applied methods either heavily rely on hand-crafted rules or learn from limited human experience, which makes them hard to generalize to rare but critical scenarios. In this paper, we present a novel CAscade Deep REinforcement learning framework, CADRE, to achieve model-free vision-based autonomous urban driving. In CADRE, to derive representative latent features from raw observations, we first offline train a Co-attention Perception Module (CoPM) that leverages the co-attention mechanism to learn the inter-relationships between the visual and control information from a pre-collected driving dataset. Cascaded by the frozen CoPM, we then present an efficient distributed proximal policy optimization framework to online learn the driving policy under the guidance of particularly designed reward functions. We perform a comprehensive empirical study with the CARLA NoCrash benchmark as well as specific obstacle avoidance scenarios in autonomous urban driving tasks. The experimental results well justify the effectiveness of CADRE and its superiority over the state-of-the-art by a wide margin.
summary: Vision-based autonomous urban driving in dense traffic is quite challenging due to the complicated urban environment and the dynamics of the driving behaviors. Widely-applied methods either heavily rely on hand-crafted rules or learn from limited human experience, which makes them hard to generalize to rare but critical scenarios. In this paper, we present a novel CAscade Deep REinforcement learning framework, CADRE, to achieve model-free vision-based autonomous urban driving. In CADRE, to derive representative latent features from raw observations, we first offline train a Co-attention Perception Module (CoPM) that leverages the co-attention mechanism to learn the inter-relationships between the visual and control information from a pre-collected driving dataset. Cascaded by the frozen CoPM, we then present an efficient distributed proximal policy optimization framework to online learn the driving policy under the guidance of particularly designed reward functions. We perform a comprehensive empirical study with the CARLA NoCrash benchmark as well as specific obstacle avoidance scenarios in autonomous urban driving tasks. The experimental results well justify the effectiveness of CADRE and its superiority over the state-of-the-art by a wide margin.
abstract_zh: 由于复杂的城市环境和驾驶行为的动态性，密集交通中基于视觉的城市自动驾驶非常具有挑战性。广泛应用的方法要么严重依赖手工制定的规则，要么从有限的人类经验中学习，这使得它们很难推广到罕见但关键的场景。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 CAscade 深度强化学习框架 CADRE，以实现无模型的基于视觉的自动城市驾驶。在 CADRE 中，为了从原始观察中得出代表性的潜在特征，我们首先离线训练共同注意感知模块（CoPM），该模块利用共同注意机制从预先收集的驾驶数据集中学习视觉和控制信息之间的相互关系。通过冻结的 CoPM 级联，我们提出了一个高效的分布式近端策略优化框架，在专门设计的奖励函数的指导下在线学习驾驶策略。我们使用 CARLA NoCrash 基准以及自动城市驾驶任务中的特定避障场景进行了全面的实证研究。实验结果很好地证明了 CADRE 的有效性及其相对现有技术的大幅优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的自主城市驾驶框架CADRE，通过级联深度强化学习方法解决复杂交通环境下的自动驾驶问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖手工规则或有限人类经验，难以应对稀有但关键的复杂城市驾驶场景，需开发无需模型且泛化能力强的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用级联结构：首先通过离线训练的共注意感知模块（CoPM）提取视觉与控制信息的关联特征，再结合分布式近端策略优化框架在线学习驾驶策略。
AI.result: 在CARLA NoCrash基准测试及特定避障场景中，CADRE显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: CADRE通过级联深度强化学习框架有效解决了视觉自主城市驾驶的挑战，在复杂动态场景中表现出色。

search_text: CADRE: A Cascade Deep Reinforcement Learning Framework for Vision-based Autonomous Urban Driving CADRE：基于视觉的城市自主驾驶的级联深度强化学习框架 Vision-based autonomous urban driving in dense traffic is quite challenging due to the complicated urban environment and the dynamics of the driving behaviors. Widely-applied methods either heavily rely on hand-crafted rules or learn from limited human experience, which makes them hard to generalize to rare but critical scenarios. In this paper, we present a novel CAscade Deep REinforcement learning framework, CADRE, to achieve model-free vision-based autonomous urban driving. In CADRE, to derive representative latent features from raw observations, we first offline train a Co-attention Perception Module (CoPM) that leverages the co-attention mechanism to learn the inter-relationships between the visual and control information from a pre-collected driving dataset. Cascaded by the frozen CoPM, we then present an efficient distributed proximal policy optimization framework to online learn the driving policy under the guidance of particularly designed reward functions. We perform a comprehensive empirical study with the CARLA NoCrash benchmark as well as specific obstacle avoidance scenarios in autonomous urban driving tasks. The experimental results well justify the effectiveness of CADRE and its superiority over the state-of-the-art by a wide margin. 由于复杂的城市环境和驾驶行为的动态性，密集交通中基于视觉的城市自动驾驶非常具有挑战性。广泛应用的方法要么严重依赖手工制定的规则，要么从有限的人类经验中学习，这使得它们很难推广到罕见但关键的场景。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 CAscade 深度强化学习框架 CADRE，以实现无模型的基于视觉的自动城市驾驶。在 CADRE 中，为了从原始观察中得出代表性的潜在特征，我们首先离线训练共同注意感知模块（CoPM），该模块利用共同注意机制从预先收集的驾驶数据集中学习视觉和控制信息之间的相互关系。通过冻结的 CoPM 级联，我们提出了一个高效的分布式近端策略优化框架，在专门设计的奖励函数的指导下在线学习驾驶策略。我们使用 CARLA NoCrash 基准以及自动城市驾驶任务中的特定避障场景进行了全面的实证研究。实验结果很好地证明了 CADRE 的有效性及其相对现有技术的大幅优越性。 本文提出了一种基于视觉的自主城市驾驶框架CADRE，通过级联深度强化学习方法解决复杂交通环境下的自动驾驶问题。 Yinuo Zhao,Kun Wu,Zhiyuan Xu,Zhengping Che,Qi Lu,Jian Tang,Chi Harold Liu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Antoine Amarilli,Michael Benedikt,Pierre Bourhis,Michael Vanden Boom
title: Query Answering with Transitive and Linear-Ordered Data
title_zh: 使用传递性和线性有序数据进行查询应答
comment: This article was originally published at JAIR in 2018: https://www.jair.org/index.php/jair/article/view/11240 (DOI 10.1613/jair.1.11240). This version of the paper includes one modification from the publisher version: we fix an incorrect proof for one of our undecidability results (Theorem 6.2). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1607.00813
comments: This article was originally published at JAIR in 2018: https://www.jair.org/index.php/jair/article/view/11240 (DOI 10.1613/jair.1.11240). This version of the paper includes one modification from the publisher version: we fix an incorrect proof for one of our undecidability results (Theorem 6.2). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1607.00813
abstract: We consider entailment problems involving powerful constraint languages such as frontier-guarded existential rules in which we impose additional semantic restrictions on a set of distinguished relations. We consider restricting a relation to be transitive, restricting a relation to be the transitive closure of another relation, and restricting a relation to be a linear order. We give some natural variants of guardedness that allow inference to be decidable in each case, and isolate the complexity of the corresponding decision problems. Finally we show that slight changes in these conditions lead to undecidability.
summary: We consider entailment problems involving powerful constraint languages such as frontier-guarded existential rules in which we impose additional semantic restrictions on a set of distinguished relations. We consider restricting a relation to be transitive, restricting a relation to be the transitive closure of another relation, and restricting a relation to be a linear order. We give some natural variants of guardedness that allow inference to be decidable in each case, and isolate the complexity of the corresponding decision problems. Finally we show that slight changes in these conditions lead to undecidability.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑涉及强大约束语言的蕴涵问题，例如边界守卫的存在规则，其中我们对一组区别关系施加额外的语义限制。我们考虑将一个关系限制为传递性，将一个关系限制为另一个关系的传递闭包，并将一个关系限制为线性顺序。我们给出了一些自然的防护变体，允许推理在每种情况下都是可判定的，并隔离相应决策问题的复杂性。最后我们证明这些条件的微小变化会导致不可判定性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在具有传递性和线性序关系的数据约束下，查询回答的可判定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有约束语言（如前沿守卫存在规则）在处理传递、传递闭包及线性序关系时存在语义限制，需明确其推理可判定性边界。
AI.method: 提出若干守卫条件变体，确保在传递性、传递闭包及线性序约束下推理可判定，并分析对应决策问题的复杂度。
AI.result: 确定了上述约束下推理的可判定条件，证明条件微调即导致不可判定性，明确了复杂度界限。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义约束可维持推理可判定性，但约束条件的细微变化将破坏判定性，为相关领域提供理论依据。

authors_text: Zifan Shi,Yujun Shen,Jiapeng Zhu,Dit-Yan Yeung,Qifeng Chen
title: 3D-Aware Indoor Scene Synthesis with Depth Priors
title_zh: 具有深度先验的 3D 感知室内场景合成
abstract: Despite the recent advancement of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) in learning 3D-aware image synthesis from 2D data, existing methods fail to model indoor scenes due to the large diversity of room layouts and the objects inside. We argue that indoor scenes do not have a shared intrinsic structure, and hence only using 2D images cannot adequately guide the model with the 3D geometry. In this work, we fill in this gap by introducing depth as a 3D prior. Compared with other 3D data formats, depth better fits the convolution-based generation mechanism and is more easily accessible in practice. Specifically, we propose a dual-path generator, where one path is responsible for depth generation, whose intermediate features are injected into the other path as the condition for appearance rendering. Such a design eases the 3D-aware synthesis with explicit geometry information. Meanwhile, we introduce a switchable discriminator both to differentiate real v.s. fake domains and to predict the depth from a given input. In this way, the discriminator can take the spatial arrangement into account and advise the generator to learn an appropriate depth condition. Extensive experimental results suggest that our approach is capable of synthesizing indoor scenes with impressively good quality and 3D consistency, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art alternatives.
summary: Despite the recent advancement of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) in learning 3D-aware image synthesis from 2D data, existing methods fail to model indoor scenes due to the large diversity of room layouts and the objects inside. We argue that indoor scenes do not have a shared intrinsic structure, and hence only using 2D images cannot adequately guide the model with the 3D geometry. In this work, we fill in this gap by introducing depth as a 3D prior. Compared with other 3D data formats, depth better fits the convolution-based generation mechanism and is more easily accessible in practice. Specifically, we propose a dual-path generator, where one path is responsible for depth generation, whose intermediate features are injected into the other path as the condition for appearance rendering. Such a design eases the 3D-aware synthesis with explicit geometry information. Meanwhile, we introduce a switchable discriminator both to differentiate real v.s. fake domains and to predict the depth from a given input. In this way, the discriminator can take the spatial arrangement into account and advise the generator to learn an appropriate depth condition. Extensive experimental results suggest that our approach is capable of synthesizing indoor scenes with impressively good quality and 3D consistency, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art alternatives.
abstract_zh: 尽管生成对抗网络 (GAN) 最近在从 2D 数据学习 3D 感知图像合成方面取得了进展，但由于房间布局和内部物体的多样性，现有方法无法对室内场景进行建模。我们认为室内场景不具有共享的内在结构，因此仅使用 2D 图像无法充分指导具有 3D 几何结构的模型。在这项工作中，我们通过引入深度作为 3D 先验来填补这一空白。与其他 3D 数据格式相比，深度更适合基于卷积的生成机制，并且在实践中更容易访问。具体来说，我们提出了一种双路径生成器，其中一条路径负责深度生成，其中间特征被注入另一条路径作为外观渲染的条件。这种设计简化了具有显式几何信息的 3D 感知合成。同时，我们引入了一个可切换的鉴别器来区分真实的和真实的。假域并预测给定输入的深度。通过这种方式，鉴别器可以考虑空间排列并建议生成器学习适当的深度条件。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法能够合成具有令人印象深刻的良好质量和 3D 一致性的室内场景，显着优于最先进的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度先验的3D感知室内场景合成方法，通过引入深度信息解决现有方法在室内场景生成中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有生成对抗网络（GAN）方法难以建模室内场景，因房间布局和物体多样性导致2D图像无法充分指导3D几何生成。
AI.method: 设计双路径生成器（一路径生成深度，另一路径渲染外观并注入深度特征），结合可切换判别器同时区分真实/虚假域并预测深度。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在室内场景合成质量与3D一致性上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 深度先验有效辅助3D感知生成，所提框架能更好捕捉室内场景的空间结构特性。
