method: 设计双路径生成器（一路径生成深度，另一路径渲染外观并注入深度特征），结合可切换判别器同时区分真实/虚假域并预测深度。
result: 实验表明该方法在室内场景合成质量与3D一致性上显著优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 深度先验有效辅助3D感知生成，所提框架能更好捕捉室内场景的空间结构特性。
search_text: 3D-Aware Indoor Scene Synthesis with Depth Priors 具有深度先验的 3D 感知室内场景合成 Despite the recent advancement of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) in learning 3D-aware image synthesis from 2D data, existing methods fail to model indoor scenes due to the large diversity of room layouts and the objects inside. We argue that indoor scenes do not have a shared intrinsic structure, and hence only using 2D images cannot adequately guide the model with the 3D geometry. In this work, we fill in this gap by introducing depth as a 3D prior. Compared with other 3D data formats, depth better fits the convolution-based generation mechanism and is more easily accessible in practice. Specifically, we propose a dual-path generator, where one path is responsible for depth generation, whose intermediate features are injected into the other path as the condition for appearance rendering. Such a design eases the 3D-aware synthesis with explicit geometry information. Meanwhile, we introduce a switchable discriminator both to differentiate real v.s. fake domains and to predict the depth from a given input. In this way, the discriminator can take the spatial arrangement into account and advise the generator to learn an appropriate depth condition. Extensive experimental results suggest that our approach is capable of synthesizing indoor scenes with impressively good quality and 3D consistency, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art alternatives. 尽管生成对抗网络 (GAN) 最近在从 2D 数据学习 3D 感知图像合成方面取得了进展，但由于房间布局和内部物体的多样性，现有方法无法对室内场景进行建模。我们认为室内场景不具有共享的内在结构，因此仅使用 2D 图像无法充分指导具有 3D 几何结构的模型。在这项工作中，我们通过引入深度作为 3D 先验来填补这一空白。与其他 3D 数据格式相比，深度更适合基于卷积的生成机制，并且在实践中更容易访问。具体来说，我们提出了一种双路径生成器，其中一条路径负责深度生成，其中间特征被注入另一条路径作为外观渲染的条件。这种设计简化了具有显式几何信息的 3D 感知合成。同时，我们引入了一个可切换的鉴别器来区分真实的和真实的。假域并预测给定输入的深度。通过这种方式，鉴别器可以考虑空间排列并建议生成器学习适当的深度条件。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法能够合成具有令人印象深刻的良好质量和 3D 一致性的室内场景，显着优于最先进的替代方案。 本文提出一种基于深度先验的3D感知室内场景合成方法，通过引入深度信息解决现有方法在室内场景生成中的不足。 Zifan Shi,Yujun Shen,Jiapeng Zhu,Dit-Yan Yeung,Qifeng Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Weiming Hu,Chen Li,Xiaoyan Li,Md Mamunur Rahaman,Yong Zhang,Haoyuan Chen,Wanli Liu,Yudong Yao,Hongzan Sun,Ning Xu,Xinyu Huang,Marcin Grzegorze
title: EBHI:A New Enteroscope Biopsy Histopathological H&E Image Dataset for Image Classification Evaluation
title_zh: EBHI：用于图像分类评估的新肠镜活检组织病理学 H&E 图像数据集
abstract: Background and purpose: Colorectal cancer has become the third most common cancer worldwide, accounting for approximately 10% of cancer patients. Early detection of the disease is important for the treatment of colorectal cancer patients. Histopathological examination is the gold standard for screening colorectal cancer. However, the current lack of histopathological image datasets of colorectal cancer, especially enteroscope biopsies, hinders the accurate evaluation of computer-aided diagnosis techniques. Methods: A new publicly available Enteroscope Biopsy Histopathological H&E Image Dataset (EBHI) is published in this paper. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the EBHI dataset, we have utilized several machine learning, convolutional neural networks and novel transformer-based classifiers for experimentation and evaluation, using an image with a magnification of 200x. Results: Experimental results show that the deep learning method performs well on the EBHI dataset. Traditional machine learning methods achieve maximum accuracy of 76.02% and deep learning method achieves a maximum accuracy of 95.37%. Conclusion: To the best of our knowledge, EBHI is the first publicly available colorectal histopathology enteroscope biopsy dataset with four magnifications and five types of images of tumor differentiation stages, totaling 5532 images. We believe that EBHI could attract researchers to explore new classification algorithms for the automated diagnosis of colorectal cancer, which could help physicians and patients in clinical settings.
summary: Background and purpose: Colorectal cancer has become the third most common cancer worldwide, accounting for approximately 10% of cancer patients. Early detection of the disease is important for the treatment of colorectal cancer patients. Histopathological examination is the gold standard for screening colorectal cancer. However, the current lack of histopathological image datasets of colorectal cancer, especially enteroscope biopsies, hinders the accurate evaluation of computer-aided diagnosis techniques. Methods: A new publicly available Enteroscope Biopsy Histopathological H&E Image Dataset (EBHI) is published in this paper. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the EBHI dataset, we have utilized several machine learning, convolutional neural networks and novel transformer-based classifiers for experimentation and evaluation, using an image with a magnification of 200x. Results: Experimental results show that the deep learning method performs well on the EBHI dataset. Traditional machine learning methods achieve maximum accuracy of 76.02% and deep learning method achieves a maximum accuracy of 95.37%. Conclusion: To the best of our knowledge, EBHI is the first publicly available colorectal histopathology enteroscope biopsy dataset with four magnifications and five types of images of tumor differentiation stages, totaling 5532 images. We believe that EBHI could attract researchers to explore new classification algorithms for the automated diagnosis of colorectal cancer, which could help physicians and patients in clinical settings.
abstract_zh: 背景与目的：结直肠癌已成为全球第三大常见癌症，约占癌症患者的10%。早期发现该疾病对于结直肠癌患者的治疗非常重要。组织病理学检查是筛查结直肠癌的金标准。然而，目前结直肠癌尤其是肠镜活检组织病理学图像数据集的缺乏，阻碍了计算机辅助诊断技术的准确评估。方法：本文发表了一个新的公开可用的肠镜活检组织病理学 H&E 图像数据集 (EBHI)。为了证明 EBHI 数据集的有效性，我们利用多种机器学习、卷积神经网络和基于 Transformer 的新型分类器进行实验和评估，并使用放大 200 倍的图像。结果：实验结果表明深度学习方法在EBHI数据集上表现良好。传统机器学习方法的最大准确率达到76.02%，深度学习方法的最大准确率达到95.37%。结论：据我们所知，EBHI是第一个公开的结直肠组织病理学肠镜活检数据集，具有四种放大倍率和五种肿瘤分化阶段图像，总计5532张图像。我们相信 EBHI 可以吸引研究人员探索用于结直肠癌自动诊断的新分类算法，这可以帮助临床环境中的医生和患者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了一个新的肠镜活检组织病理学H&E图像数据集（EBHI），用于结直肠癌的图像分类评估。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏结直肠癌尤其是肠镜活检的组织病理学图像数据集，限制了计算机辅助诊断技术的准确评估。
AI.method: 构建包含5532张图像的EBHI数据集（含四种放大倍数和五种肿瘤分化阶段），采用传统机器学习、卷积神经网络及基于Transformer的分类器进行实验，使用200倍放大图像进行评估。
AI.result: 传统机器学习方法最高准确率为76.02%，深度学习方法最高准确率达95.37%。
AI.conclusion: EBHI是首个公开的包含四种放大倍数和五种肿瘤分化阶段的结直肠组织病理学肠镜活检数据集，有望推动自动诊断算法研究，助力临床诊疗。

authors_text: Nika Haghtalab,Yanjun Han,Abhishek Shetty,Kunhe Yang
title: Oracle-Efficient Online Learning for Beyond Worst-Case Adversaries
title_zh: Oracle 高效在线学习，应对最坏情况下的对手
comment: An extended abstract of this work was published under the title "Oracle-efficient Online Learning for Smoothed Adversaries'' in the Proceedings of the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
comments: An extended abstract of this work was published under the title "Oracle-efficient Online Learning for Smoothed Adversaries'' in the Proceedings of the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
abstract: In this paper, we study oracle-efficient algorithms for beyond worst-case analysis of online learning. We focus on two settings. First, the smoothed analysis setting of [RST11,HRS22] where an adversary is constrained to generating samples from distributions whose density is upper bounded by $1/σ$ times the uniform density. Second, the setting of $K$-hint transductive learning, where the learner is given access to $K$ hints per time step that are guaranteed to include the true instance. We give the first known oracle-efficient algorithms for both settings that depend only on the pseudo (or VC) dimension of the class and parameters $σ$ and $K$ that capture the power of the adversary. In particular, we achieve oracle-efficient regret bounds of $ \widetilde{O} ( \sqrt{T dσ^{-1}} ) $ and $ \widetilde{O} ( \sqrt{T dK} ) $ for learning real-valued functions and $ O ( \sqrt{T dσ^{-\frac{1}{2}} } )$ for learning binary-valued functions. For the smoothed analysis setting, our results give the first oracle-efficient algorithm for online learning with smoothed adversaries [HRS22]. This contrasts the computational separation between online learning with worst-case adversaries and offline learning established by [HK16]. Our algorithms also achieve improved bounds for worst-case setting with small domains. In particular, we give an oracle-efficient algorithm with regret of $O ( \sqrt{T(d |\mathcal{X}|)^{1/2} })$, which is a refinement of the earlier $O ( \sqrt{T|\mathcal{X}|})$ bound by [DS16].
summary: In this paper, we study oracle-efficient algorithms for beyond worst-case analysis of online learning. We focus on two settings. First, the smoothed analysis setting of [RST11,HRS22] where an adversary is constrained to generating samples from distributions whose density is upper bounded by $1/σ$ times the uniform density. Second, the setting of $K$-hint transductive learning, where the learner is given access to $K$ hints per time step that are guaranteed to include the true instance. We give the first known oracle-efficient algorithms for both settings that depend only on the pseudo (or VC) dimension of the class and parameters $σ$ and $K$ that capture the power of the adversary. In particular, we achieve oracle-efficient regret bounds of $ \widetilde{O} ( \sqrt{T dσ^{-1}} ) $ and $ \widetilde{O} ( \sqrt{T dK} ) $ for learning real-valued functions and $ O ( \sqrt{T dσ^{-\frac{1}{2}} } )$ for learning binary-valued functions. For the smoothed analysis setting, our results give the first oracle-efficient algorithm for online learning with smoothed adversaries [HRS22]. This contrasts the computational separation between online learning with worst-case adversaries and offline learning established by [HK16]. Our algorithms also achieve improved bounds for worst-case setting with small domains. In particular, we give an oracle-efficient algorithm with regret of $O ( \sqrt{T(d |\mathcal{X}|)^{1/2} })$, which is a refinement of the earlier $O ( \sqrt{T|\mathcal{X}|})$ bound by [DS16].
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了预言机高效算法，用于超越在线学习的最坏情况分析。我们关注两个设置。首先，[RST11，HRS22] 的平滑分析设置，其中对手被限制从密度上限为 $1/σ$ 乘以均匀密度的分布生成样本。其次，$K$ 提示转导学习的设置，其中学习者可以在每个时间步访问 $K$ 提示，并保证包含真实实例。我们给出了第一个已知的预言机高效算法，这两种设置仅依赖于类的伪（或 VC）维度以及捕获对手力量的参数 $σ$ 和 $K$。特别是，我们在学习实值函数时实现了 $ \widetilde{O} ( \sqrt{T dσ^{-1}} ) $ 和 $ \widetilde{O} ( \sqrt{T dK} ) $ 的预言机效率后悔界限，在学习二值函数时实现了 $ O ( \sqrt{T dσ^{-\frac{1}{2}} } )$ 。对于平滑分析设置，我们的结果给出了第一个用于平滑对手在线学习的预言机高效算法 [HRS22]。这与[HK16]建立的最坏情况对手的在线学习和离线学习之间的计算分离形成了对比。我们的算法还实现了小域最坏情况设置的改进界限。特别是，我们给出了一个遗憾的是 $O ( \sqrt{T(d |\mathcal{X}|)^{1/2} })$ 的预言机效率算法，这是对早期受 [DS16] 约束的 $O ( \sqrt{T|\mathcal{X}|})$ 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线学习中超越最坏情况分析的高效算法，针对平滑分析和K提示转导学习两种场景提出新的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有在线学习算法在最坏情况下表现不佳，且难以处理平滑分布或带有提示信息的场景，需设计更高效的算法以适应实际对手模型。
AI.method: 基于伪维度（或VC维）及参数σ、K设计高效算法，分别针对平滑分析场景和K提示转导学习场景，结合对抗样本分布特性与提示信息进行优化。
AI.result: 提出首类仅依赖伪维度的高效算法，实现实数函数的$\\widetilde{O}(\\sqrt{Tdσ^{-1}})$和$\\widetilde{O}(\\sqrt{TdK})$后悔界，二值函数的$O(\\sqrt{Tdσ^{-1/2}})$界，并改进小域最坏情况下的后悔界。
AI.conclusion: 算法在平滑对手和提示信息场景下实现计算效率与理论保证的平衡，揭示了在线学习与离线学习在计算复杂度上的差异，并为实际应用提供更优方案。

result: 提出首类仅依赖伪维度的高效算法，实现实数函数的$\\widetilde{O}(\\sqrt{Tdσ^{-1}})$和$\\widetilde{O}(\\sqrt{TdK})$后悔界，二值函数的$O(\\sqrt{Tdσ^{-1/2}})$界，并改进小域最坏情况下的后悔界。
conclusion: 算法在平滑对手和提示信息场景下实现计算效率与理论保证的平衡，揭示了在线学习与离线学习在计算复杂度上的差异，并为实际应用提供更优方案。
search_text: Oracle-Efficient Online Learning for Beyond Worst-Case Adversaries Oracle 高效在线学习，应对最坏情况下的对手 In this paper, we study oracle-efficient algorithms for beyond worst-case analysis of online learning. We focus on two settings. First, the smoothed analysis setting of [RST11,HRS22] where an adversary is constrained to generating samples from distributions whose density is upper bounded by $1/σ$ times the uniform density. Second, the setting of $K$-hint transductive learning, where the learner is given access to $K$ hints per time step that are guaranteed to include the true instance. We give the first known oracle-efficient algorithms for both settings that depend only on the pseudo (or VC) dimension of the class and parameters $σ$ and $K$ that capture the power of the adversary. In particular, we achieve oracle-efficient regret bounds of $ \widetilde{O} ( \sqrt{T dσ^{-1}} ) $ and $ \widetilde{O} ( \sqrt{T dK} ) $ for learning real-valued functions and $ O ( \sqrt{T dσ^{-\frac{1}{2}} } )$ for learning binary-valued functions. For the smoothed analysis setting, our results give the first oracle-efficient algorithm for online learning with smoothed adversaries [HRS22]. This contrasts the computational separation between online learning with worst-case adversaries and offline learning established by [HK16]. Our algorithms also achieve improved bounds for worst-case setting with small domains. In particular, we give an oracle-efficient algorithm with regret of $O ( \sqrt{T(d |\mathcal{X}|)^{1/2} })$, which is a refinement of the earlier $O ( \sqrt{T|\mathcal{X}|})$ bound by [DS16]. 在本文中，我们研究了预言机高效算法，用于超越在线学习的最坏情况分析。我们关注两个设置。首先，[RST11，HRS22] 的平滑分析设置，其中对手被限制从密度上限为 $1/σ$ 乘以均匀密度的分布生成样本。其次，$K$ 提示转导学习的设置，其中学习者可以在每个时间步访问 $K$ 提示，并保证包含真实实例。我们给出了第一个已知的预言机高效算法，这两种设置仅依赖于类的伪（或 VC）维度以及捕获对手力量的参数 $σ$ 和 $K$。特别是，我们在学习实值函数时实现了 $ \widetilde{O} ( \sqrt{T dσ^{-1}} ) $ 和 $ \widetilde{O} ( \sqrt{T dK} ) $ 的预言机效率后悔界限，在学习二值函数时实现了 $ O ( \sqrt{T dσ^{-\frac{1}{2}} } )$ 。对于平滑分析设置，我们的结果给出了第一个用于平滑对手在线学习的预言机高效算法 [HRS22]。这与[HK16]建立的最坏情况对手的在线学习和离线学习之间的计算分离形成了对比。我们的算法还实现了小域最坏情况设置的改进界限。特别是，我们给出了一个遗憾的是 $O ( \sqrt{T(d |\mathcal{X}|)^{1/2} })$ 的预言机效率算法，这是对早期受 [DS16] 约束的 $O ( \sqrt{T|\mathcal{X}|})$ 的改进。 本文研究了在线学习中超越最坏情况分析的高效算法，针对平滑分析和K提示转导学习两种场景提出新的算法。 Nika Haghtalab,Yanjun Han,Abhishek Shetty,Kunhe Yang cs.LG,cs.DS,stat.ML

authors_text: Imran Ul Haq
title: An overview of deep learning in medical imaging
title_zh: 医学影像深度学习概述
abstract: Machine learning (ML) has seen enormous consideration during the most recent decade. This success started in 2012 when an ML model accomplished a remarkable triumph in the ImageNet Classification, the world's most famous competition for computer vision. This model was a kind of convolutional neural system (CNN) called deep learning (DL). Since then, researchers have started to participate efficiently in DL's fastest developing area of research. These days, DL systems are cutting-edge ML systems spanning a broad range of disciplines, from human language processing to video analysis, and commonly used in the scholarly world and enterprise sector. Recent advances can bring tremendous improvement to the medical field. Improved and innovative methods for data processing, image analysis and can significantly improve the diagnostic technologies and medicinal services gradually. A quick review of current developments with relevant problems in the field of DL used for medical imaging has been provided. The primary purposes of the review are four: (i) provide a brief prolog to DL by discussing different DL models, (ii) review of the DL usage for medical image analysis (classification, detection, segmentation, and registration), (iii) review seven main application fields of DL in medical imaging, (iv) give an initial stage to those keen on adding to the research area about DL in clinical imaging by providing links of some useful informative assets, such as freely available DL codes, public datasets Table 7, and medical imaging competition sources Table 8 and end our survey by outlining distinct continuous difficulties, lessons learned and future of DL in the field of medical science.

abstract_zh: 近十年来，机器学习 (ML) 得到了广泛的关注。这一成功始于 2012 年，当时 ML 模型在 ImageNet 分类（世界上最著名的计算机视觉竞赛）中取得了令人瞩目的胜利。该模型是一种称为深度学习 (DL) 的卷积神经系统 (CNN)。从那时起，研究人员开始有效地参与深度学习发展最快的研究领域。如今，深度学习系统是尖端的机器学习系统，涵盖从人类语言处理到视频分析等广泛学科，并普遍用于学术界和企业领域。最近的进展可以给医学领域带来巨大的进步。数据处理、图像分析方法的改进和创新可以逐步显着改善诊断技术和医疗服务。快速回顾了用于医学成像的深度学习领域的当前发展和相关问题。这篇综述的主要目的有四个：(i) 通过讨论不同的 DL 模型为 DL 提供一个简短的序言，(ii) 回顾 DL 在医学图像分析中的使用（分类、检测、分割和配准），(iii) 回顾 DL 在医学成像中的七个主要应用领域，(iv) 通过提供一些有用的信息资产的链接，例如免费提供的 DL 代码、公共数据集表 7 和医学，为那些热衷于在临床成像中添加 DL 研究领域的人提供一个初始阶段成像竞争来源表 8 并概述了 DL 在医学领域持续存在的明显困难、经验教训和未来，结束了我们的调查。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习在医学影像领域的应用，涵盖模型介绍、分析方法、应用场景及未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学影像分析中展现出显著潜力，但需系统梳理其发展现状、应用问题及研究资源以推动领域进步。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，分类讨论深度学习模型，分析其在医学影像分类、检测、分割等任务中的应用，并总结公开数据集、代码及竞赛资源。
AI.result: 总结了七类医学影像应用领域，提供了关键数据集与工具链接，指出现有技术挑战如数据不足、模型可解释性及跨机构协作难题。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习革新了医学影像分析，但需解决数据标准化、算法可靠性等问题，未来需加强多学科合作与临床验证。

authors_text: Alkida Balliu,Sebastian Brandt,Yi-Jun Chang,Dennis Olivetti,Jan Studený,Jukka Suomela
title: Efficient Classification of Locally Checkable Problems in Regular Trees
title_zh: 正则树中局部可检查问题的高效分类
abstract: We give practical, efficient algorithms that automatically determine the asymptotic distributed round complexity of a given locally checkable graph problem in the $[Θ(\log n), Θ(n)]$ region, in two settings. We present one algorithm for unrooted regular trees and another algorithm for rooted regular trees. The algorithms take the description of a locally checkable labeling problem as input, and the running time is polynomial in the size of the problem description. The algorithms decide if the problem is solvable in $O(\log n)$ rounds. If not, it is known that the complexity has to be $Θ(n^{1/k})$ for some $k = 1, 2, \dotsc$, and in this case the algorithms also output the right value of the exponent $k$. In rooted trees in the $O(\log n)$ case we can then further determine the exact complexity class by using algorithms from prior work; for unrooted trees the more fine-grained classification in the $O(\log n)$ region remains an open question.
summary: We give practical, efficient algorithms that automatically determine the asymptotic distributed round complexity of a given locally checkable graph problem in the $[Θ(\log n), Θ(n)]$ region, in two settings. We present one algorithm for unrooted regular trees and another algorithm for rooted regular trees. The algorithms take the description of a locally checkable labeling problem as input, and the running time is polynomial in the size of the problem description. The algorithms decide if the problem is solvable in $O(\log n)$ rounds. If not, it is known that the complexity has to be $Θ(n^{1/k})$ for some $k = 1, 2, \dotsc$, and in this case the algorithms also output the right value of the exponent $k$. In rooted trees in the $O(\log n)$ case we can then further determine the exact complexity class by using algorithms from prior work; for unrooted trees the more fine-grained classification in the $O(\log n)$ region remains an open question.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了实用、高效的算法，可以在两种设置下自动确定 $[θ(\log n), θ(n)]$ 区域中给定局部可检查图问题的渐近分布式轮复杂度。我们提出了一种用于无根常规树的算法和另一种用于有根常规树的算法。该算法将本地可检查的标记问题的描述作为输入，并且运行时间是问题描述的大小的多项式。算法决定问题是否可以在 $O(\log n)$ 轮内解决。如果不是，则已知对于某些 $k = 1, 2, \dotsc$，复杂度必须为 $θ(n^{1/k})$，在这种情况下，算法还会输出指数 $k$ 的正确值。在 $O(\log n)$ 情况下的有根树中，我们可以使用先前工作中的算法进一步确定确切的复杂性类别；对于无根树，$O(\log n)$ 区域中更细粒度的分类仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了在正则树（无根树和有根树）中，针对局部可检查图问题自动计算其渐近分布式轮复杂度的实用高效算法，覆盖[Θ(log n), Θ(n)]区域。
AI.motivation: 现有的理论结果已经刻画了局部可检查问题在正则树中的分布式轮复杂度，但缺乏自动判定给定问题具体复杂度的实用算法，因此需要高效的自动化分类工具。
AI.method: 设计了两种多项式时间算法：一种针对无根正则树，另一种针对有根正则树。算法以局部可检查标号问题的描述为输入，先判断问题是否可在O(log n)轮内解决，若否则输出Θ(n^{1/k})中正确的指数k。
AI.result: 算法能自动判定问题在O(log n)轮内是否可解；若不可解，能精确输出对应的指数k（复杂度为Θ(n^{1/k})）。在有根树O(log n)情形下可结合已有算法进一步细化分类，无根树O(log n)区域的细粒度分类仍是开放问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文为局部可检查问题在正则树中的分布式轮复杂度提供了实用的自动化判定工具，填补了理论结果与实际算法之间的空白，并指出了未来的研究方向。

motivation: 现有的理论结果已经刻画了局部可检查问题在正则树中的分布式轮复杂度，但缺乏自动判定给定问题具体复杂度的实用算法，因此需要高效的自动化分类工具。
method: 设计了两种多项式时间算法：一种针对无根正则树，另一种针对有根正则树。算法以局部可检查标号问题的描述为输入，先判断问题是否可在O(log n)轮内解决，若否则输出Θ(n^{1/k})中正确的指数k。
result: 算法能自动判定问题在O(log n)轮内是否可解；若不可解，能精确输出对应的指数k（复杂度为Θ(n^{1/k})）。在有根树O(log n)情形下可结合已有算法进一步细化分类，无根树O(log n)区域的细粒度分类仍是开放问题。
conclusion: 本文为局部可检查问题在正则树中的分布式轮复杂度提供了实用的自动化判定工具，填补了理论结果与实际算法之间的空白，并指出了未来的研究方向。
search_text: Efficient Classification of Locally Checkable Problems in Regular Trees 正则树中局部可检查问题的高效分类 We give practical, efficient algorithms that automatically determine the asymptotic distributed round complexity of a given locally checkable graph problem in the $[Θ(\log n), Θ(n)]$ region, in two settings. We present one algorithm for unrooted regular trees and another algorithm for rooted regular trees. The algorithms take the description of a locally checkable labeling problem as input, and the running time is polynomial in the size of the problem description. The algorithms decide if the problem is solvable in $O(\log n)$ rounds. If not, it is known that the complexity has to be $Θ(n^{1/k})$ for some $k = 1, 2, \dotsc$, and in this case the algorithms also output the right value of the exponent $k$. In rooted trees in the $O(\log n)$ case we can then further determine the exact complexity class by using algorithms from prior work; for unrooted trees the more fine-grained classification in the $O(\log n)$ region remains an open question. 我们给出了实用、高效的算法，可以在两种设置下自动确定 $[θ(\log n), θ(n)]$ 区域中给定局部可检查图问题的渐近分布式轮复杂度。我们提出了一种用于无根常规树的算法和另一种用于有根常规树的算法。该算法将本地可检查的标记问题的描述作为输入，并且运行时间是问题描述的大小的多项式。算法决定问题是否可以在 $O(\log n)$ 轮内解决。如果不是，则已知对于某些 $k = 1, 2, \dotsc$，复杂度必须为 $θ(n^{1/k})$，在这种情况下，算法还会输出指数 $k$ 的正确值。在 $O(\log n)$ 情况下的有根树中，我们可以使用先前工作中的算法进一步确定确切的复杂性类别；对于无根树，$O(\log n)$ 区域中更细粒度的分类仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。 本文提出了在正则树（无根树和有根树）中，针对局部可检查图问题自动计算其渐近分布式轮复杂度的实用高效算法，覆盖[Θ(log n), Θ(n)]区域。 Alkida Balliu,Sebastian Brandt,Yi-Jun Chang,Dennis Olivetti,Jan Studený,Jukka Suomela cs.DC,cs.DS

authors_text: Yu-Wei Chen,Soo-Chang Pei
title: Domain Adaptation for Underwater Image Enhancement via Content and Style Separation
title_zh: 通过内容和风格分离进行水下图像增强的域适应
comment: revised paper and add more description
comments: revised paper and add more description
abstract: Underwater image suffer from color cast, low contrast and hazy effect due to light absorption, refraction and scattering, which degraded the high-level application, e.g, object detection and object tracking. Recent learning-based methods demonstrate astonishing performance on underwater image enhancement, however, most of these works use synthetic pair data for supervised learning and ignore the domain gap to real-world data. To solve this problem, we propose a domain adaptation framework for underwater image enhancement via content and style separation, different from prior works of domain adaptation for underwater image enhancement, which target to minimize the latent discrepancy of synthesis and real-world data, we aim to separate encoded feature into content and style latent and distinguish style latent from different domains, i.e. synthesis, real-world underwater and clean domain, and process domain adaptation and image enhancement in latent space. By latent manipulation, our model provide a user interact interface to adjust different enhanced level for continuous change. Experiment on various public real-world underwater benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed framework is capable to perform domain adaptation for underwater image enhancement and outperform various state-of-the-art underwater image enhancement algorithms in quantity and quality. The model and source code will be available at https://github.com/fordevoted/UIESS
summary: Underwater image suffer from color cast, low contrast and hazy effect due to light absorption, refraction and scattering, which degraded the high-level application, e.g, object detection and object tracking. Recent learning-based methods demonstrate astonishing performance on underwater image enhancement, however, most of these works use synthetic pair data for supervised learning and ignore the domain gap to real-world data. To solve this problem, we propose a domain adaptation framework for underwater image enhancement via content and style separation, different from prior works of domain adaptation for underwater image enhancement, which target to minimize the latent discrepancy of synthesis and real-world data, we aim to separate encoded feature into content and style latent and distinguish style latent from different domains, i.e. synthesis, real-world underwater and clean domain, and process domain adaptation and image enhancement in latent space. By latent manipulation, our model provide a user interact interface to adjust different enhanced level for continuous change. Experiment on various public real-world underwater benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed framework is capable to perform domain adaptation for underwater image enhancement and outperform various state-of-the-art underwater image enhancement algorithms in quantity and quality. The model and source code will be available at https://github.com/fordevoted/UIESS
abstract_zh: 水下图像由于光吸收、折射和散射而出现偏色、低对比度和模糊效果，这降低了目标检测和目标跟踪等高级应用的性能。最近基于学习的方法在水下图像增强方面表现出了惊人的性能，然而，这些工作大多数使用合成对数据进行监督学习，并忽略了与现实世界数据的域差距。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种通过内容和风格分离进行水下图像增强的领域适应框架，与之前的水下图像增强领域适应工作不同，其目标是最小化合成和真实世界数据的潜在差异，我们的目标是将编码特征分离为内容和风格潜在，并区分来自不同领域的风格潜在，即合成、真实水下和干净域，并在潜在空间中处理域适应和图像增强。通过潜在的操作，我们的模型提供了一个用户交互界面来调整不同的增强级别以实现持续变化。对各种公共现实世界水下基准的实验表明，所提出的框架能够执行水下图像增强的域自适应，并在数量和质量上优于各种最先进的水下图像增强算法。模型和源代码可在 https://github.com/fordevoted/UIESS 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过内容与风格分离的域适应框架，用于增强水下图像，以解决真实场景与合成数据间的域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 现有水下图像增强方法依赖合成数据进行监督学习，忽视了合成数据与真实世界数据间的域差距，导致实际应用效果受限。
AI.method: 通过分离编码特征为内容和风格潜变量，区分不同域（合成、真实水下、干净图像）的风格潜变量，并在潜空间中进行域适应与图像增强，同时提供用户交互接口调整增强效果。
AI.result: 在多个真实水下基准数据集上实验表明，该框架在数量和质量上优于现有最先进的水下图像增强算法，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过内容与风格分离实现有效的域适应，提升了水下图像增强效果，并支持用户自定义调整增强程度。

authors_text: Hilde Weerts,Lambèr Royakkers,Mykola Pechenizkiy
title: Are There Exceptions to Goodhart's Law? On the Moral Justification of Fairness-Aware Machine Learning
title_zh: 古德哈特定律有例外吗？论公平意识机器学习的道德正当性
abstract: Fairness-aware machine learning (fair-ml) techniques are algorithmic interventions designed to ensure that individuals who are affected by the predictions of a machine learning model are treated fairly. The problem is often posed as an optimization problem, where the objective is to achieve high predictive performance under a quantitative fairness constraint. However, any attempt to design a fair-ml algorithm must assume a world where Goodhart's law has an exception: when a fairness measure becomes an optimization constraint, it does not cease to be a good measure. In this paper, we argue that fairness measures are particularly sensitive to Goodhart's law. Our main contributions are as follows. First, we present a framework for moral reasoning about the justification of fairness metrics. In contrast to existing work, our framework incorporates the belief that whether a distribution of outcomes is fair, depends not only on the cause of inequalities but also on what moral claims decision subjects have to receive a particular benefit or avoid a burden. We use the framework to distil moral and empirical assumptions under which particular fairness metrics correspond to a fair distribution of outcomes. Second, we explore the extent to which employing fairness metrics as a constraint in a fair-ml algorithm is morally justifiable, exemplified by the fair-ml algorithm introduced by Hardt et al. (2016). We illustrate that enforcing a fairness metric through a fair-ml algorithm often does not result in the fair distribution of outcomes that motivated its use and can even harm the individuals the intervention was intended to protect.
summary: Fairness-aware machine learning (fair-ml) techniques are algorithmic interventions designed to ensure that individuals who are affected by the predictions of a machine learning model are treated fairly. The problem is often posed as an optimization problem, where the objective is to achieve high predictive performance under a quantitative fairness constraint. However, any attempt to design a fair-ml algorithm must assume a world where Goodhart's law has an exception: when a fairness measure becomes an optimization constraint, it does not cease to be a good measure. In this paper, we argue that fairness measures are particularly sensitive to Goodhart's law. Our main contributions are as follows. First, we present a framework for moral reasoning about the justification of fairness metrics. In contrast to existing work, our framework incorporates the belief that whether a distribution of outcomes is fair, depends not only on the cause of inequalities but also on what moral claims decision subjects have to receive a particular benefit or avoid a burden. We use the framework to distil moral and empirical assumptions under which particular fairness metrics correspond to a fair distribution of outcomes. Second, we explore the extent to which employing fairness metrics as a constraint in a fair-ml algorithm is morally justifiable, exemplified by the fair-ml algorithm introduced by Hardt et al. (2016). We illustrate that enforcing a fairness metric through a fair-ml algorithm often does not result in the fair distribution of outcomes that motivated its use and can even harm the individuals the intervention was intended to protect.
abstract_zh: 公平感知机器学习 (fair-ml) 技术是一种算法干预措施，旨在确保受机器学习模型预测影响的个人得到公平对待。该问题通常被视为优化问题，其目标是在定量公平约束下实现高预测性能。然而，任何设计公平机器学习算法的尝试都必须假设古德哈特定律有一个例外：当公平性度量成为优化约束时，它不会不再是一个好的度量。在本文中，我们认为公平措施对古德哈特定律特别敏感。我们的主要贡献如下。首先，我们提出了一个关于公平指标合理性的道德推理框架。与现有的工作相反，我们的框架包含这样的信念：结果的分配是否公平，不仅取决于不平等的原因，还取决于决策主体必须获得特定利益或避免负担的道德主张。我们使用该框架来提炼道德和经验假设，在这些假设下，特定的公平指标对应于结果的公平分配。其次，我们探讨了在 fair-ml 算法中使用公平性度量作为约束在道德上合理的程度，以 Hardt 等人引入的 fair-ml 算法为例。 （2016）。我们说明，通过 fair-ml 算法强制执行公平性度量通常不会导致激励其使用的结果的公平分配，甚至可能会伤害干预措施旨在保护的个人。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨公平性感知机器学习（fair-ml）在道德上的正当性，分析其是否符合Goodhart定律的例外情况，并构建道德推理框架评估公平性指标的合理性。
AI.motivation: 现有fair-ml方法通过量化约束实现公平，但作者质疑其是否真正符合道德公平，且可能因Goodhart定律失效而适得其反，需重新审视其道德基础。
AI.method: 提出道德推理框架，结合道德主张与经验假设，分析公平性指标的正当性，并以Hardt等人算法为例，验证强制约束的公平性目标是否达成。
AI.result: 发现强制执行公平指标可能无法实现预期公平，甚至损害目标群体利益，揭示fair-ml算法与道德公平之间的潜在冲突。
AI.conclusion: 需谨慎对待fair-ml的道德正当性，避免将量化公平指标简单作为约束，应更深入分析其与道德原则的关联性及实际影响。

On the Moral Justification of Fairness-Aware Machine Learning 古德哈特定律有例外吗？论公平意识机器学习的道德正当性 Fairness-aware machine learning (fair-ml) techniques are algorithmic interventions designed to ensure that individuals who are affected by the predictions of a machine learning model are treated fairly. The problem is often posed as an optimization problem, where the objective is to achieve high predictive performance under a quantitative fairness constraint. However, any attempt to design a fair-ml algorithm must assume a world where Goodhart's law has an exception: when a fairness measure becomes an optimization constraint, it does not cease to be a good measure. In this paper, we argue that fairness measures are particularly sensitive to Goodhart's law. Our main contributions are as follows. First, we present a framework for moral reasoning about the justification of fairness metrics. In contrast to existing work, our framework incorporates the belief that whether a distribution of outcomes is fair, depends not only on the cause of inequalities but also on what moral claims decision subjects have to receive a particular benefit or avoid a burden. We use the framework to distil moral and empirical assumptions under which particular fairness metrics correspond to a fair distribution of outcomes. Second, we explore the extent to which employing fairness metrics as a constraint in a fair-ml algorithm is morally justifiable, exemplified by the fair-ml algorithm introduced by Hardt et al. (2016). We illustrate that enforcing a fairness metric through a fair-ml algorithm often does not result in the fair distribution of outcomes that motivated its use and can even harm the individuals the intervention was intended to protect. 公平感知机器学习 (fair-ml) 技术是一种算法干预措施，旨在确保受机器学习模型预测影响的个人得到公平对待。该问题通常被视为优化问题，其目标是在定量公平约束下实现高预测性能。然而，任何设计公平机器学习算法的尝试都必须假设古德哈特定律有一个例外：当公平性度量成为优化约束时，它不会不再是一个好的度量。在本文中，我们认为公平措施对古德哈特定律特别敏感。我们的主要贡献如下。首先，我们提出了一个关于公平指标合理性的道德推理框架。与现有的工作相反，我们的框架包含这样的信念：结果的分配是否公平，不仅取决于不平等的原因，还取决于决策主体必须获得特定利益或避免负担的道德主张。我们使用该框架来提炼道德和经验假设，在这些假设下，特定的公平指标对应于结果的公平分配。其次，我们探讨了在 fair-ml 算法中使用公平性度量作为约束在道德上合理的程度，以 Hardt 等人引入的 fair-ml 算法为例。 （2016）。我们说明，通过 fair-ml 算法强制执行公平性度量通常不会导致激励其使用的结果的公平分配，甚至可能会伤害干预措施旨在保护的个人。 本文探讨公平性感知机器学习（fair-ml）在道德上的正当性，分析其是否符合Goodhart定律的例外情况，并构建道德推理框架评估公平性指标的合理性。 Hilde Weerts,Lambèr Royakkers,Mykola Pechenizkiy cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Boli Chen,Guangwei Xu,Xiaobin Wang,Pengjun Xie,Meishan Zhang,Fei Huang
title: AISHELL-NER: Named Entity Recognition from Chinese Speech
title_zh: AISHELL-NER：中文语音的命名实体识别
abstract: Named Entity Recognition (NER) from speech is among Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) tasks, aiming to extract semantic information from the speech signal. NER from speech is usually made through a two-step pipeline that consists of (1) processing the audio using an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system and (2) applying an NER tagger to the ASR outputs. Recent works have shown the capability of the End-to-End (E2E) approach for NER from English and French speech, which is essentially entity-aware ASR. However, due to the many homophones and polyphones that exist in Chinese, NER from Chinese speech is effectively a more challenging task. In this paper, we introduce a new dataset AISEHLL-NER for NER from Chinese speech. Extensive experiments are conducted to explore the performance of several state-of-the-art methods. The results demonstrate that the performance could be improved by combining entity-aware ASR and pretrained NER tagger, which can be easily applied to the modern SLU pipeline. The dataset is publicly available at github.com/Alibaba-NLP/AISHELL-NER.
summary: Named Entity Recognition (NER) from speech is among Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) tasks, aiming to extract semantic information from the speech signal. NER from speech is usually made through a two-step pipeline that consists of (1) processing the audio using an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system and (2) applying an NER tagger to the ASR outputs. Recent works have shown the capability of the End-to-End (E2E) approach for NER from English and French speech, which is essentially entity-aware ASR. However, due to the many homophones and polyphones that exist in Chinese, NER from Chinese speech is effectively a more challenging task. In this paper, we introduce a new dataset AISEHLL-NER for NER from Chinese speech. Extensive experiments are conducted to explore the performance of several state-of-the-art methods. The results demonstrate that the performance could be improved by combining entity-aware ASR and pretrained NER tagger, which can be easily applied to the modern SLU pipeline. The dataset is publicly available at github.com/Alibaba-NLP/AISHELL-NER.
abstract_zh: 语音命名实体识别 (NER) 是口语理解 (SLU) 任务之一，旨在从语音信号中提取语义信息。语音 NER 通常通过两步管道进行，其中包括 (1) 使用自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统处理音频，以及 (2) 将 NER 标记器应用于 ASR 输出。最近的工作展示了英语和法语语音中端到端（E2E）方法的能力，这本质上是实体感知的 ASR。然而，由于中文中存在许多同音词和多音词，中文语音的命名实体识别实际上是一项更具挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们引入了一个用于中文语音 NER 的新数据集 AISEHLL-NER。进行了大量的实验来探索几种最先进方法的性能。结果表明，通过结合实体感知 ASR 和预训练的 NER 标记器可以提高性能，并且可以轻松应用于现代 SLU 管道。该数据集可在 github.com/Alibaba-NLP/AISHELL-NER 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了AISHELL-NER数据集，并探索了结合实体感知ASR与预训练NER标签器的方法，以提升中文语音命名实体识别性能。
AI.motivation: 中文语音中存在大量同音字和多音字，使得语音命名实体识别（NER）比英文更困难，亟需专门数据集和有效方法进行研究。
AI.method: 构建中文语音NER数据集AISHELL-NER，并通过实验对比多种前沿方法，验证实体感知ASR与预训练NER标签器结合的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合实体感知ASR和预训练NER标签器的方法显著提升了中文语音NER性能，且该方法可直接应用于现代SLU流水线。
AI.conclusion: AISHELL-NER数据集为中文语音NER研究提供了重要资源，而融合实体感知ASR与预训练模型的方法为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Chao-Han Huck Yang,Zeeshan Ahmed,Yile Gu,Joseph Szurley,Roger Ren,Linda Liu,Andreas Stolcke,Ivan Bulyko
title: Mitigating Closed-model Adversarial Examples with Bayesian Neural Modeling for Enhanced End-to-End Speech Recognition
title_zh: 使用贝叶斯神经建模缓解封闭模型对抗示例以增强端到端语音识别
abstract: In this work, we aim to enhance the system robustness of end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) against adversarially-noisy speech examples. We focus on a rigorous and empirical "closed-model adversarial robustness" setting (e.g., on-device or cloud applications). The adversarial noise is only generated by closed-model optimization (e.g., evolutionary and zeroth-order estimation) without accessing gradient information of a targeted ASR model directly. We propose an advanced Bayesian neural network (BNN) based adversarial detector, which could model latent distributions against adaptive adversarial perturbation with divergence measurement. We further simulate deployment scenarios of RNN Transducer, Conformer, and wav2vec-2.0 based ASR systems with the proposed adversarial detection system. Leveraging the proposed BNN based detection system, we improve detection rate by +2.77 to +5.42% (relative +3.03 to +6.26%) and reduce the word error rate by 5.02 to 7.47% on LibriSpeech datasets compared to the current model enhancement methods against the adversarial speech examples.
summary: In this work, we aim to enhance the system robustness of end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) against adversarially-noisy speech examples. We focus on a rigorous and empirical "closed-model adversarial robustness" setting (e.g., on-device or cloud applications). The adversarial noise is only generated by closed-model optimization (e.g., evolutionary and zeroth-order estimation) without accessing gradient information of a targeted ASR model directly. We propose an advanced Bayesian neural network (BNN) based adversarial detector, which could model latent distributions against adaptive adversarial perturbation with divergence measurement. We further simulate deployment scenarios of RNN Transducer, Conformer, and wav2vec-2.0 based ASR systems with the proposed adversarial detection system. Leveraging the proposed BNN based detection system, we improve detection rate by +2.77 to +5.42% (relative +3.03 to +6.26%) and reduce the word error rate by 5.02 to 7.47% on LibriSpeech datasets compared to the current model enhancement methods against the adversarial speech examples.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们的目标是增强端到端自动语音识别（ASR）针对对抗性噪声语音示例的系统鲁棒性。我们专注于严格且实证的“封闭模型对抗鲁棒性”设置（例如，设备上或云应用程序）。对抗性噪声仅通过封闭模型优化（例如进化和零阶估计）生成，而不直接访问目标 ASR 模型的梯度信息。我们提出了一种基于先进贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）的对抗检测器，它可以通过散度测量对自适应对抗扰动的潜在分布进行建模。我们使用所提出的对抗性检测系统进一步模拟基于 RNN Transducer、Conformer 和 wav2vec-2.0 的 ASR 系统的部署场景。利用所提出的基于 BNN 的检测系统，与当前针对对抗性语音示例的模型增强方法相比，我们在 LibriSpeech 数据集上将检测率提高了 +2.77% 至 +5.42%（相对 +3.03% 至 +6.26%），并将单词错误率降低了 5.02% 至 7.47%。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过贝叶斯神经网络模型增强端到端语音识别系统对对抗性噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在封闭模型对抗场景下（如设备端或云端应用）难以有效检测对抗性噪声，且无法直接访问目标模型梯度信息。
AI.method: 提出基于贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）的对抗检测器，通过分布差异度量建模潜在分布以应对自适应对抗扰动，并在RNN Transducer、Conformer和wav2vec-2.0系统中验证。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，检测率提升2.77%-5.42%（相对提升3.03%-6.26%），词错误率降低5.02%-7.47%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在封闭模型对抗场景下有效提升了语音识别系统的鲁棒性，适用于实际部署场景。

authors_text: Larissa T. Triess,Andre Bühler,David Peter,Fabian B. Flohr,J. Marius Zöllner
title: Point Cloud Generation with Continuous Conditioning
title_zh: 连续调节的点云生成
comment: Accepted at International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2022
comments: Accepted at International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2022
abstract: Generative models can be used to synthesize 3D objects of high quality and diversity. However, there is typically no control over the properties of the generated object.This paper proposes a novel generative adversarial network (GAN) setup that generates 3D point cloud shapes conditioned on a continuous parameter. In an exemplary application, we use this to guide the generative process to create a 3D object with a custom-fit shape. We formulate this generation process in a multi-task setting by using the concept of auxiliary classifier GANs. Further, we propose to sample the generator label input for training from a kernel density estimation (KDE) of the dataset. Our ablations show that this leads to significant performance increase in regions with few samples. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments show that we gain explicit control over the object dimensions while maintaining good generation quality and diversity.
summary: Generative models can be used to synthesize 3D objects of high quality and diversity. However, there is typically no control over the properties of the generated object.This paper proposes a novel generative adversarial network (GAN) setup that generates 3D point cloud shapes conditioned on a continuous parameter. In an exemplary application, we use this to guide the generative process to create a 3D object with a custom-fit shape. We formulate this generation process in a multi-task setting by using the concept of auxiliary classifier GANs. Further, we propose to sample the generator label input for training from a kernel density estimation (KDE) of the dataset. Our ablations show that this leads to significant performance increase in regions with few samples. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments show that we gain explicit control over the object dimensions while maintaining good generation quality and diversity.
abstract_zh: 生成模型可用于合成高质量和多样性的 3D 对象。然而，通常无法控制生成对象的属性。本文提出了一种新颖的生成对抗网络 (GAN) 设置，可生成以连续参数为条件的 3D 点云形状。在示例应用程序中，我们使用它来指导生成过程以创建具有自定义形状的 3D 对象。我们使用辅助分类器 GAN 的概念在多任务设置中制定了这个生成过程。此外，我们建议从数据集的核密度估计（KDE）中对生成器标签输入进行采样以进行训练。我们的消融表明，这会导致样本较少的区域的性能显着提高。大量的定量和定性实验表明，我们在保持良好的生成质量和多样性的同时，获得了对对象尺寸的明确控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于连续条件的生成对抗网络（GAN）方法，用于生成可控的3D点云形状。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型难以控制生成物体的属性，缺乏对形状尺寸等参数的显式调节能力。
AI.method: 设计多任务辅助分类器GAN框架，结合核密度估计（KDE）采样策略优化生成器标签输入。
AI.result: 在样本稀疏区域性能显著提升，实现对物体尺寸的精确控制同时保持生成质量与多样性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为定制化3D物体生成提供了有效解决方案，适用于需要参数化控制的场景。

authors_text: Wei Wei,Chao Huang,Lianghao Xia,Yong Xu,Jiashu Zhao,Dawei Yin
title: Contrastive Meta Learning with Behavior Multiplicity for Recommendation
title_zh: 具有行为多样性的对比元学习用于推荐
comment: Published as a full paper at WSDM 2022 and Awarded as Best Paper Candidate
comments: Published as a full paper at WSDM 2022 and Awarded as Best Paper Candidate
abstract: A well-informed recommendation framework could not only help users identify their interested items, but also benefit the revenue of various online platforms (e.g., e-commerce, social media). Traditional recommendation models usually assume that only a single type of interaction exists between user and item, and fail to model the multiplex user-item relationships from multi-typed user behavior data, such as page view, add-to-favourite and purchase. While some recent studies propose to capture the dependencies across different types of behaviors, two important challenges have been less explored: i) Dealing with the sparse supervision signal under target behaviors (e.g., purchase). ii) Capturing the personalized multi-behavior patterns with customized dependency modeling. To tackle the above challenges, we devise a new model CML, Contrastive Meta Learning (CML), to maintain dedicated cross-type behavior dependency for different users. In particular, we propose a multi-behavior contrastive learning framework to distill transferable knowledge across different types of behaviors via the constructed contrastive loss. In addition, to capture the diverse multi-behavior patterns, we design a contrastive meta network to encode the customized behavior heterogeneity for different users. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets indicate that our method consistently outperforms various state-of-the-art recommendation methods. Our empirical studies further suggest that the contrastive meta learning paradigm offers great potential for capturing the behavior multiplicity in recommendation. We release our model implementation at: https://github.com/weiwei1206/CML.git.
summary: A well-informed recommendation framework could not only help users identify their interested items, but also benefit the revenue of various online platforms (e.g., e-commerce, social media). Traditional recommendation models usually assume that only a single type of interaction exists between user and item, and fail to model the multiplex user-item relationships from multi-typed user behavior data, such as page view, add-to-favourite and purchase. While some recent studies propose to capture the dependencies across different types of behaviors, two important challenges have been less explored: i) Dealing with the sparse supervision signal under target behaviors (e.g., purchase). ii) Capturing the personalized multi-behavior patterns with customized dependency modeling. To tackle the above challenges, we devise a new model CML, Contrastive Meta Learning (CML), to maintain dedicated cross-type behavior dependency for different users. In particular, we propose a multi-behavior contrastive learning framework to distill transferable knowledge across different types of behaviors via the constructed contrastive loss. In addition, to capture the diverse multi-behavior patterns, we design a contrastive meta network to encode the customized behavior heterogeneity for different users. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets indicate that our method consistently outperforms various state-of-the-art recommendation methods. Our empirical studies further suggest that the contrastive meta learning paradigm offers great potential for capturing the behavior multiplicity in recommendation. We release our model implementation at: https://github.com/weiwei1206/CML.git.
abstract_zh: 一个消息灵通的推荐框架不仅可以帮助用户识别他们感兴趣的商品，而且还可以使各种在线平台（例如电子商务、社交媒体）的收入受益。传统的推荐模型通常假设用户和项目之间仅存在单一类型的交互，并且无法根据多类型的用户行为数据（例如页面浏览、添加到收藏夹和购买）对多重用户-项目关系进行建模。虽然最近的一些研究提出捕获不同类型行为之间的依赖性，但对两个重要挑战的探讨较少：i）处理目标行为（例如购买）下的稀疏监督信号。 ii）通过定制的依赖建模捕获个性化的多行为模式。为了应对上述挑战，我们设计了一种新的模型 CML，即对比元学习（CML），为不同用户维护专用的跨类型行为依赖。特别是，我们提出了一种多行为对比学习框架，通过构建的对比损失来提炼不同类型行为之间的可转移知识。此外，为了捕获多样化的多行为模式，我们设计了一个对比元网络来编码不同用户的定制行为异质性。对三个现实世界数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法始终优于各种最先进的推荐方法。我们的实证研究进一步表明，对比元学习范式为捕获推荐中的行为多样性提供了巨大的潜力。我们在以下位置发布了模型实现：https://github.com/weiwei1206/CML.git。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比元学习的推荐框架CML，用于建模用户多类型行为间的复杂关系以提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐模型仅考虑单一用户-物品交互，无法有效建模多类型行为（如浏览、收藏、购买）间的复杂依赖关系，且存在目标行为监督信号稀疏和个性化行为模式捕捉困难的挑战。
AI.method: 设计CML框架，包含多行为对比学习模块（通过对比损失跨行为迁移知识）和对比元网络（编码用户个性化行为异质性），实现行为间依赖关系的定制化建模。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上持续优于多种先进推荐方法，实验证明该范式在捕捉行为多样性方面具有显著潜力。
AI.conclusion: 对比元学习范式能有效建模用户行为多重性，为推荐系统处理多源行为数据提供新思路。

authors_text: Junghyun Koo,Seungryeol Paik,Kyogu Lee
title: End-to-end Music Remastering System Using Self-supervised and Adversarial Training
title_zh: 使用自我监督和对抗性训练的端到端音乐重制系统
comment: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2022
comments: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2022
abstract: Mastering is an essential step in music production, but it is also a challenging task that has to go through the hands of experienced audio engineers, where they adjust tone, space, and volume of a song. Remastering follows the same technical process, in which the context lies in mastering a song for the times. As these tasks have high entry barriers, we aim to lower the barriers by proposing an end-to-end music remastering system that transforms the mastering style of input audio to that of the target. The system is trained in a self-supervised manner, in which released pop songs were used for training. We also anticipated the model to generate realistic audio reflecting the reference's mastering style by applying a pre-trained encoder and a projection discriminator. We validate our results with quantitative metrics and a subjective listening test and show that the model generated samples of mastering style similar to the target.
summary: Mastering is an essential step in music production, but it is also a challenging task that has to go through the hands of experienced audio engineers, where they adjust tone, space, and volume of a song. Remastering follows the same technical process, in which the context lies in mastering a song for the times. As these tasks have high entry barriers, we aim to lower the barriers by proposing an end-to-end music remastering system that transforms the mastering style of input audio to that of the target. The system is trained in a self-supervised manner, in which released pop songs were used for training. We also anticipated the model to generate realistic audio reflecting the reference's mastering style by applying a pre-trained encoder and a projection discriminator. We validate our results with quantitative metrics and a subjective listening test and show that the model generated samples of mastering style similar to the target.
abstract_zh: 母带制作是音乐制作中必不可少的步骤，但这也是一项具有挑战性的任务，必须经过经验丰富的音频工程师的双手，他们调整歌曲的音调、空间和音量。重新制作遵循相同的技术流程，其中的背景是为时代制作一首歌曲。由于这些任务具有很高的进入门槛，我们的目标是通过提出一种端到端的音乐重新制作系统来降低门槛，该系统将输入音频的制作风格转换为目标的制作风格。该系统以自我监督的方式进行训练，其中使用已发布的流行歌曲进行训练。我们还期望该模型通过应用预先训练的编码器和投影鉴别器来生成反映参考的母带处理风格的真实音频。我们通过定量指标和主观听力测试验证了我们的结果，并表明该模型生成了与目标相似的母带风格样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的音乐重制系统，通过自监督和对抗训练将输入音频的母带处理风格转换为目标风格。
AI.motivation: 母带处理是音乐制作中的关键步骤，但需要经验丰富的音频工程师操作，门槛较高。本文旨在通过自动化系统降低这一技术门槛。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习方法，利用流行歌曲进行训练，并结合预训练编码器和投影判别器，通过对抗训练生成符合参考母带风格的音频。
AI.result: 通过定量指标和主观听觉测试验证，模型生成的音频在母带风格上与目标高度相似。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能够有效实现音乐风格的母带转换，为自动化音乐制作提供了可行方案。

search_text: End-to-end Music Remastering System Using Self-supervised and Adversarial Training 使用自我监督和对抗性训练的端到端音乐重制系统 Mastering is an essential step in music production, but it is also a challenging task that has to go through the hands of experienced audio engineers, where they adjust tone, space, and volume of a song. Remastering follows the same technical process, in which the context lies in mastering a song for the times. As these tasks have high entry barriers, we aim to lower the barriers by proposing an end-to-end music remastering system that transforms the mastering style of input audio to that of the target. The system is trained in a self-supervised manner, in which released pop songs were used for training. We also anticipated the model to generate realistic audio reflecting the reference's mastering style by applying a pre-trained encoder and a projection discriminator. We validate our results with quantitative metrics and a subjective listening test and show that the model generated samples of mastering style similar to the target. 母带制作是音乐制作中必不可少的步骤，但这也是一项具有挑战性的任务，必须经过经验丰富的音频工程师的双手，他们调整歌曲的音调、空间和音量。重新制作遵循相同的技术流程，其中的背景是为时代制作一首歌曲。由于这些任务具有很高的进入门槛，我们的目标是通过提出一种端到端的音乐重新制作系统来降低门槛，该系统将输入音频的制作风格转换为目标的制作风格。该系统以自我监督的方式进行训练，其中使用已发布的流行歌曲进行训练。我们还期望该模型通过应用预先训练的编码器和投影鉴别器来生成反映参考的母带处理风格的真实音频。我们通过定量指标和主观听力测试验证了我们的结果，并表明该模型生成了与目标相似的母带风格样本。 本文提出了一种端到端的音乐重制系统，通过自监督和对抗训练将输入音频的母带处理风格转换为目标风格。 Junghyun Koo,Seungryeol Paik,Kyogu Lee eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Haihan Tang,Yi Wang,Lap-Pui Chau
title: TAFNet: A Three-Stream Adaptive Fusion Network for RGB-T Crowd Counting
title_zh: TAFNet：用于 RGB-T 人群计数的三流自适应融合网络
comment: This work has been accepted by IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems (ISCAS) 2022
comments: This work has been accepted by IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems (ISCAS) 2022
abstract: In this paper, we propose a three-stream adaptive fusion network named TAFNet, which uses paired RGB and thermal images for crowd counting. Specifically, TAFNet is divided into one main stream and two auxiliary streams. We combine a pair of RGB and thermal images to constitute the input of main stream. Two auxiliary streams respectively exploit RGB image and thermal image to extract modality-specific features. Besides, we propose an Information Improvement Module (IIM) to fuse the modality-specific features into the main stream adaptively. Experiment results on RGBT-CC dataset show that our method achieves more than 20% improvement on mean average error and root mean squared error compared with state-of-the-art method. The source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/TANGHAIHAN/TAFNet.
summary: In this paper, we propose a three-stream adaptive fusion network named TAFNet, which uses paired RGB and thermal images for crowd counting. Specifically, TAFNet is divided into one main stream and two auxiliary streams. We combine a pair of RGB and thermal images to constitute the input of main stream. Two auxiliary streams respectively exploit RGB image and thermal image to extract modality-specific features. Besides, we propose an Information Improvement Module (IIM) to fuse the modality-specific features into the main stream adaptively. Experiment results on RGBT-CC dataset show that our method achieves more than 20% improvement on mean average error and root mean squared error compared with state-of-the-art method. The source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/TANGHAIHAN/TAFNet.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 TAFNet 的三流自适应融合网络，它使用成对的 RGB 和热图像进行人群计数。具体来说，TAFNet分为一个主流和两个辅流。我们将一对RGB图像和热图像组合起来构成主流的输入。两个辅助流分别利用 RGB 图像和热图像来提取特定于模态的特征。此外，我们提出了一个信息改进模块（IIM）来自适应地将特定于模态的特征融合到主流中。 RGBT-CC数据集上的实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在平均误差和均方根误差上实现了20%以上的改进。源代码将在 https://github.com/唐海汉/TAFNet 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TAFNet的三流自适应融合网络，用于结合RGB和热成像图像进行人群计数。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂环境下人群计数精度不足，需融合多模态信息提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建包含主流和两个辅助流的网络结构，主流处理融合RGB-热图像，辅助流分别提取单模态特征，并通过信息增强模块自适应融合特征。
AI.result: 在RGBT-CC数据集上，平均绝对误差和均方根误差较先进方法提升超20%。
AI.conclusion: TAFNet通过多流自适应融合有效提升跨模态人群计数性能，代码已开源。

authors_text: Muhammad Ali,Sayed Hashim
title: Survey on Self-supervised Representation Learning Using Image Transformations
title_zh: 使用图像变换的自监督表示学习调查
abstract: Deep neural networks need huge amount of training data, while in real world there is a scarcity of data available for training purposes. To resolve these issues, self-supervised learning (SSL) methods are used. SSL using geometric transformations (GT) is a simple yet powerful technique used in unsupervised representation learning. Although multiple survey papers have reviewed SSL techniques, there is none that only focuses on those that use geometric transformations. Furthermore, such methods have not been covered in depth in papers where they are reviewed. Our motivation to present this work is that geometric transformations have shown to be powerful supervisory signals in unsupervised representation learning. Moreover, many such works have found tremendous success, but have not gained much attention. We present a concise survey of SSL approaches that use geometric transformations. We shortlist six representative models that use image transformations including those based on predicting and autoencoding transformations. We review their architecture as well as learning methodologies. We also compare the performance of these models in the object recognition task on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets. Our analysis indicates the AETv2 performs the best in most settings. Rotation with feature decoupling also performed well in some settings. We then derive insights from the observed results. Finally, we conclude with a summary of the results and insights as well as highlighting open problems to be addressed and indicating various future directions.
summary: Deep neural networks need huge amount of training data, while in real world there is a scarcity of data available for training purposes. To resolve these issues, self-supervised learning (SSL) methods are used. SSL using geometric transformations (GT) is a simple yet powerful technique used in unsupervised representation learning. Although multiple survey papers have reviewed SSL techniques, there is none that only focuses on those that use geometric transformations. Furthermore, such methods have not been covered in depth in papers where they are reviewed. Our motivation to present this work is that geometric transformations have shown to be powerful supervisory signals in unsupervised representation learning. Moreover, many such works have found tremendous success, but have not gained much attention. We present a concise survey of SSL approaches that use geometric transformations. We shortlist six representative models that use image transformations including those based on predicting and autoencoding transformations. We review their architecture as well as learning methodologies. We also compare the performance of these models in the object recognition task on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets. Our analysis indicates the AETv2 performs the best in most settings. Rotation with feature decoupling also performed well in some settings. We then derive insights from the observed results. Finally, we conclude with a summary of the results and insights as well as highlighting open problems to be addressed and indicating various future directions.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络需要大量的训练数据，而现实世界中可用于训练的数据却很少。为了解决这些问题，使用了自我监督学习（SSL）方法。使用几何变换 (GT) 的 SSL 是一种简单但功能强大的技术，用于无监督表示学习。尽管多篇调查论文回顾了 SSL 技术，但没有一篇只关注那些使用几何变换的技术。此外，这些方法尚未在对其进行综述的论文中进行深入讨论。我们提出这项工作的动机是，几何变换已被证明是无监督表示学习中强大的监督信号。而且，许多此类作品取得了巨大成功，但却没有引起太多关注。我们对使用几何变换的 SSL 方法进行了简要的调查。我们列出了六个使用图像变换的代表性模型，包括基于预测和自动编码变换的模型。我们回顾了他们的架构和学习方法。我们还比较了这些模型在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上的对象识别任务中的性能。我们的分析表明 AETv2 在大多数设置中表现最佳。具有特征解耦的旋转在某些设置中也表现良好。然后我们从观察到的结果中得出见解。最后，我们总结了结果和见解，并强调了需要解决的开放性问题并指出了未来的各种方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于图像变换的自监督表示学习方法，比较了六种代表性模型在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有综述未专门聚焦于几何变换（GT）驱动的自监督学习方法，而此类方法在无监督表示学习中表现出强大潜力却未获足够关注。
AI.method: 筛选六种基于图像变换的自监督学习模型（包括预测和自编码变换方法），分析其架构与学习方法，并在标准数据集上对比性能。
AI.result: AETv2在多数设置中表现最佳，特征解耦旋转方法在部分场景中效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 总结模型表现与启示，指出开放问题并提出未来研究方向，如更高效的变换设计与跨任务泛化能力提升。

authors_text: Fausto Giunchiglia,Mayukh Bagchi,Xiaolei Diao
title: Visual Ground Truth Construction as Faceted Classification
title_zh: 视觉地面实况构建作为多面分类
abstract: Recent work in Machine Learning and Computer Vision has provided evidence of systematic design flaws in the development of major object recognition benchmark datasets. One such example is ImageNet, wherein, for several categories of images, there are incongruences between the objects they represent and the labels used to annotate them. The consequences of this problem are major, in particular considering the large number of machine learning applications, not least those based on Deep Neural Networks, that have been trained on these datasets. In this paper we posit the problem to be the lack of a knowledge representation (KR) methodology providing the foundations for the construction of these ground truth benchmark datasets. Accordingly, we propose a solution articulated in three main steps: (i) deconstructing the object recognition process in four ordered stages grounded in the philosophical theory of teleosemantics; (ii) based on such stratification, proposing a novel four-phased methodology for organizing objects in classification hierarchies according to their visual properties; and (iii) performing such classification according to the faceted classification paradigm. The key novelty of our approach lies in the fact that we construct the classification hierarchies from visual properties exploiting visual genus-differentiae, and not from linguistically grounded properties. The proposed approach is validated by a set of experiments on the ImageNet hierarchy of musical experiments.
summary: Recent work in Machine Learning and Computer Vision has provided evidence of systematic design flaws in the development of major object recognition benchmark datasets. One such example is ImageNet, wherein, for several categories of images, there are incongruences between the objects they represent and the labels used to annotate them. The consequences of this problem are major, in particular considering the large number of machine learning applications, not least those based on Deep Neural Networks, that have been trained on these datasets. In this paper we posit the problem to be the lack of a knowledge representation (KR) methodology providing the foundations for the construction of these ground truth benchmark datasets. Accordingly, we propose a solution articulated in three main steps: (i) deconstructing the object recognition process in four ordered stages grounded in the philosophical theory of teleosemantics; (ii) based on such stratification, proposing a novel four-phased methodology for organizing objects in classification hierarchies according to their visual properties; and (iii) performing such classification according to the faceted classification paradigm. The key novelty of our approach lies in the fact that we construct the classification hierarchies from visual properties exploiting visual genus-differentiae, and not from linguistically grounded properties. The proposed approach is validated by a set of experiments on the ImageNet hierarchy of musical experiments.
abstract_zh: 机器学习和计算机视觉领域的最新工作提供了主要对象识别基准数据集开发中系统设计缺陷的证据。 ImageNet 就是这样的一个例子，其中，对于几类图像，它们所表示的对象和用于注释它们的标签之间存在不一致。这个问题的后果是严重的，特别是考虑到大量的机器学习应用程序，尤其是那些基于深度神经网络的应用程序，这些应用程序已经在这些数据集上进行了训练。在本文中，我们认为问题是缺乏知识表示（KR）方法，为构建这些地面实况基准数据集提供基础。因此，我们提出了一个分三个主要步骤的解决方案：（i）以目的语义学的哲学理论为基础，在四个有序阶段中解构物体识别过程； (ii) 基于这种分层，提出一种新颖的四阶段方法，用于根据对象的视觉属性将对象组织到分类层次结构中； (iii)根据分面分类范例执行此类分类。我们方法的关键新颖之处在于，我们利用视觉类属差异从视觉属性构建分类层次结构，而不是从基于语言的属性构建分类层次结构。所提出的方法通过在 ImageNet 音乐实验层次上进行的一组实验得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉属性的分面分类方法，用于构建更准确的视觉基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有基准数据集（如ImageNet）存在标签与图像内容不匹配的问题，影响机器学习模型性能，需改进知识表示方法。
AI.method: 分三步：1) 基于目的语义理论解构物体识别为四个阶段；2) 提出四阶段视觉属性分类法；3) 采用分面分类组织层次结构。
AI.result: 在ImageNet音乐实验子集上验证了方法有效性，证明视觉属性分类优于语言驱动的分类方式。
AI.conclusion: 通过视觉属种差异构建分类体系，可为基准数据集提供更可靠的知识表示基础。

search_text: Visual Ground Truth Construction as Faceted Classification 视觉地面实况构建作为多面分类 Recent work in Machine Learning and Computer Vision has provided evidence of systematic design flaws in the development of major object recognition benchmark datasets. One such example is ImageNet, wherein, for several categories of images, there are incongruences between the objects they represent and the labels used to annotate them. The consequences of this problem are major, in particular considering the large number of machine learning applications, not least those based on Deep Neural Networks, that have been trained on these datasets. In this paper we posit the problem to be the lack of a knowledge representation (KR) methodology providing the foundations for the construction of these ground truth benchmark datasets. Accordingly, we propose a solution articulated in three main steps: (i) deconstructing the object recognition process in four ordered stages grounded in the philosophical theory of teleosemantics; (ii) based on such stratification, proposing a novel four-phased methodology for organizing objects in classification hierarchies according to their visual properties; and (iii) performing such classification according to the faceted classification paradigm. The key novelty of our approach lies in the fact that we construct the classification hierarchies from visual properties exploiting visual genus-differentiae, and not from linguistically grounded properties. The proposed approach is validated by a set of experiments on the ImageNet hierarchy of musical experiments. 机器学习和计算机视觉领域的最新工作提供了主要对象识别基准数据集开发中系统设计缺陷的证据。 ImageNet 就是这样的一个例子，其中，对于几类图像，它们所表示的对象和用于注释它们的标签之间存在不一致。这个问题的后果是严重的，特别是考虑到大量的机器学习应用程序，尤其是那些基于深度神经网络的应用程序，这些应用程序已经在这些数据集上进行了训练。在本文中，我们认为问题是缺乏知识表示（KR）方法，为构建这些地面实况基准数据集提供基础。因此，我们提出了一个分三个主要步骤的解决方案：（i）以目的语义学的哲学理论为基础，在四个有序阶段中解构物体识别过程； (ii) 基于这种分层，提出一种新颖的四阶段方法，用于根据对象的视觉属性将对象组织到分类层次结构中； (iii)根据分面分类范例执行此类分类。我们方法的关键新颖之处在于，我们利用视觉类属差异从视觉属性构建分类层次结构，而不是从基于语言的属性构建分类层次结构。所提出的方法通过在 ImageNet 音乐实验层次上进行的一组实验得到验证。 本文提出了一种基于视觉属性的分面分类方法，用于构建更准确的视觉基准数据集。 Fausto Giunchiglia,Mayukh Bagchi,Xiaolei Diao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yujin Oh,Go Eun Bae,Kyung-Hee Kim,Min-Kyung Yeo,Jong Chul Ye
title: Multi-Scale Hybrid Vision Transformer for Learning Gastric Histology: AI-Based Decision Support System for Gastric Cancer Treatment
title_zh: 用于学习胃组织学的多尺度混合视觉变压器：基于人工智能的胃癌治疗决策支持系统
comment: ef:Published in: IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (Volume: 27, Issue: 8, August 2023)
comments: ef:Published in: IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (Volume: 27, Issue: 8, August 2023)
abstract: Gastric endoscopic screening is an effective way to decide appropriate gastric cancer (GC) treatment at an early stage, reducing GC-associated mortality rate. Although artificial intelligence (AI) has brought a great promise to assist pathologist to screen digitalized whole slide images, existing AI systems are limited in fine-grained cancer subclassifications and have little usability in planning cancer treatment. We propose a practical AI system that enables five subclassifications of GC pathology, which can be directly matched to general GC treatment guidance. The AI system is designed to efficiently differentiate multi-classes of GC through multi-scale self-attention mechanism using 2-stage hybrid Vision Transformer (ViT) networks, by mimicking the way how human pathologists understand histology. The AI system demonstrates reliable diagnostic performance by achieving class-average sensitivity of above 0.85 on a total of 1,212 slides from multicentric cohort. Furthermore, AI-assisted pathologists show significantly improved diagnostic sensitivity by 12% in addition to 18% reduced screening time compared to human pathologists. Our results demonstrate that AI-assisted gastric endoscopic screening has a great potential for providing presumptive pathologic opinion and appropriate cancer treatment of gastric cancer in practical clinical settings.
summary: Gastric endoscopic screening is an effective way to decide appropriate gastric cancer (GC) treatment at an early stage, reducing GC-associated mortality rate. Although artificial intelligence (AI) has brought a great promise to assist pathologist to screen digitalized whole slide images, existing AI systems are limited in fine-grained cancer subclassifications and have little usability in planning cancer treatment. We propose a practical AI system that enables five subclassifications of GC pathology, which can be directly matched to general GC treatment guidance. The AI system is designed to efficiently differentiate multi-classes of GC through multi-scale self-attention mechanism using 2-stage hybrid Vision Transformer (ViT) networks, by mimicking the way how human pathologists understand histology. The AI system demonstrates reliable diagnostic performance by achieving class-average sensitivity of above 0.85 on a total of 1,212 slides from multicentric cohort. Furthermore, AI-assisted pathologists show significantly improved diagnostic sensitivity by 12% in addition to 18% reduced screening time compared to human pathologists. Our results demonstrate that AI-assisted gastric endoscopic screening has a great potential for providing presumptive pathologic opinion and appropriate cancer treatment of gastric cancer in practical clinical settings.
abstract_zh: 胃内镜筛查是早期决定适当胃癌（GC）治疗、降低GC相关死亡率的有效方法。尽管人工智能（AI）在协助病理学家筛选数字化全切片图像方面带来了巨大的希望，但现有的人工智能系统在细粒度的癌症亚分类方面受到限制，并且在规划癌症治疗方面几乎没有什么用处。我们提出了一个实用的人工智能系统，可以对GC病理进行五个子分类，可以直接与一般GC治疗指导相匹配。该人工智能系统旨在模仿人类病理学家理解组织学的方式，通过使用两级混合视觉变换器（ViT）网络的多尺度自注意力机制，有效地区分多类GC。该 AI 系统在来自多中心队列的总共 1,212 张切片上实现了 0.85 以上的类平均灵敏度，展示了可靠的诊断性能。此外，与人类病理学家相比，人工智能辅助病理学家的诊断灵敏度显着提高了 12%，筛查时间缩短了 18%。我们的结果表明，人工智能辅助胃内窥镜筛查在实际临床环境中为胃癌提供推定病理意见和适当的癌症治疗方面具有巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度混合视觉Transformer（ViT）的AI系统，用于胃癌病理亚型分类及治疗方案规划。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统在胃癌细粒度亚型分类和治疗方案规划方面存在局限性，需开发更高效的AI辅助工具以提升诊断准确性并减少病理医生工作负担。
AI.method: 设计两阶段混合ViT网络，结合多尺度自注意力机制，模拟病理医生对组织学图像的理解过程，实现五种胃癌亚型的细粒度分类。
AI.result: 在1,212张多中心切片数据集上达到0.85以上的平均类别敏感度，AI辅助病理医生诊断敏感度提升12%，筛查时间缩短18%。
AI.conclusion: 该AI系统在临床实践中具有提供胃癌初步病理意见和治疗方案的潜力，可有效辅助胃癌早期筛查与治疗决策。

authors_text: Hengshun Zhou,Jun Du,Chao-Han Huck Yang,Shifu Xiong,Chin-Hui Lee
title: A Study of Designing Compact Audio-Visual Wake Word Spotting System Based on Iterative Fine-Tuning in Neural Network Pruning
title_zh: 基于神经网络剪枝迭代微调的紧凑型视听唤醒词识别系统设计研究
comment: Accepted to ICASSP 2022. H. Zhou et al
comments: Accepted to ICASSP 2022. H. Zhou et al
abstract: Audio-only-based wake word spotting (WWS) is challenging under noisy conditions due to environmental interference in signal transmission. In this paper, we investigate on designing a compact audio-visual WWS system by utilizing visual information to alleviate the degradation. Specifically, in order to use visual information, we first encode the detected lips to fixed-size vectors with MobileNet and concatenate them with acoustic features followed by the fusion network for WWS. However, the audio-visual model based on neural networks requires a large footprint and a high computational complexity. To meet the application requirements, we introduce a neural network pruning strategy via the lottery ticket hypothesis in an iterative fine-tuning manner (LTH-IF), to the single-modal and multi-modal models, respectively. Tested on our in-house corpus for audio-visual WWS in a home TV scene, the proposed audio-visual system achieves significant performance improvements over the single-modality (audio-only or video-only) system under different noisy conditions. Moreover, LTH-IF pruning can largely reduce the network parameters and computations with no degradation of WWS performance, leading to a potential product solution for the TV wake-up scenario.
summary: Audio-only-based wake word spotting (WWS) is challenging under noisy conditions due to environmental interference in signal transmission. In this paper, we investigate on designing a compact audio-visual WWS system by utilizing visual information to alleviate the degradation. Specifically, in order to use visual information, we first encode the detected lips to fixed-size vectors with MobileNet and concatenate them with acoustic features followed by the fusion network for WWS. However, the audio-visual model based on neural networks requires a large footprint and a high computational complexity. To meet the application requirements, we introduce a neural network pruning strategy via the lottery ticket hypothesis in an iterative fine-tuning manner (LTH-IF), to the single-modal and multi-modal models, respectively. Tested on our in-house corpus for audio-visual WWS in a home TV scene, the proposed audio-visual system achieves significant performance improvements over the single-modality (audio-only or video-only) system under different noisy conditions. Moreover, LTH-IF pruning can largely reduce the network parameters and computations with no degradation of WWS performance, leading to a potential product solution for the TV wake-up scenario.
abstract_zh: 由于信号传输中的环境干扰，基于音频的唤醒词识别 (WWS) 在噪声条件下具有挑战性。在本文中，我们研究了如何利用视觉信息来设计紧凑的视听 WWS 系统来减轻退化。具体来说，为了使用视觉信息，我们首先使用 MobileNet 将检测到的嘴唇编码为固定大小的向量，并将它们与声学特征连接起来，然后是 WWS 的融合网络。然而，基于神经网络的视听模型需要较大的占地面积和较高的计算复杂度。为了满足应用需求，我们通过彩票假设以迭代微调方式（LTH-IF）分别向单模态和多模态模型引入神经网络剪枝策略。我们在家庭电视场景中的视听 WWS 内部语料库上进行了测试，所提出的视听系统在不同噪声条件下比单模态（仅音频或仅视频）系统实现了显着的性能改进。此外，LTH-IF剪枝可以在不降低WWS性能的情况下大幅减少网络参数和计算量，从而为电视唤醒场景提供潜在的产品解决方案。

AI.tldr: 设计一种基于迭代微调神经网络剪枝的紧凑型音频-视觉唤醒词检测系统。
AI.motivation: 音频单独检测在噪声环境下效果差，且传统模型计算复杂度高，需结合视觉信息并优化模型效率。
AI.method: 利用MobileNet编码视觉唇部特征并与音频特征融合，通过迭代微调剪枝策略（LTH-IF）压缩单模态与多模态模型。
AI.result: 多模态系统在噪声环境下显著优于单模态，剪枝后参数量与计算量减少，性能无损失。
AI.conclusion: 提出的音频-视觉系统与剪枝方法有效提升唤醒词检测鲁棒性，适用于电视场景的轻量化部署。

search_text: A Study of Designing Compact Audio-Visual Wake Word Spotting System Based on Iterative Fine-Tuning in Neural Network Pruning 基于神经网络剪枝迭代微调的紧凑型视听唤醒词识别系统设计研究 Audio-only-based wake word spotting (WWS) is challenging under noisy conditions due to environmental interference in signal transmission. In this paper, we investigate on designing a compact audio-visual WWS system by utilizing visual information to alleviate the degradation. Specifically, in order to use visual information, we first encode the detected lips to fixed-size vectors with MobileNet and concatenate them with acoustic features followed by the fusion network for WWS. However, the audio-visual model based on neural networks requires a large footprint and a high computational complexity. To meet the application requirements, we introduce a neural network pruning strategy via the lottery ticket hypothesis in an iterative fine-tuning manner (LTH-IF), to the single-modal and multi-modal models, respectively. Tested on our in-house corpus for audio-visual WWS in a home TV scene, the proposed audio-visual system achieves significant performance improvements over the single-modality (audio-only or video-only) system under different noisy conditions. Moreover, LTH-IF pruning can largely reduce the network parameters and computations with no degradation of WWS performance, leading to a potential product solution for the TV wake-up scenario. 由于信号传输中的环境干扰，基于音频的唤醒词识别 (WWS) 在噪声条件下具有挑战性。在本文中，我们研究了如何利用视觉信息来设计紧凑的视听 WWS 系统来减轻退化。具体来说，为了使用视觉信息，我们首先使用 MobileNet 将检测到的嘴唇编码为固定大小的向量，并将它们与声学特征连接起来，然后是 WWS 的融合网络。然而，基于神经网络的视听模型需要较大的占地面积和较高的计算复杂度。为了满足应用需求，我们通过彩票假设以迭代微调方式（LTH-IF）分别向单模态和多模态模型引入神经网络剪枝策略。我们在家庭电视场景中的视听 WWS 内部语料库上进行了测试，所提出的视听系统在不同噪声条件下比单模态（仅音频或仅视频）系统实现了显着的性能改进。此外，LTH-IF剪枝可以在不降低WWS性能的情况下大幅减少网络参数和计算量，从而为电视唤醒场景提供潜在的产品解决方案。 设计一种基于迭代微调神经网络剪枝的紧凑型音频-视觉唤醒词检测系统。 Hengshun Zhou,Jun Du,Chao-Han Huck Yang,Shifu Xiong,Chin-Hui Lee cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Beihao Xia,Conghao Wong,Qinmu Peng,Wei Yuan,Xinge You
title: CSCNet: Contextual Semantic Consistency Network for Trajectory Prediction in Crowded Spaces
title_zh: CSCNet：用于拥挤空间中轨迹预测的上下文语义一致性网络
abstract: Trajectory prediction aims to predict the movement trend of the agents like pedestrians, bikers, vehicles. It is helpful to analyze and understand human activities in crowded spaces and widely applied in many areas such as surveillance video analysis and autonomous driving systems. Thanks to the success of deep learning, trajectory prediction has made significant progress. The current methods are dedicated to studying the agents' future trajectories under the social interaction and the sceneries' physical constraints. Moreover, how to deal with these factors still catches researchers' attention. However, they ignore the \textbf{Semantic Shift Phenomenon} when modeling these interactions in various prediction sceneries. There exist several kinds of semantic deviations inner or between social and physical interactions, which we call the "\textbf{Gap}". In this paper, we propose a \textbf{C}ontextual \textbf{S}emantic \textbf{C}onsistency \textbf{Net}work (\textbf{CSCNet}) to predict agents' future activities with powerful and efficient context constraints. We utilize a well-designed context-aware transfer to obtain the intermediate representations from the scene images and trajectories. Then we eliminate the differences between social and physical interactions by aligning activity semantics and scene semantics to cross the Gap. Experiments demonstrate that CSCNet performs better than most of the current methods quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Trajectory prediction aims to predict the movement trend of the agents like pedestrians, bikers, vehicles. It is helpful to analyze and understand human activities in crowded spaces and widely applied in many areas such as surveillance video analysis and autonomous driving systems. Thanks to the success of deep learning, trajectory prediction has made significant progress. The current methods are dedicated to studying the agents' future trajectories under the social interaction and the sceneries' physical constraints. Moreover, how to deal with these factors still catches researchers' attention. However, they ignore the \textbf{Semantic Shift Phenomenon} when modeling these interactions in various prediction sceneries. There exist several kinds of semantic deviations inner or between social and physical interactions, which we call the "\textbf{Gap}". In this paper, we propose a \textbf{C}ontextual \textbf{S}emantic \textbf{C}onsistency \textbf{Net}work (\textbf{CSCNet}) to predict agents' future activities with powerful and efficient context constraints. We utilize a well-designed context-aware transfer to obtain the intermediate representations from the scene images and trajectories. Then we eliminate the differences between social and physical interactions by aligning activity semantics and scene semantics to cross the Gap. Experiments demonstrate that CSCNet performs better than most of the current methods quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 轨迹预测旨在预测行人、骑车人、车辆等主体的运动趋势。它有助于分析和理解拥挤空间中的人类活动，广泛应用于监控视频分析和自动驾驶系统等许多领域。由于深度学习的成功，轨迹预测取得了重大进展。当前的方法致力于研究智能体在社交互动和场景物理约束下的未来轨迹。此外，如何应对这些因素仍然引起研究者的关注。然而，在对各种预测场景中的这些交互进行建模时，他们忽略了\textbf{语义转变现象}。社会和身体互动内部或之间存在多种语义偏差，我们称之为“\textbf{Gap}”。在本文中，我们提出了一种 \textbf{C}ontextual \textbf{S}emantic \textbf{C}onsistency \textbf{Net}work (\textbf{CSCNet})，以通过强大而有效的上下文约束来预测代理的未来活动。我们利用精心设计的上下文感知传输来从场景图像和轨迹中获取中间表示。然后，我们通过调整活动语义和场景语义来消除社交和物理交互之间的差异，以跨越鸿沟。实验表明，CSCNet 在数量和质量上都比当前大多数方法表现得更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CSCNet，一种用于拥挤空间中轨迹预测的上下文语义一致性网络，旨在解决语义偏移现象带来的预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在建模社交与物理交互时忽略了语义偏移现象，导致社交与物理交互间存在语义差距，影响预测准确性。
AI.method: 设计上下文感知迁移模块，从场景图像和轨迹中提取中间表示，并通过对齐活动语义与场景语义消除社交与物理交互间的语义差距。
AI.result: 实验表明，CSCNet在定量和定性指标上均优于大多数现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CSCNet通过语义一致性约束有效缓解了语义偏移问题，提升了拥挤场景中轨迹预测的准确性。
